conditions may be used to reduce diffusive effects in numerical studies relying
on the Navier-Stokes equation to approach nearly inviscid solutions.

</details>


### [1036] [Berezin-Li-Yau inequality for mixed local-nonlocal Dirichlet-Laplacian](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17780)
*Aidyn Kassymov,Berikbol T. Torebek*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文研究了混合局部-非局部拉普拉斯算子的特征值问题，分别考虑了参数为正和负的情况，并建立了Berezin-Li-Yau不等式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究混合局部-非局部拉普拉斯算子的特征值问题，以扩展经典和分数阶Berezin-Li-Yau不等式的适用范围。

Method: 通过分析不同参数范围（a>0且b>0，以及a>0且b为负）下的算子性质，建立特征值的下界估计。

Result: 在两种参数情况下均建立了Berezin-Li-Yau不等式，其中负参数情况下不等式显式依赖于嵌入常数C_E。

Conclusion: 混合局部-非局部拉普拉斯算子的特征值问题在不同参数范围内均适用Berezin-Li-Yau不等式，扩展了经典和分数阶结果。

Abstract: In this paper, we consider an eigenvalue problem for mixed local-nonlocal
Laplacian
$$\mathcal{L}^{a,b}_{\Om}:=-a\Delta+b(-\Delta)^s,\,a>0,\,b\in\mathbb{R},\,s\in
(0,1),$$ with Dirichlet boundary conditions. First, the case $a>0$ and $b>0$ is
considered and the Berezin-Li-Yau inequality (lower bounds of the sum of
eigenvalues) is established. This inequality is characterised as the maximum of
the classical and fractional versions of the Berezin-Li-Yau inequality, and, in
particular, yields both the classical and fractional forms of the
Berezin-Li-Yau inequality. Next, we consider the case $a>0$ and
$-\frac{a}{C_E}<b<0$, where $C_E\geq 1$ is the constant of the continuous
embedding $H_{0}^{1}(\Om)\subset H_{0}^{s}(\Om)$. In this setting, we also
derive the Berezin-Li-Yau inequality, which explicitly depends on the constant
$C_E$.

</details>


### [1037] [Low regularity well-posedness of nonlocal dispersive perturbations of Burgers' equation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17801)
*Luc Molinet,Didier Pilod,Stéphane Vento*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文研究了低色散Benjamin-Ono方程的适定性，证明了局部和全局适定性条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究低色散Burgers方程及其变体的适定性问题，特别是Benjamin-Ono方程，以扩展对这类方程的理解。

Method: 通过分析Cauchy问题，利用Sobolev空间理论和Hamiltonian结构，证明了局部和全局适定性。

Result: 在$H^s(\mathbb K)$中，对于$s>s_{\alpha}$，方程局部适定；对于$\alpha>\frac{2}{3}$，全局适定；对于$\alpha>\frac{4}{5}$，在能量空间中全局适定。

Conclusion: 论文证明了在特定条件下，低色散Benjamin-Ono方程在Sobolev空间中的局部适定性，并在某些情况下推导出全局适定性。

Abstract: We consider the Cauchy problem associated to a class of dispersive
perturbations of Burgers' equations, which contains the low dispersion
Benjamin-Ono equation, (also known as low dispersion fractional KdV equation),
$$ \partial_tu-D_x^{\alpha}\partial_xu=\partial_x(u^2) \, ,$$ and prove that it
is locally well-posed in $H^s(\mathbb K)$, $\mathbb K=\mathbb R$ or $\mathbb
T$, for $s>s_{\alpha}$, where \begin{equation*} s_\alpha=\begin{cases}
  1-\frac{3\alpha}4 & \text{for} \quad \frac23 \le \alpha \le 1;
  \frac 32(1-\alpha) & \text{for} \quad \frac13 \le \alpha \le \frac23;
  \frac 32-\frac{\alpha}{1-\alpha} & \text{for} \quad 0 < \alpha \le \frac13 .
  \end{cases} \end{equation*} The uniqueness is unconditional in $H^s(\mathbb
K)$ for $s>\max\{\frac12,s_{\alpha}\}$. Moreover, we obtain \emph{a priori}
estimates for the solutions at the lower regularity threshold
$s>\widetilde{s}_\alpha$ where \begin{equation*}
\widetilde{s}_\alpha=\begin{cases}
  \frac 12-\frac \alpha 4 & \text{for} \quad \frac23 \le \alpha \le 1;
  1-\alpha & \text{for} \quad \frac12 \le \alpha \le \frac23;
  \frac 32-\frac{\alpha}{1-\alpha} & \text{for} \quad 0 < \alpha \le \frac12 .
  \end{cases} \end{equation*} As a consequence of these results and of the
Hamiltonian structure of the equation, we deduce global well-posedness in
$H^s(\mathbb K)$ for $s>s_{\alpha}$ when $\alpha>\frac23$, and in the energy
space $H^{\frac{\alpha}2}(\mathbb K)$ when $\alpha>\frac45$.

</details>


### [1038] [Structure of two-dimensional mod$(q)$ area-minimizing currents near flat singularities: the codimension one case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17813)
*Anna Skorobogatova,Luca Spolaor,Salvatore Stuvard*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: Error


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Error

Method: Error

Result: Error

Conclusion: Error

Abstract: We obtain a fine structural result for two-dimensional mod$(q)$
area-minimizing currents of codimension one, close to flat singularities.
Precisely, we show that, locally around any such singularity, the current is a
$C^{1,\alpha}$-perturbation of the graph of a radially homogeneous special
multiple-valued function that arises from a superposition of homogeneous
harmonic polynomials. Additionally, as a preliminary step towards an analogous
result in arbitrary codimension, we prove in general that the set of flat
singularities of density $\frac{q}{2}$, where the current is ``genuinely
mod$(q)$", consists of isolated points.

</details>


### [1039] [Global well-posedness of planar MHD system without heat conductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18057)
*Jinkai Li,Mingjie Li*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文研究了具有恒定粘性和电阻率但无热导率的平面磁流体动力学（MHD）系统的柯西问题，证明了在自然远场真空下，强解的全局适定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 由于质量有限，研究在自然远场真空下的大初始数据强解的全局适定性。

Method: 利用有效粘性通量的优势，并开发了纵向速度$u$与横向磁场$m h$之间的新耦合结构。

Result: 证明了强解的全局适定性，允许密度不连续性和内部真空。

Conclusion: 通过新耦合结构克服了熵型能量不等式的不适用性，成功恢复了$m h$的耗散估计。

Abstract: In this paper, we consider the Cauchy problem to the planar
magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) system with both constant viscosity and constant
resistivity but without heat conductivity. Global well-posedness of strong
solutions in the presence of natural far field vacuum, due to the finiteness of
the mass, is established for any large initial data of suitable smoothness.
Density discontinuity and interior vacuum of either point-like or
piecewise-like are also allowed. Technically, the entropy-type energy
inequality, which although is commonly used as a basic tool in existing
literature on the planar MHD system, is not workable in the current paper, as
it is not consistent with the far field vacuum. Instead, besides making full
use of advantages of the effective viscous flux as in
\cite{LJK1DNONHEAT,LIJLIM2022,LIXINADV}, a new coupling structure, between the
longitudinal velocity $u$ and the transversal magnetic field $\bm h$, is
exploited to recover the dissipative estimate on $\bm h$.

</details>


### [1040] [Ground states of the planar nonlinear Schrödinger--Newton system with a point interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18202)
*Gustavo de Paula Ramos*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文研究了带有点相互作用的非线性薛定谔-牛顿系统的基态存在条件，并探讨了其与演化问题中驻波的关联。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于理解带有点相互作用的非线性薛定谔-牛顿系统的基态存在性及其物理意义。

Method: 通过建立约束能量泛函的临界点条件，分析系统的基态存在性。

Result: 证明了在特定条件下基态的存在性，并展示了临界点与演化问题中驻波的关联。

Conclusion: 结论表明，该系统在特定条件下存在基态，且这些基态与演化问题的驻波密切相关。

Abstract: We establish sufficient conditions for the existence of ground states of the
following normalized nonlinear Schr\"odinger--Newton system with a point
interaction: \[ \begin{cases} - \Delta_\alpha u = w u + \beta u |u|^{p - 2}
&\text{on} ~ \mathbb{R}^2; \\ - \Delta w = 2 \pi |u|^2 &\text{on} ~
\mathbb{R}^2; \\ \|u\|_{L^2}^2 = c, \end{cases} \] where $p > 2$; $\alpha,
\beta \in \mathbb{R}$ and $- \Delta_\alpha$ denotes the Laplacian of point
interaction with scattering length $(- 2 \pi \alpha)^{- 1}$. Additionally, we
show that critical points of the corresponding constrained energy functional
are naturally associated with standing waves of the evolution problem \[
\mathrm{i} \psi' (t) = - \Delta_\alpha \psi (t) - (\log |\cdot| \ast |\psi
(t)|^2) \psi (t) - \beta \psi (t) |\psi (t)|^{p - 2}. \]

</details>


### [1041] [Homogenization of magnetoelastic materials with rigid magnetic inclusions at small strains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18585)
*Raffaele Grande,Stefan Krömer,Martin Kružík,Giuseppe Tomassetti*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 研究了周期性线性弹性磁性材料的均匀化问题，推导出有效磁弹性能量，并讨论了其他等效磁性模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究包含弹性刚性磁性夹杂物的线性弹性磁性材料的均匀化问题，以理解其宏观行为。

Method: 采用均匀化方法，研究周期性排列的线性弹性磁性材料，并推导出有效磁弹性能量。

Result: 当周期趋近于零时，通过均匀化方法得到了有效的磁弹性能量。

Conclusion: 通过均匀化方法，我们得到了一个有效的磁弹性能量，适用于周期性排列的线性弹性磁性材料。

Abstract: We investigate a homogenization problem for a linearly elastic magnetic
material that incorporates elastically rigid magnetic inclusions firmly bonded
to the matrix. By considering a periodic arrangement of this material, we
identify an effective magnetoelastic energy, obtained by homogenization when
the period approaches zero. For comparison, we also briefly discuss
alternative, essentially equivalent magnetic models naturally linked by a
Legendre-Fenchel transform of magnetic energy density where the elastic
deformation enters as a parameter.

</details>


### [1042] [Incompressible Euler limit from the Boltzmann equation with Maxwell reflection boundary condition in the half-space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18420)
*Ning Jiang,Chao Wang,Yulong Wu,Zhifei Zhang*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文严格证明了在半空间中具有一般Maxwell反射边界条件的Boltzmann方程的不可压缩Euler极限，通过构造包含内部流体部分和Knudsen-Prandtl耦合边界层的解，解决了非线性Prandtl层导致的导数损失问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Boltzmann方程在特定边界条件下的不可压缩Euler极限，以验证流体力学极限的数学严格性。

Method: 采用解析的$L^2 \mbox{-} L^\infty$框架，利用全守恒定律将法向导数损失转化为切向导数损失，避免时间正则性损失。

Result: 在剪切流情况下，建立了余项方程的均匀估计，验证了Boltzmann方程到不可压缩Euler极限的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过构造特定解并克服导数损失问题，成功证明了Boltzmann方程在剪切流情况下的不可压缩Euler极限。

Abstract: In this paper, we rigorously justify the incompressible Euler limit of the
Boltzmann equation with general Maxwell reflection boundary condition in the
half-space. The accommodation coefficient $\alpha \in (0,1]$ is assumed to be
$O(1)$. Our construction of solutions includes the interior fluid part and
Knudsen-Prandtl coupled boundary layers. The corresponding solutions to the
nonlinear Euler and nonlinear Prandtl systems are taken to be shear flows. Due
to the presence of the nonlinear Prandtl layer, the remainder equation loses
one order normal derivative. The key technical novelty lies in employing the
full conservation laws to convert this loss of the normal derivative into the
loss of tangential spatial derivative, avoiding any loss of regularity in time.
By working within an analytic $L^2 \mbox{-} L^\infty$ framework, we establish
the uniform estimate on the remainder equations, thus justify the validity of
the incompressible Euler limit from the Boltzmann equation for the shear flow
case.

</details>


### [1043] [Regularity of a bulk-surface Cahn-Hilliard model driven by Leray velocity fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18617)
*Andrea Giorgini,Patrik Knopf,Jonas Stange*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 本文放宽了对速度场正则性的要求，证明了弱解和强解的适定性，适用于更广泛的物理应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献中对弱解和强解的适定性结果要求速度场具有较高的时间正则性，这在物理应用中可能过于严格。本文旨在放宽这一假设。

Method: 通过建立一个新的体-表面椭圆系统的适定性和正则性理论，结合奇异非线性项的处理方法。

Result: 证明了在更一般的速度场正则性条件下弱解的适定性，并展示了强解在Leray型速度场下的适定性。

Conclusion: 本文证明了在更一般的速度场正则性假设下，弱解的存在性和唯一性，并通过一种新的方法证明了强解的存在性，适用于物理应用中更相关的Leray型速度场。

Abstract: We consider a convective bulk-surface Cahn--Hilliard system with dynamic
boundary conditions and singular potentials. For this model, well-posedness
results concerning weak and strong solutions have already been established in
the literature. However, they require the prescribed velocity fields to belong
to function spaces with high time regularity. In this paper, we prove that the
well-posedness of weak solutions holds true under more general regularity
assumptions on the velocity fields. Next, via an alternative proof for higher
regularity, we show the well-posedness of strong solutions for velocity fields
of Leray type, which is a more relevant assumption for physical applications.
Our approach hinges upon a new well-posedness and regularity theory for a
bulk-surface elliptic system with singular nonlinearities, which may be of
independent interest.

</details>


### [1044] [Regularity of random attractor and fractal dimension of fractional stochastic Navier-Stokes equations on three-dimensional torus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18480)
*Hui Liu,Chengfeng Sun,Jie Xin*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文研究了分数Navier-Stokes方程在加性白噪声下的渐近动力学，证明了其具有有限分形维数的随机吸引子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究分数Navier-Stokes方程在加性白噪声下的渐近动力学行为。

Method: 通过建立有界吸收集和局部Lipschitz连续性，证明了系统的渐近紧性。

Result: 在特定条件下，随机分数三维Navier-Stokes方程具有有限分形维数的随机吸引子。

Conclusion: 该论文证明了在特定条件下，随机分数三维Navier-Stokes方程具有有限分形维数的随机吸引子。

Abstract: In this paper we will study the asymptotic dynamics of fractional
Navier-Stokes (NS) equations with additive white noise on three-dimensional
torus $\mathbb T^3$. Under the conditions that the external forces $f(x)$
belong to the phase space $ H$ and the noise intensity function $h(x)$
satisfies $\|\nabla h\|_{L^\infty} < \sqrt \pi \nu \lambda_1^\frac{5}{4}$,
where $ \nu $ is the kinematic viscosity of the fluid and $\lambda_1$ is the
first eigenvalue of the Stokes operator, we shown that the random fractional
three-dimensional NS equations possess a tempered $(H,H^\frac{5}{2})$-random
attractor whose fractal dimension in $H^\frac{5}{2}$ is finite. This was proved
by establishing, first, an $H^\frac{5}{2}$ bounded absorbing set and, second, a
local $(H,H^\frac{5}{2})$-Lipschitz continuity in initial values from which the
$(H,H^\frac{5}{2})$-asymptotic compactness of the system follows. Since the
forces $f$ belong only to $H$, the $H^\frac{5}{2}$ bounded absorbing set was
constructed by an indirect approach of estimating the $H^\frac{5}{2}$-distance
between the solutions of the random fractional three-dimensional NS equations
and that of the corresponding deterministic equations. Furthermore, under the
conditions that the external forces $f(x)$ belong to the $ H^{k-\frac{5}{4}}$
and the noise intensity function $h(x)$ belong to $H^{k+\frac{5}{4}}$ for
$k\geq\frac{5}{2}$, we shown that the random fractional three-dimensional NS
equations possess a tempered $(H,H^k)$-random attractor whose fractal dimension
in $H^k$ is finite. This was proved by using iterative methods and
establishing, first, an $H^k$ bounded absorbing set and, second, a local
$(H,H^k)$-Lipschitz continuity in initial values from which the
$(H,H^k)$-asymptotic compactness of the system follows.

</details>


### [1045] [Stationary gravitational modes on Kerr-anti-de Sitter spacetimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18524)
*Olivier Graf*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 证明了Kerr-adS黑洞参数路径上Teukolsky方程存在稳态模式解，使用新方法克服传统困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Kerr-adS黑洞参数路径上Teukolsky方程的稳态模式解的存在性，克服了传统变分方法无法应用于此类系统的困难。

Method: 提出了一种新的证明方案，基于射击型连续性论证和高频WKB近似。

Result: 证明了在特定条件下，Teukolsky方程存在非平凡的规则稳态模式解，且黑洞参数在$|m|$趋近于无穷大时聚集于Hawking-Reall阈值。

Conclusion: 对于任何穿过Hawking-Reall阈值的Kerr-adS黑洞参数连续路径，当方位角数$|m|$足够大时，存在路径上的黑洞参数使得Teukolsky方程在共形边界条件下具有非平凡的规则稳态模式解。当$|m|$趋近于无穷大时，这些黑洞参数在Hawking-Reall阈值处聚集。

Abstract: We prove that, for any continuous path of Kerr-adS black hole parameters
crossing the Hawking-Reall threshold, for all azimuthal number $|m|$
sufficiently large, there exists black hole parameters on the path such that
the Teukolsky equations with conformal boundary conditions admit a non-trivial
regular stationary (\emph{i.e.} with frequency $\omega=m\omega_+$) mode
solution. When $|m|$ goes to infinity, we show that these black hole parameters
accumulate at the Hawking-Reall threshold. The major difficulty is that one
cannot construct solutions to the system of Teukolsky equations using
variational arguments as it is usually done for the classical wave equation. We
introduce a new scheme of proof based on a shooting-type continuity argument
and a high-frequency WKB approximation.

</details>


### [1046] [On an Iterative Scheme for the Spinorial Yamabe Equation on Manifolds with Boundary](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18546)
*Eric Trébuchon*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 研究了带边界紧流形上自旋Yamabe方程解的存在性，通过迭代方法在参数较小时证明解的存在性，并利用自举方法提升解的正则性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索自旋Yamabe方程在带边界紧流形上的解的存在性，特别是针对非齐次方程的情况。

Method: 采用迭代方法在参数较小时证明解的存在性，并使用自举方法提升解的正则性。

Result: 在参数较小时证明了非齐次方程解的存在性，并提升了解的正则性。

Conclusion: 通过迭代和自举方法，成功证明了带边界紧流形上自旋Yamabe方程解的存在性和正则性。

Abstract: We study the existence of solutions to the spinorial Yamabe equation -- that
is, the Euler--Lagrange equation associated with the conformal invariant
introduced by S. Raulot -- for compact manifolds with boundary. For the
inhomogeneous equation, we employ an iterative scheme to establish existence
under smallness assumptions on the relevant parameters. Using bootstrapping
methods, we extend the regularity of the solution to $C^\infty$ away from its
zero set in the interior, and up to the boundary in the case of
Shapiro--Lopatinski boundary conditions.

</details>


### [1047] [Stabilization of Quasilinear Parabolic Equations by Cubic Feedback at Boundary with Estimated Region of Attraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18634)
*Mohamed Camil Belhadjoudja,M Maghenem,E Witrant,M Krstic*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种边界立方反馈控制方法，用于稳定准线性抛物型偏微分方程，扩展了吸引区域估计，并证明了多种稳定性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决准线性抛物型偏微分方程在开环条件下有限时间爆炸的问题，提供稳定的边界控制方法。

Method: 使用边界测量和立方反馈律，处理非线性状态相关的扩散、对流和反应项。

Result: 实现了L2和H1指数稳定性、H2和C1范数的收敛、完整经典解的存在唯一性以及正初始条件下解的正性。

Conclusion: 该论文通过立方反馈律在边界条件下实现了准线性抛物型偏微分方程的稳定控制，扩展了吸引区域的估计，并证明了在扩散增加时吸引区域可以无限增长。

Abstract: For quasilinear parabolic partial differential equations (PDEs) that exhibit
finite-time blow up in open loop, i.e., under null boundary conditions, we
provide an estimate of the region of attraction under cubic feedback laws
applied at the boundary, using boundary measurements. We guarantee: 1-L 2 and H
1 exponential stability of the origin with an estimate of the region of
attraction. 2-Convergence of the H 2 and the C 1 norms of the solutions to
zero. 3-Existence and uniqueness of complete classical solutions. 4-Positivity
of the solutions starting from positive initial conditions. Unlike existing
approaches, our framework handles nonlinear state-dependent diffusion,
convection, and (destabilizing) reaction. The cubic terms are used to enlarge
our estimate of the region of attraction. The size of the region of attraction
is shown, in many cases, to grow unboundedly as diffusion increases. Finally,
our controllers can be implemented as Neumann, Dirichlet, or mixed-type
boundary conditions.

</details>


### [1048] [Free boundary regularity and well-posedness of physical solutions to the supercooled Stefan problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18741)
*Sebastian Munoz*

Main category: math.AP

TL;DR: 研究了超冷Stefan问题的物理解的规律性和适定性，证明了自由边界在空间变量上是C^1的，且在闭可数集外是C^∞的，并解决了两个关于全局唯一性的开放问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究超冷Stefan问题的物理解的规律性和适定性，解决现有文献中关于自由边界和唯一性的开放问题。

Method: 通过推导解满足的加权障碍问题，建立规律性和非退化估计，并对自由边界点进行分类。

Result: 证明了自由边界在空间变量上的光滑性，解决了全局唯一性问题，并提出了控制未来跳跃的方法。

Conclusion: 通过加权障碍问题的方法，成功解决了超冷Stefan问题的规律性和唯一性问题，为更广泛的初始数据提供了唯一性保证。

Abstract: We study the regularity and well-posedness of physical solutions to the
supercooled Stefan problem. Assuming only that the initial temperature is
integrable, we prove that the free boundary, known to have jump discontinuities
as a function of the time variable, is $C^1$ as a function of the space
variable, and is $C^{\infty}$ outside of a closed, countable set, which we
describe explicitly. We also prove that, as conjectured in arXiv:1902.05174,
the set of positive times when a jump occurs cannot have accumulation points.
In addition, we prove that short-time uniqueness of physical solutions implies
global uniqueness, which allows us to obtain uniqueness for very general
initial data that fall outside the scope of the current well-posedness regime.
In particular, we answer two questions left open in arXiv:1811.12356,
arXiv:2302.13097, regarding the global uniqueness of solutions. We proceed by
deriving a weighted obstacle problem satisfied by the solutions, which we
exploit to establish regularity and non-degeneracy estimates and to classify
the free boundary points. We also establish a backward propagation of
oscillation property, which allows us to control the occurrence of future jumps
in terms of the past oscillation of the solution.

</details>


<div id='math.CA'></div>

# math.CA [[Back]](#toc)

### [1049] [Sharp $L^p$-estimates for wave equation on $ax+b$ groups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17531)
*Yunxiang Wang,Lixin Yan*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 论文研究了在特定群结构上的波动方程解的L^p范数估计，给出了端点结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在Riemann对称空间上的波动方程解的范数估计，填补了端点情况的空白。

Method: 通过分析群上的Laplacian算子和波动方程的解，结合初始条件，推导出L^p范数的估计条件。

Result: 证明了波动方程解的L^p范数估计在特定条件下成立，并给出了端点情况的结论。

Conclusion: 论文为波动方程解的范数估计提供了完整的端点结果，扩展了Müller和Thiele的工作。

Abstract: Let $G$ be the group $\mathbb{R}_+\ltimes \mathbb{R}^n$ endowed with
Riemannian symmetric space metric $d$ and the right Haar measure $\mathrm{d}
\rho$ which is of $ax+b$ type, and $L$ be the positive definite distinguished
left invariant Laplacian on $G$. Let $u=u(t,\cdot)$ be the solution of
$u_{tt}+Lu=0$ with initial conditions $u|_{t=0}=f$ and $u_t|_{t=0}=g$. In this
article we show that for a fixed $t \in{\mathbb R}$ and every $1<p<\infty$,
\begin{align*} \|u(t,\cdot)\|_{L^p(G)}\leq C_p\Big(
(1+|t|)^{2|1/p-1/2|}\|f\|_{L^p_{\alpha_0}(G)}+(1+|t|)\,\|g\|_{L^p_{\alpha_1}(G)}\Big)
\end{align*} if and only if \begin{align*} \alpha_0\geq n\left|{1\over p}-
{1\over2}\right| \quad \mbox{and} \quad \alpha_1\geq n\left|{1\over p}-
{1\over2}\right| -1. \end{align*} This gives an endpoint result for
$\alpha_0=n|1/p-1/2|$ and $\alpha_1=n|1/p-1/2|-1$ with $1<p<\infty$ in
Corollary 8.2, as pointed out in Remark 8.1 due to M\"{u}ller and Thiele
[Studia Math. \textbf{179} (2007)].

</details>


### [1050] [A Remark on a Kind of Oscillatory Singular Integrals with Nonstarnd Kernel and Fewnomials Phases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17617)
*Shen Jiawei*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: Error


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Error

Method: Error

Result: Error

Conclusion: Error

Abstract: In the paper, we study a kind of Oscillatory singular integral operator
$T_{Q,A}$ with nonstandard Kernel defined by \[T_{Q,A} f(x)=\text { p.v. }
\int_{\mathbb{R}^{n}} f(y) \frac{\Omega(x-y)}{|x-y|^{n}}(A(x)-A(y)-\nabla
A(x-y) e^{i Q(|x-y|)} d y, \] where $Q(t)$ is a real polynomial on
$\mathbb{R}$, and $\Omega$ is s a homogenous function of degree zero on
$\mathbb{R}$ and satisfy satisfies the vanishing moment condition. Under the
condition that $\Omega\in Llog^2(\mathbb{R}^{n}),$ we show that $T_{Q,A}$ is
bounded on $L^P(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ with uniform boundedness that depend on the
number of monomials in polynomial $Q.$ which improve and extend the previous
result.

</details>


### [1051] [The higher order partial derivatives of Okamoto's function with respect to the parameter](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17737)
*Pieter Allaart,Nathan Dalaklis,Kiko Kawamura,Matthew Ortiz,Jiajie Zheng*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 研究了Okamoto连续自仿射函数族的高阶偏导数，计算了其图形的盒维数，并探讨了其可微性和无限导数的点集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Okamoto函数族包含了一些著名的“病态”例子，如Cantor的魔鬼阶梯和Perkins的连续但无处可微函数。研究其高阶偏导数的性质有助于深入理解这些函数的复杂行为。

Method: 引入了函数$M_{k,a}(x)$作为$F_a(x)$的$k$阶偏导数，计算了其图形的盒维数，并分析了其可微性和无限导数的点集。

Result: 发现高阶偏导数的性质与Okamoto函数本身有相似之处，但也存在显著差异和新的现象。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了Okamoto函数族高阶偏导数的复杂行为，为理解这类函数的数学性质提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Let $\{F_a: a\in(0,1)\}$ be Okamoto's family of continuous self-affine
functions, introduced in [{\em Proc. Japan Acad. Ser. A Math. Sci.} {\bf 81}
(2005), no. 3, 47--50]. This family includes well-known ``pathological"
examples such as Cantor's devil's staircase and Perkins' continuous but nowhere
differentiable function. It is well known that $F_a(x)$ is real analytic in $a$
for every $x\in[0,1]$. We introduce the functions \[
M_{k,a}(x):=\frac{\partial^k}{\partial a^k}F_a(x), \qquad k\in\mathbb{N}, \quad
x\in[0,1]. \] We compute the box-counting dimension of the graph of $M_{k,a}$,
characterize its differentiability, and investigate in detail the set of points
where $M_{k,a}$ has an infinite derivative. While some of our results are
similar to the known facts about Okamoto's function, there are also some
notable differences and surprising new phenomena that arise when considering
the higher order partial derivatives of $F_a$.

</details>


### [1052] [Sparse domination for rough multilinear singular integrals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17905)
*Binwei Dan,Qingying Xue*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 该论文证明了具有粗糙核的多线性奇异积分算子存在稀疏支配，并推导了定量加权范数不等式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究多线性奇异积分算子的稀疏支配性质，以进一步理解其加权范数不等式。

Method: 通过分析粗糙核的多线性奇异积分算子，证明其稀疏支配性质。

Result: 证明了算子存在稀疏支配，并推导了定量加权范数不等式。

Conclusion: 稀疏支配性质为多线性奇异积分算子的加权范数不等式提供了新的工具。

Abstract: Let $\Omega$ be a function on $\mathbb{R}^{mn} $, homogeneous of degree zero,
and satisfy a cancellation condition on the unit sphere $\mathbb{S}^{mn-1}$. In
this paper, we show that the multilinear singular integral operator
  \[
  \mathcal{T}_{\Omega}(f_1, \ldots, f_m)(x) := \mathrm{p.v.}
\int_{\mathbb{R}^{mn}} \frac{\Omega(x - y_1, \ldots, x - y_m)}{|x -
\vec{y}|^{mn}} \prod_{i=1}^m f_i(y_i) \, d\vec{y},
  \]
  associated with a rough kernel $\Omega \in L^r(\mathbb{S}^{mn-1}) $, $r > 1
$, admits a sparse domination, where $\quad \vec{y}=(y_1,\ldots,y_m)$ and $
d\vec{y}=dy_1\cdots dy_m$. As a consequence, we derive some {quantitative
weighted norm inequalities} for $ \mathcal{T}_{\Omega} $.

</details>


### [1053] [A non-sticky Kakeya set of Lebesgue measure zero](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18142)
*Chun-Kit Lai,Adeline E. Wong*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文构造了Lebesgue测度为零的非粘性Kakeya集，并验证了高维Kakeya集的Hausdorff维数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Kakeya集的性质，特别是粘性与非粘性Kakeya集的区别，以及它们在Lebesgue测度和Hausdorff维数方面的表现。

Method: 通过显式构造方法，在${\mathbb R}^2$中构造了Lebesgue测度为零的非粘性Kakeya集，并在高维中构造了非平凡的粘性和非粘性Kakeya集。

Result: 成功构造了Lebesgue测度为零的非粘性Kakeya集，并验证了高维中构造的Kakeya集的Hausdorff维数为$d$。

Conclusion: 本文通过显式构造证明了在${\mathbb R}^2$中存在Lebesgue测度为零的非粘性Kakeya集，并进一步在高维中构造了非平凡的粘性和非粘性Kakeya集，验证了它们的Hausdorff维数为$d$。

Abstract: The Kakeya set conjecture in ${\mathbb R} ^3$ was recently resolved by Wang
and Zahl. The distinction between sticky and non-sticky Kakeya sets plays an
important role in their proof. Although the proof did not require the Kakeya
set to be Lebesgue measure zero, measure zero Kakeya sets are the crucial case
whose study is required to resolve the conjecture. In this paper, we explicitly
construct a non-sticky Kakeya set of Lebesgue measure zero in ${\mathbb R}^2$
(and hence in any dimension). We also construct non-trivial sticky and
non-sticky Kakeya sets in high dimension that are not formed by taking the
Cartesian product of a 2-dimensional Kakeya set with ${\mathbb R}^{d-2}$, and
we verify that both Kakeya sets have Hausdorff dimension $d$.

</details>


### [1054] [Stein's theorem in the upper-half plane and Bergman spaces with weights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18377)
*Aline Bonami,Sandrine Grellier,Benoît Sehba*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文是前一篇论文的续作，提出了对数权重的Bergman空间及其对偶空间的研究，并探讨了乘子、点积和Hankel算子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在前一篇论文中，作者给出了上半平面可积函数的Bergman投影可积的充分条件，本文旨在进一步推进方法并建立逆命题。

Method: 作者研究了对数权重的Bergman空间族，并引入了其对偶空间（对数Bloch型空间），探讨了乘子、点积和Hankel算子。

Result: 建立了逆命题，并研究了对数权重Bergman空间及其对偶空间的性质。

Conclusion: 本文扩展了前一篇论文的结果，为对数权重Bergman空间及其对偶空间的研究提供了新的视角。

Abstract: This is a companion paper to our previous one, Avatars of Stein's Theorem in
the complex setting. In this previous paper, we gave a sufficient condition for
an integrable function in the upper-half plane to have an integrable Bergman
projection. Here we push forward methods and establish in particular a converse
statement. This naturally leads us to study a family of weighted Bergman spaces
for logarithmic weights (1 + ln + (1/___m(z)) + ln + (|z|)) k , which have the
same kind of behavior respectively at the boundary and at infinity. We
introduce their duals, which are logarithmic Bloch type spaces and interest
ourselves in multipliers, pointwise products and Hankel operators.

</details>


### [1055] [Weighted $L^2$ restriction and comparison of nondegeneracy conditions for quadratic manifolds of arbitrary codimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18657)
*Zhenbin Cao,Jingyue Li,Changxing Miao,Yixuan Pang*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 研究了任意余维数二次流形的加权L²限制，通过傅里叶衰减估计和改进的Du-Zhang方法，并建立了非退化条件的完整关系图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索二次流形在调和分析中的非退化条件及其在傅里叶限制、解耦等领域的应用。

Method: 使用尖锐的均匀傅里叶衰减估计和改进的Du-Zhang方法。

Result: 建立了几乎完整的非退化条件关系图，并证明了其多领域应用。

Conclusion: 通过多学科方法证明了非退化条件的关系图，为调和分析中的相关问题提供了新视角。

Abstract: We systematically study weighted $L^2$ restriction for quadratic manifolds of
arbitrary codimensions by sharp uniform Fourier decay estimates and a
refinement of the Du-Zhang method. Comparison with prior results is also
discussed. In addition,we obtain an almost complete relation diagram for all
existing nondegeneracy conditions for quadratic manifolds of arbitrary
codimensions. These conditions come from various topics in harmonic analysis
related to "curvature": Fourier restriction, decoupling, Fourier decay, Fourier
dimension, weighted restriction, and Radon-like transforms. The diagram has
many implications, such as "best possible Stein-Tomas implies best possible
$\ell^pL^p$ decoupling". The proof of the diagram requires a combination of
ideas from Fourier analysis, complex analysis, convex geometry, geometric
invariant theory, combinatorics, and matrix analysis.

</details>


### [1056] [A refined trilinear Kakeya estimate in $\mathbb{R}^3$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18769)
*Javier Ramos*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文证明了三维空间中针对小横向参数值的精细三线性Kakeya估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Kakeya估计在三维空间中的精细形式，特别是针对小横向参数值的情况。

Method: 通过数学证明方法，推导并验证了三线性Kakeya估计的有效性。

Result: 成功证明了在三维空间中，对于小横向参数值，三线性Kakeya估计成立。

Conclusion: 该结果为Kakeya估计在三维空间中的应用提供了新的理论支持。

Abstract: We prove a refined trilinear Kakeya estimate in three dimensions, valid for
small values of the transversality parameter.

</details>


### [1057] [Sharp $L^p$-estimates for wave equation on $ax+b$ groups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17531)
*Yunxiang Wang,Lixin Yan*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 论文研究了在特定群结构上的波动方程解的L^p范数估计，给出了端点结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在Riemannian对称空间上的波动方程解的L^p范数估计，填补了端点情况的空白。

Method: 通过分析群G上的Laplacian算子，结合初始条件，推导解的L^p范数估计。

Result: 证明了在特定条件下，解的L^p范数估计成立，并给出了端点结果。

Conclusion: 该结果为波动方程解的L^p范数估计提供了完整的理论支持，特别是在端点情况下。

Abstract: Let $G$ be the group $\mathbb{R}_+\ltimes \mathbb{R}^n$ endowed with
Riemannian symmetric space metric $d$ and the right Haar measure $\mathrm{d}
\rho$ which is of $ax+b$ type, and $L$ be the positive definite distinguished
left invariant Laplacian on $G$. Let $u=u(t,\cdot)$ be the solution of
$u_{tt}+Lu=0$ with initial conditions $u|_{t=0}=f$ and $u_t|_{t=0}=g$. In this
article we show that for a fixed $t \in{\mathbb R}$ and every $1<p<\infty$,
\begin{align*} \|u(t,\cdot)\|_{L^p(G)}\leq C_p\Big(
(1+|t|)^{2|1/p-1/2|}\|f\|_{L^p_{\alpha_0}(G)}+(1+|t|)\,\|g\|_{L^p_{\alpha_1}(G)}\Big)
\end{align*} if and only if \begin{align*} \alpha_0\geq n\left|{1\over p}-
{1\over2}\right| \quad \mbox{and} \quad \alpha_1\geq n\left|{1\over p}-
{1\over2}\right| -1. \end{align*} This gives an endpoint result for
$\alpha_0=n|1/p-1/2|$ and $\alpha_1=n|1/p-1/2|-1$ with $1<p<\infty$ in
Corollary 8.2, as pointed out in Remark 8.1 due to M\"{u}ller and Thiele
[Studia Math. \textbf{179} (2007)].

</details>


### [1058] [A Remark on a Kind of Oscillatory Singular Integrals with Nonstarnd Kernel and Fewnomials Phases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17617)
*Shen Jiawei*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: The paper proves boundedness of an oscillatory singular integral operator $T_{Q,A}$ on $L^P(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ with uniform bounds tied to the polynomial $Q$, improving prior work.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: The motivation is to extend and improve existing results on the boundedness of oscillatory singular integral operators by considering nonstandard kernels and more general conditions on the polynomial $Q$ and the function $\Omega$.

Method: The study employs oscillatory singular integral operators with nonstandard kernels, focusing on the operator $T_{Q,A}$ defined by a specific integral involving a polynomial $Q$ and a homogeneous function $\Omega$. The analysis assumes $\Omega \in Llog^2(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ and uses the vanishing moment condition.

Result: The main result is the proof of the boundedness of $T_{Q,A}$ on $L^P(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ under the given conditions, with uniform bounds depending on the structure of $Q$.

Conclusion: The paper concludes that the oscillatory singular integral operator $T_{Q,A}$ is bounded on $L^P(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ with uniform boundedness dependent on the number of monomials in the polynomial $Q$, improving and extending previous results.

Abstract: In the paper, we study a kind of Oscillatory singular integral operator
$T_{Q,A}$ with nonstandard Kernel defined by \[T_{Q,A} f(x)=\text { p.v. }
\int_{\mathbb{R}^{n}} f(y) \frac{\Omega(x-y)}{|x-y|^{n}}(A(x)-A(y)-\nabla
A(x-y) e^{i Q(|x-y|)} d y, \] where $Q(t)$ is a real polynomial on
$\mathbb{R}$, and $\Omega$ is s a homogenous function of degree zero on
$\mathbb{R}$ and satisfy satisfies the vanishing moment condition. Under the
condition that $\Omega\in Llog^2(\mathbb{R}^{n}),$ we show that $T_{Q,A}$ is
bounded on $L^P(\mathbb{R}^{n})$ with uniform boundedness that depend on the
number of monomials in polynomial $Q.$ which improve and extend the previous
result.

</details>


### [1059] [The higher order partial derivatives of Okamoto's function with respect to the parameter](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17737)
*Pieter Allaart,Nathan Dalaklis,Kiko Kawamura,Matthew Ortiz,Jiajie Zheng*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文研究了Okamoto连续自仿射函数族的高阶偏导数，计算了其图形的盒维数，并探讨了其可微性和无限导数的点集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Okamoto函数族包含了一些著名的“病态”例子，如Cantor的魔鬼阶梯和Perkins的连续但无处可微函数。研究其高阶偏导数的性质有助于深入理解这些函数的复杂行为。

Method: 引入函数M_{k,a}(x)作为F_a(x)对a的k阶偏导数，计算其图形的盒维数，并分析其可微性和无限导数的点集。

Result: 发现高阶偏导数的性质与Okamoto函数本身有相似之处，但也存在显著差异和新的现象。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了Okamoto函数族高阶偏导数的复杂行为，为理解这类函数的性质提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Let $\{F_a: a\in(0,1)\}$ be Okamoto's family of continuous self-affine
functions, introduced in [{\em Proc. Japan Acad. Ser. A Math. Sci.} {\bf 81}
(2005), no. 3, 47--50]. This family includes well-known ``pathological"
examples such as Cantor's devil's staircase and Perkins' continuous but nowhere
differentiable function. It is well known that $F_a(x)$ is real analytic in $a$
for every $x\in[0,1]$. We introduce the functions \[
M_{k,a}(x):=\frac{\partial^k}{\partial a^k}F_a(x), \qquad k\in\mathbb{N}, \quad
x\in[0,1]. \] We compute the box-counting dimension of the graph of $M_{k,a}$,
characterize its differentiability, and investigate in detail the set of points
where $M_{k,a}$ has an infinite derivative. While some of our results are
similar to the known facts about Okamoto's function, there are also some
notable differences and surprising new phenomena that arise when considering
the higher order partial derivatives of $F_a$.

</details>


### [1060] [Sparse domination for rough multilinear singular integrals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17905)
*Binwei Dan,Qingying Xue*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 论文证明了粗糙核多线性奇异积分算子的稀疏支配性，并推导了加权范数不等式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究多线性奇异积分算子在粗糙核条件下的行为，以扩展其在加权空间中的应用。

Method: 通过分析多线性奇异积分算子的性质，证明了其稀疏支配性。

Result: 证明了多线性奇异积分算子的稀疏支配性，并推导了定量的加权范数不等式。

Conclusion: 该论文证明了与粗糙核相关的多线性奇异积分算子具有稀疏支配性，并由此推导出了一些定量的加权范数不等式。

Abstract: Let $\Omega$ be a function on $\mathbb{R}^{mn} $, homogeneous of degree zero,
and satisfy a cancellation condition on the unit sphere $\mathbb{S}^{mn-1}$. In
this paper, we show that the multilinear singular integral operator
  \[
  \mathcal{T}_{\Omega}(f_1, \ldots, f_m)(x) := \mathrm{p.v.}
\int_{\mathbb{R}^{mn}} \frac{\Omega(x - y_1, \ldots, x - y_m)}{|x -
\vec{y}|^{mn}} \prod_{i=1}^m f_i(y_i) \, d\vec{y},
  \]
  associated with a rough kernel $\Omega \in L^r(\mathbb{S}^{mn-1}) $, $r > 1
$, admits a sparse domination, where $\quad \vec{y}=(y_1,\ldots,y_m)$ and $
d\vec{y}=dy_1\cdots dy_m$. As a consequence, we derive some {quantitative
weighted norm inequalities} for $ \mathcal{T}_{\Omega} $.

</details>


### [1061] [A non-sticky Kakeya set of Lebesgue measure zero](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18142)
*Chun-Kit Lai,Adeline E. Wong*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文构建了非粘性Kakeya集，并验证了其Hausdorff维数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Kakeya集的关键性质，特别是粘性与非粘性Kakeya集的区别，以解决Kakeya集猜想。

Method: 通过显式构造非粘性Kakeya集，并分析其Lebesgue测度和Hausdorff维数。

Result: 成功构造了非粘性Kakeya集，并证明其Hausdorff维数为d。

Conclusion: 非粘性Kakeya集的构造为Kakeya集猜想的研究提供了重要工具。

Abstract: The Kakeya set conjecture in ${\mathbb R} ^3$ was recently resolved by Wang
and Zahl. The distinction between sticky and non-sticky Kakeya sets plays an
important role in their proof. Although the proof did not require the Kakeya
set to be Lebesgue measure zero, measure zero Kakeya sets are the crucial case
whose study is required to resolve the conjecture. In this paper, we explicitly
construct a non-sticky Kakeya set of Lebesgue measure zero in ${\mathbb R}^2$
(and hence in any dimension). We also construct non-trivial sticky and
non-sticky Kakeya sets in high dimension that are not formed by taking the
Cartesian product of a 2-dimensional Kakeya set with ${\mathbb R}^{d-2}$, and
we verify that both Kakeya sets have Hausdorff dimension $d$.

</details>


### [1062] [Stein's theorem in the upper-half plane and Bergman spaces with weights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18377)
*Aline Bonami,Sandrine Grellier,Benoît Sehba*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: Extends previous work with a converse result, introduces logarithmic weighted Bergman spaces, and studies their duals and operators.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: To extend the results of their previous paper by providing a converse statement and studying related weighted Bergman spaces and their properties.

Method: The authors push forward methods from their previous work, focusing on weighted Bergman spaces for logarithmic weights and their duals.

Result: A converse statement is proven, and a family of weighted Bergman spaces with logarithmic weights is introduced and analyzed, along with their duals and associated operators.

Conclusion: The paper establishes a converse statement to a previous result, introduces weighted Bergman spaces with logarithmic weights, and explores their duals, multipliers, pointwise products, and Hankel operators.

Abstract: This is a companion paper to our previous one, Avatars of Stein's Theorem in
the complex setting. In this previous paper, we gave a sufficient condition for
an integrable function in the upper-half plane to have an integrable Bergman
projection. Here we push forward methods and establish in particular a converse
statement. This naturally leads us to study a family of weighted Bergman spaces
for logarithmic weights (1 + ln + (1/___m(z)) + ln + (|z|)) k , which have the
same kind of behavior respectively at the boundary and at infinity. We
introduce their duals, which are logarithmic Bloch type spaces and interest
ourselves in multipliers, pointwise products and Hankel operators.

</details>


### [1063] [Weighted $L^2$ restriction and comparison of nondegeneracy conditions for quadratic manifolds of arbitrary codimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18657)
*Zhenbin Cao,Jingyue Li,Changxing Miao,Yixuan Pang*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: Error


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Error

Method: Error

Result: Error

Conclusion: Error

Abstract: We systematically study weighted $L^2$ restriction for quadratic manifolds of
arbitrary codimensions by sharp uniform Fourier decay estimates and a
refinement of the Du-Zhang method. Comparison with prior results is also
discussed. In addition,we obtain an almost complete relation diagram for all
existing nondegeneracy conditions for quadratic manifolds of arbitrary
codimensions. These conditions come from various topics in harmonic analysis
related to "curvature": Fourier restriction, decoupling, Fourier decay, Fourier
dimension, weighted restriction, and Radon-like transforms. The diagram has
many implications, such as "best possible Stein-Tomas implies best possible
$\ell^pL^p$ decoupling". The proof of the diagram requires a combination of
ideas from Fourier analysis, complex analysis, convex geometry, geometric
invariant theory, combinatorics, and matrix analysis.

</details>


### [1064] [A refined trilinear Kakeya estimate in $\mathbb{R}^3$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18769)
*Javier Ramos*

Main category: math.CA

TL;DR: 本文证明了三维空间中针对小横向参数值的精细三线性Kakeya估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究三维空间中三线性Kakeya估计的精细版本，特别是在横向参数较小的情况下。

Method: 通过数学证明方法，推导出三维空间中的三线性Kakeya估计。

Result: 成功证明了在小横向参数值下有效的精细三线性Kakeya估计。

Conclusion: 该结果为三维空间中的Kakeya问题提供了新的理论支持。

Abstract: We prove a refined trilinear Kakeya estimate in three dimensions, valid for
small values of the transversality parameter.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [1065] [Coupled Entropy: A Goldilocks Generalization?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17229)
*Kenric P. Nelson*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文探讨了归一化Tsallis熵（NTE）的不稳定性问题，并提出耦合熵作为解决方案，适用于复杂系统建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Tsallis熵在归一化过程中的不稳定性问题，并探索其在复杂系统中的应用。

Method: 提出耦合熵概念，通过引入耦合参数κ和非线性参数α，定义耦合指数族分布。

Result: 耦合熵通过归一化因子1+dκ增强了稳定性，适用于机器学习等应用。

Conclusion: 耦合熵是衡量统计复杂性的有力候选，为复杂系统建模提供了新工具。

Abstract: Nonextensive Statistical Mechanics (NSM) has developed into a powerful
toolset for modeling and analyzing complex systems. Despite its many successes,
a puzzle arose early in its development. The constraints on the Tsallis entropy
are in the form of an escort distribution with elements proportional to
$p_i^q$, but this same factor within the Tsallis entropy function is not
normalized. This led to consideration of the Normalized Tsallis Entropy (NTE);
however, the normalization proved to make the function unstable. I will provide
evidence that the coupled entropy, which divides NTE by $1 + d\kappa$, where
$d$ is the dimension and $\kappa$ is the coupling, may provide the necessary
robustness necessary for applications like machine learning. The definition for
the coupled entropy and its maximizing distributions, the coupled exponential
family, arises from clarifying how the number of independent random variables
$(q)$ is composed of the nonlinear properties of complex systems,
$q=1+\frac{\alpha\kappa}{1+d\kappa}$, where $\alpha$ is the nonlinear parameter
governing the shape of distributions near their location and $\kappa$ is the
parameter determining the asymptotic tail decay. Foundationally, for complex
systems, the coupling is the measure of nonlinearity inducing non-exponential
distributions and the degree of nonadditivity entropy. As such, the coupling is
a strong candidate as a measure of statistical complexity.

</details>


### [1066] [Differentiable neural network representation of multi-well, locally-convex potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17242)
*Reese E. Jones,Adrian Buganza Tepole,Jan N. Fuhg*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于对数-求和-指数（LSE）混合输入凸神经网络（ICNN）的可微分凸优化方法，用于建模多模态现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多势阱现象在科学中广泛存在，但传统方法缺乏可微性和凸性，限制了梯度学习和推理的应用。

Method: 使用LSE-ICNN方法，结合稀疏回归自动发现模态数量和过渡尺度。

Result: 在多个领域（如相变、生物基因电路等）验证了LSE-ICNN的有效性。

Conclusion: LSE-ICNN在保持可微性的同时，能有效建模复杂多模态现象，适用于数据驱动建模和物理模拟。

Abstract: Multi-well potentials are ubiquitous in science, modeling phenomena such as
phase transitions, dynamic instabilities, and multimodal behavior across
physics, chemistry, and biology. In contrast to non-smooth minimum-of-mixture
representations, we propose a differentiable and convex formulation based on a
log-sum-exponential (LSE) mixture of input convex neural network (ICNN) modes.
This log-sum-exponential input convex neural network (LSE-ICNN) provides a
smooth surrogate that retains convexity within basins and allows for
gradient-based learning and inference.
  A key feature of the LSE-ICNN is its ability to automatically discover both
the number of modes and the scale of transitions through sparse regression,
enabling adaptive and parsimonious modeling. We demonstrate the versatility of
the LSE-ICNN across diverse domains, including mechanochemical phase
transformations, microstructural elastic instabilities, conservative biological
gene circuits, and variational inference for multimodal probability
distributions. These examples highlight the effectiveness of the LSE-ICNN in
capturing complex multimodal landscapes while preserving differentiability,
making it broadly applicable in data-driven modeling, optimization, and
physical simulation.

</details>


### [1067] [Gaussian Processes and Reproducing Kernels: Connections and Equivalences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17366)
*Motonobu Kanagawa,Philipp Hennig,Dino Sejdinovic,Bharath K. Sriperumbudur*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该专著探讨了高斯过程与再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）两种方法之间的联系与等价性，为机器学习、统计学和数值分析领域提供了统一视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究高斯过程与RKHS之间的联系，以促进两种方法在机器学习、统计学和数值分析中的协同发展。

Method: 通过回顾回归、插值、数值积分等基本主题，以及高斯过程的样本路径性质，建立高斯希尔伯特空间与RKHS的等价性。

Result: 确立了高斯过程与RKHS之间的统一视角，为两种方法的进一步研究提供了基础。

Conclusion: 该专著为高斯过程与RKHS的并行研究提供了桥梁，有助于推动相关领域的协同发展。

Abstract: This monograph studies the relations between two approaches using positive
definite kernels: probabilistic methods using Gaussian processes, and
non-probabilistic methods using reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces (RKHS). They
are widely studied and used in machine learning, statistics, and numerical
analysis. Connections and equivalences between them are reviewed for
fundamental topics such as regression, interpolation, numerical integration,
distributional discrepancies, and statistical dependence, as well as for sample
path properties of Gaussian processes. A unifying perspective for these
equivalences is established, based on the equivalence between the Gaussian
Hilbert space and the RKHS. The monograph serves as a basis to bridge many
other methods based on Gaussian processes and reproducing kernels, which are
developed in parallel by the two research communities.

</details>


### [1068] [Scalable Machine Learning Algorithms using Path Signatures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17634)
*Csaba Tóth*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文探讨了如何利用路径签名（path signatures）在可扩展的机器学习流程中，结合高斯过程、深度学习和核方法，提出了多种模型来解决时间序列和图数据的建模问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 路径签名作为一种通用的特征映射方法，能够有效处理时间序列和图数据中的动态演化、长程依赖和不规则采样等挑战。

Method: 论文提出了一系列模型，包括基于签名核的高斯过程、Seq2Tens框架、图模型、随机傅里叶签名特征和循环稀疏谱签名高斯过程。

Result: 这些模型在理论上具有鲁棒性，计算上高效，能够处理长程依赖和多时间尺度预测问题。

Conclusion: 该论文为序列和结构化数据的可扩展签名学习提供了方法论工具和概念桥梁，是当前领域的重要参考。

Abstract: The interface between stochastic analysis and machine learning is a rapidly
evolving field, with path signatures - iterated integrals that provide
faithful, hierarchical representations of paths - offering a principled and
universal feature map for sequential and structured data. Rooted in rough path
theory, path signatures are invariant to reparameterization and well-suited for
modelling evolving dynamics, long-range dependencies, and irregular sampling -
common challenges in real-world time series and graph data.
  This thesis investigates how to harness the expressive power of path
signatures within scalable machine learning pipelines. It introduces a suite of
models that combine theoretical robustness with computational efficiency,
bridging rough path theory with probabilistic modelling, deep learning, and
kernel methods. Key contributions include: Gaussian processes with signature
kernel-based covariance functions for uncertainty-aware time series modelling;
the Seq2Tens framework, which employs low-rank tensor structure in the weight
space for scalable deep modelling of long-range dependencies; and graph-based
models where expected signatures over graphs induce hypo-elliptic diffusion
processes, offering expressive yet tractable alternatives to standard graph
neural networks. Further developments include Random Fourier Signature
Features, a scalable kernel approximation with theoretical guarantees, and
Recurrent Sparse Spectrum Signature Gaussian Processes, which combine Gaussian
processes, signature kernels, and random features with a principled forgetting
mechanism for multi-horizon time series forecasting with adaptive context
length.
  We hope this thesis serves as both a methodological toolkit and a conceptual
bridge, and provides a useful reference for the current state of the art in
scalable, signature-based learning for sequential and structured data.

</details>


### [1069] [Derandomizing Simultaneous Confidence Regions for Band-Limited Functions by Improved Norm Bounds and Majority-Voting Schemes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17764)
*Balázs Csanád Csáji,Bálint Horváth*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文改进了带限函数的非参数非渐近置信区域构造方法，通过使用随机化Hoeffding不等式和经验Bernstein边界，并结合多数投票提升稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 带限函数在系统理论和信号处理中广泛应用，但现有方法在构造置信区域时存在局限性，需要更精确的边界和稳定性。

Method: 在Paley-Wiener再生核希尔伯特空间中工作，使用随机化Hoeffding不等式和经验Bernstein边界，并结合多数投票聚合置信集。

Result: 通过数值实验验证了改进方法的有效性，证明了即使对每个输入聚合的区间也能保持同时覆盖保证。

Conclusion: 本文提出的方法显著提升了带限函数置信区域的构造精度和稳定性，适用于小样本和大样本场景。

Abstract: Band-limited functions are fundamental objects that are widely used in
systems theory and signal processing. In this paper we refine a recent
nonparametric, nonasymptotic method for constructing simultaneous confidence
regions for band-limited functions from noisy input-output measurements, by
working in a Paley-Wiener reproducing kernel Hilbert space. Kernel norm bounds
are tightened using a uniformly-randomized Hoeffding's inequality for small
samples and an empirical Bernstein bound for larger ones. We derive an
approximate threshold, based on the sample size and how informative the inputs
are, that governs which bound to deploy. Finally, we apply majority voting to
aggregate confidence sets from random subsamples, boosting both stability and
region size. We prove that even per-input aggregated intervals retain their
simultaneous coverage guarantee. These refinements are also validated through
numerical experiments.

</details>


### [1070] [DRO-Augment Framework: Robustness by Synergizing Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Optimization and Data Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17874)
*Jiaming Hu,Debarghya Mukherjee,Ioannis Ch. Paschalidis*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: DRO-Augment 结合 W-DRO 和数据增强，显著提升模型鲁棒性，适用于多种扰动和攻击场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据增强方法在同时应对数据损坏和对抗攻击时仍有改进空间，需要一种更鲁棒的解决方案。

Method: 提出了一种名为 DRO-Augment 的新框架，将 Wasserstein 分布鲁棒优化（W-DRO）与多种数据增强策略相结合。

Result: DRO-Augment 在多个基准数据集（如 CIFAR-10-C、CIFAR-100-C、MNIST 和 Fashion-MNIST）上优于现有方法，尤其在严重数据扰动和对抗攻击场景下表现突出。

Conclusion: DRO-Augment 框架通过结合 Wasserstein 分布鲁棒优化和数据增强策略，显著提升了模型在多种数据扰动和对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，同时在干净数据集上保持了高准确性。

Abstract: In many real-world applications, ensuring the robustness and stability of
deep neural networks (DNNs) is crucial, particularly for image classification
tasks that encounter various input perturbations. While data augmentation
techniques have been widely adopted to enhance the resilience of a trained
model against such perturbations, there remains significant room for
improvement in robustness against corrupted data and adversarial attacks
simultaneously. To address this challenge, we introduce DRO-Augment, a novel
framework that integrates Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Optimization
(W-DRO) with various data augmentation strategies to improve the robustness of
the models significantly across a broad spectrum of corruptions. Our method
outperforms existing augmentation methods under severe data perturbations and
adversarial attack scenarios while maintaining the accuracy on the clean
datasets on a range of benchmark datasets, including but not limited to
CIFAR-10-C, CIFAR-100-C, MNIST, and Fashion-MNIST. On the theoretical side, we
establish novel generalization error bounds for neural networks trained using a
computationally efficient, variation-regularized loss function closely related
to the W-DRO problem.

</details>


### [1071] [Identifiable Convex-Concave Regression via Sub-gradient Regularised Least Squares](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18078)
*William Chung*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的非参数回归方法ICCNLS，通过凸凹分解和统计正交约束提高模型的可解释性和预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统凸凹分解方法存在仿射模糊性问题，影响模型的可解释性和统计性能。

Method: 将目标函数分解为凸凹组件，引入统计正交约束和子梯度正则化（L1、L2和弹性网）。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上验证了方法的优越性，预测精度和模型简洁性优于传统方法。

Conclusion: 统计可识别性与凸凹结构结合，适用于预测、基准和政策评估等场景。

Abstract: We propose a novel nonparametric regression method that models complex
input-output relationships as the sum of convex and concave components. The
method-Identifiable Convex-Concave Nonparametric Least Squares
(ICCNLS)-decomposes the target function into additive shape-constrained
components, each represented via sub-gradient-constrained affine functions. To
address the affine ambiguity inherent in convex-concave decompositions, we
introduce global statistical orthogonality constraints, ensuring that residuals
are uncorrelated with both intercept and input variables. This enforces
decomposition identifiability and improves interpretability. We further
incorporate L1, L2 and elastic net regularisation on sub-gradients to enhance
generalisation and promote structural sparsity. The proposed method is
evaluated on synthetic and real-world datasets, including healthcare pricing
data, and demonstrates improved predictive accuracy and model simplicity
compared to conventional CNLS and difference-of-convex (DC) regression
approaches. Our results show that statistical identifiability, when paired with
convex-concave structure and sub-gradient regularisation, yields interpretable
models suited for forecasting, benchmarking, and policy evaluation.

</details>


### [1072] [Phase transition of \emph{descending} phase retrieval algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18275)
*Mihailo Stojnic*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文研究了下降型相位检索算法的理论极限，通过随机对偶理论（RDT）分析了算法性能，并发现参数流形及其漏斗点是关键数学对象。随着样本复杂度增加，参数流形从多漏斗点结构转变为单漏斗点结构，导致算法从失败到成功的相变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究下降型相位检索算法的理论极限，以理解其性能和行为背后的数学机制。

Method: 利用随机对偶理论（RDT）开发了一个通用程序，用于统计描述算法性能指标，并研究了参数流形及其漏斗点的结构和形状。

Result: 发现参数流形从多漏斗点结构到单漏斗点结构的相变，对应算法从失败到成功的转变。理论与模拟结果在小维度（几百）下高度一致。

Conclusion: 参数流形的漏斗点结构是下降型相位检索算法行为的关键，相变现象为算法性能提供了理论支持。

Abstract: We study theoretical limits of \emph{descending} phase retrieval algorithms.
Utilizing \emph{Random duality theory} (RDT) we develop a generic program that
allows statistical characterization of various algorithmic performance metrics.
Through these we identify the concepts of \emph{parametric manifold} and its
\emph{funneling points} as key mathematical objects that govern the underlying
algorithms' behavior. An isomorphism between single funneling point manifolds
and global convergence of descending algorithms is established. The structure
and shape of the parametric manifold as well as its dependence on the sample
complexity are studied through both plain and lifted RDT. Emergence of a phase
transition is observed. Namely, as sample complexity increases, parametric
manifold transitions from a multi to a single funneling point structure. This
in return corresponds to a transition from the scenarios where descending
algorithms generically fail to the scenarios where they succeed in solving
phase retrieval. We also develop and implement a practical algorithmic variant
that in a hybrid alternating fashion combines a barrier and a plain gradient
descent. Even though the theoretical results are obtained for infinite
dimensional scenarios (and consequently non-jittery parametric manifolds), we
observe a strong agrement between theoretical and simulated phase transitions
predictions for fairly small dimensions on the order of a few hundreds.

</details>


### [1073] [Optimal spectral initializers impact on phase retrieval phase transitions -- an RDT view](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18279)
*Mihailo Stojnic*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文研究了谱初始化器与下降相位检索算法（dPR）理论极限的关系，提出了重叠最优谱初始化器（OptSpins）的统计特性，并探讨了其对dPR性能的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于理解dPR算法在相位检索（PR）中的性能极限，特别是如何通过优化初始重叠来避开平坦区域，从而提升算法的成功率。

Method: 采用随机对偶理论（RDT）框架，统计表征OptSpins的功能结构和初始重叠，并通过数值模拟验证理论预测。

Result: 研究发现，dPR的理论相变可能难以实现，因为平坦区域较大；但通过增加样本复杂度（如15%），可以缩小平坦区域，使OptSpins避开这些区域，从而成功解决PR。

Conclusion: 结论指出，通过优化初始化和调整样本复杂度，可以显著提升dPR算法的性能，避开平坦区域的障碍。

Abstract: We analyze the relation between spectral initializers and theoretical limits
of \emph{descending} phase retrieval algorithms (dPR). In companion paper
[104], for any sample complexity ratio, $\alpha$, \emph{parametric manifold},
${\mathcal {PM}}(\alpha)$, is recognized as a critically important structure
that generically determines dPRs abilities to solve phase retrieval (PR).
Moreover, overlap between the algorithmic solution and the true signal is
positioned as a key ${\mathcal {PM}}$'s component. We here consider the
so-called \emph{overlap optimal} spectral initializers (OptSpins) as dPR's
starting points and develop a generic \emph{Random duality theory} (RDT) based
program to statistically characterize them. In particular, we determine the
functional structure of OptSpins and evaluate the starting overlaps that they
provide for the dPRs. Since ${\mathcal {PM}}$'s so-called \emph{flat regions}
are highly susceptible to \emph{local jitteriness} and as such are key
obstacles on dPR's path towards PR's global optimum, a precise characterization
of the starting overlap allows to determine if such regions can be successfully
circumvented. Through the presented theoretical analysis we observe two key
points in that regard: \textbf{\emph{(i)}} dPR's theoretical phase transition
(critical $\alpha$ above which they solve PR) might be difficult to practically
achieve as the ${\mathcal {PM}}$'s flat regions are large causing the
associated OptSpins to fall exactly within them; and \textbf{\emph{(ii)}}
Opting for so-called ``\emph{safer compression}'' and slightly increasing
$\alpha$ (by say $15\%$) shrinks flat regions and allows OptSpins to fall
outside them and dPRs to ultimately solve PR. Numerical simulations are
conducted as well and shown to be in an excellent agreement with theoretical
predictions.

</details>


### [1074] [Phase retrieval with rank $d$ measurements -- \emph{descending} algorithms phase transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18282)
*Mihailo Stojnic*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文扩展了随机对偶理论（RDT）分析程序，用于处理秩为d的正定相位检索（PR）测量，并观察到最小样本复杂度比在dPR成功时表现出相变现象。理论与模拟结果高度一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展RDT分析程序以处理更高维度的相位检索问题，并验证其在实际应用中的有效性。

Method: 使用随机对偶理论（RDT）分析程序，结合对数障碍梯度下降变体进行模拟验证。

Result: 确定了相变位置，理论与小维度模拟结果高度一致。

Conclusion: RDT程序在更高维度的相位检索问题中依然有效，且理论与实际结果吻合良好。

Abstract: Companion paper [118] developed a powerful \emph{Random duality theory} (RDT)
based analytical program to statistically characterize performance of
\emph{descending} phase retrieval algorithms (dPR) (these include all variants
of gradient descents and among them widely popular Wirtinger flows). We here
generalize the program and show how it can be utilized to handle rank $d$
positive definite phase retrieval (PR) measurements (with special cases $d=1$
and $d=2$ serving as emulations of the real and complex phase retrievals,
respectively). In particular, we observe that the minimal sample complexity
ratio (number of measurements scaled by the dimension of the unknown signal)
which ensures dPR's success exhibits a phase transition (PT) phenomenon. For
both plain and lifted RDT we determine phase transitions locations. To
complement theoretical results we implement a log barrier gradient descent
variant and observe that, even in small dimensional scenarios (with problem
sizes on the order of 100), the simulated phase transitions are in an excellent
agreement with the theoretical predictions.

</details>


### [1075] [Quantifying Uncertainty in the Presence of Distribution Shifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18283)
*Yuli Slavutsky,David M. Blei*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于贝叶斯框架的自适应先验方法，用于在协变量分布偏移下改进神经网络的不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络在协变量分布偏移下往往无法提供可靠的不确定性估计。

Method: 采用自适应先验，结合训练和新协变量，并通过摊销变分推断近似后验预测分布。

Result: 在合成和真实数据上，该方法显著提高了分布偏移下的不确定性估计准确性。

Conclusion: 该方法通过自适应先验有效解决了协变量分布偏移下的不确定性估计问题。

Abstract: Neural networks make accurate predictions but often fail to provide reliable
uncertainty estimates, especially under covariate distribution shifts between
training and testing. To address this problem, we propose a Bayesian framework
for uncertainty estimation that explicitly accounts for covariate shifts. While
conventional approaches rely on fixed priors, the key idea of our method is an
adaptive prior, conditioned on both training and new covariates. This prior
naturally increases uncertainty for inputs that lie far from the training
distribution in regions where predictive performance is likely to degrade. To
efficiently approximate the resulting posterior predictive distribution, we
employ amortized variational inference. Finally, we construct synthetic
environments by drawing small bootstrap samples from the training data,
simulating a range of plausible covariate shift using only the original
dataset. We evaluate our method on both synthetic and real-world data. It
yields substantially improved uncertainty estimates under distribution shifts.

</details>


### [1076] [Theoretical guarantees for neural estimators in parametric statistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18508)
*Almut Rödder,Manuel Hentschel,Sebastian Engelke*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了神经估计器的风险，通过分解风险项并验证假设，提供了理论支持，扩展了其应用范围。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管神经估计器在模拟研究和实际应用中表现出色，但缺乏理论支持其性能的统计保证。

Method: 通过分解神经估计器的风险为多个可单独分析的项，并验证假设的收敛性。

Result: 提出了一个通用方法，用于为更广泛的架构和估计问题推导理论保证。

Conclusion: 本文通过分解神经估计器的风险为多个可单独分析的项，提出了确保每项收敛到零的易于验证的假设，并验证了其在神经估计器流行应用中的有效性。

Abstract: Neural estimators are simulation-based estimators for the parameters of a
family of statistical models, which build a direct mapping from the sample to
the parameter vector. They benefit from the versatility of available network
architectures and efficient training methods developed in the field of deep
learning. Neural estimators are amortized in the sense that, once trained, they
can be applied to any new data set with almost no computational cost. While
many papers have shown very good performance of these methods in simulation
studies and real-world applications, so far no statistical guarantees are
available to support these observations theoretically. In this work, we study
the risk of neural estimators by decomposing it into several terms that can be
analyzed separately. We formulate easy-to-check assumptions ensuring that each
term converges to zero, and we verify them for popular applications of neural
estimators. Our results provide a general recipe to derive theoretical
guarantees also for broader classes of architectures and estimation problems.

</details>


### [1077] [Trustworthy Prediction with Gaussian Process Knowledge Scores](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18630)
*Kurt Butler,Guanchao Feng,Tong Chen,Petar Djuric*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于高斯过程回归模型的知识评分，量化预测的可靠性，实验证明其在多种任务中有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在数据空间中未观测区域进行预测时，传统概率模型无法明确预测是否受到已有数据的充分支持。因此，需要一种量化方法来评估预测的可靠性。

Method: 提出了一种知识评分方法，用于量化观测数据对预测不确定性的影响。该方法基于高斯过程回归模型，评分自然界于0和1之间。

Result: 实验证明，知识评分能够有效预测GPR模型的准确性，并在异常检测、外推和缺失数据填补等任务中提升性能。

Conclusion: 该论文提出了一种用于高斯过程回归（GPR）模型的知识评分，该评分量化了观测数据对预测不确定性的减少程度。实验表明，该评分能够有效预测GPR模型的准确性，并在异常检测、外推和缺失数据填补等任务中提升性能。

Abstract: Probabilistic models are often used to make predictions in regions of the
data space where no observations are available, but it is not always clear
whether such predictions are well-informed by previously seen data. In this
paper, we propose a knowledge score for predictions from Gaussian process
regression (GPR) models that quantifies the extent to which observing data have
reduced our uncertainty about a prediction. The knowledge score is
interpretable and naturally bounded between 0 and 1. We demonstrate in several
experiments that the knowledge score can anticipate when predictions from a GPR
model are accurate, and that this anticipation improves performance in tasks
such as anomaly detection, extrapolation, and missing data imputation. Source
code for this project is available online at
https://github.com/KurtButler/GP-knowledge.

</details>


### [1078] [Tight Generalization Error Bounds for Stochastic Gradient Descent in Non-convex Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18645)
*Wenjun Xiong,Juan Ding,Xinlei Zuo,Qizhai Li*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型的T2pm-SGD方法，显著改进了非凸学习中的泛化误差界限，并通过实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解SGD在非凸学习中的泛化性质对模型在未见数据上的鲁棒性至关重要。

Method: 引入T2pm-SGD，分解泛化误差界限为轨迹项和平坦项，并优化扰动噪声的方差。

Result: 轨迹项改进为O(n^{-1})，整体界限优化为O(n^{-2/3})，平坦项更稳定且更小。

Conclusion: T2pm-SGD在理论和实验上均表现出更紧的泛化误差界限，适用于不同类型的损失函数。

Abstract: Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is fundamental for training deep neural
networks, especially in non-convex settings. Understanding SGD's generalization
properties is crucial for ensuring robust model performance on unseen data. In
this paper, we analyze the generalization error bounds of SGD for non-convex
learning by introducing the Type II perturbed SGD (T2pm-SGD), which
accommodates both sub-Gaussian and bounded loss functions. The generalization
error bound is decomposed into two components: the trajectory term and the
flatness term. Our analysis improves the trajectory term to $O(n^{-1})$,
significantly enhancing the previous $O((nb)^{-1/2})$ bound for bounded losses,
where n is the number of training samples and b is the batch size. By selecting
an optimal variance for the perturbation noise, the overall bound is further
refined to $O(n^{-2/3})$. For sub-Gaussian loss functions, a tighter trajectory
term is also achieved. In both cases, the flatness term remains stable across
iterations and is smaller than those reported in previous literature, which
increase with iterations. This stability, ensured by T2pm-SGD, leads to tighter
generalization error bounds for both loss function types. Our theoretical
results are validated through extensive experiments on benchmark datasets,
including MNIST and CIFAR-10, demonstrating the effectiveness of T2pm-SGD in
establishing tighter generalization bounds.

</details>


### [1079] [A Random Matrix Analysis of In-context Memorization for Nonlinear Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18656)
*Zhenyu Liao,Jiaqing Liu,TianQi Hou,Difan Zou,Zenan Ling*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了非线性注意力机制在高维比例区域中的记忆误差，揭示了非线性与输入结构如何影响其记忆性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管注意力机制在现代大型语言模型中扮演核心角色，但其在非线性设置下的理论理解仍然有限。

Method: 利用大核随机矩阵理论的最新进展，分析了非线性注意力在高维比例区域中的记忆误差。

Result: 非线性注意力在随机输入上通常比线性岭回归具有更高的记忆误差，但当输入具有统计结构时，这种差距会消失甚至逆转。

Conclusion: 非线性注意力与输入结构的相互作用决定了其记忆性能，理论结果得到了数值实验的支持。

Abstract: Attention mechanisms have revolutionized machine learning (ML) by enabling
efficient modeling of global dependencies across inputs. Their inherently
parallelizable structures allow for efficient scaling with the exponentially
increasing size of both pretrained data and model parameters. Yet, despite
their central role as the computational backbone of modern large language
models (LLMs), the theoretical understanding of Attentions, especially in the
nonlinear setting, remains limited.
  In this paper, we provide a precise characterization of the \emph{in-context
memorization error} of \emph{nonlinear Attention}, in the high-dimensional
proportional regime where the number of input tokens $n$ and their embedding
dimension $p$ are both large and comparable. Leveraging recent advances in the
theory of large kernel random matrices, we show that nonlinear Attention
typically incurs higher memorization error than linear ridge regression on
random inputs. However, this gap vanishes, and can even be reversed, when the
input exhibits statistical structure, particularly when the Attention weights
align with the input signal direction. Our results reveal how nonlinearity and
input structure interact with each other to govern the memorization performance
of nonlinear Attention. The theoretical insights are supported by numerical
experiments.

</details>


### [1080] [Local Averaging Accurately Distills Manifold Structure From Noisy Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18761)
*Yihan Shen,Shiyu Wang,Arnaud Lamy,Mariam Avagyan,John Wright*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在高噪声环境下分析局部平均方法在流形上准确性的理论框架，填补了现有研究的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维数据通常存在于低维流形附近，但实际中流形未知且数据常受噪声干扰。现有方法缺乏在高噪声环境下对局部平均准确性的严格分析。

Method: 采用两轮小批量局部平均方法，对从d维流形中提取的噪声样本进行处理，噪声大小与流形的reach τ相当。

Result: 理论证明在高概率下，平均点与流形的距离受限于噪声标准差、流形直径和外在曲率。

Conclusion: 该方法是首个在高噪声环境下分析局部平均准确性的工作，为多种降噪和降维方法提供了理论基础。

Abstract: High-dimensional data are ubiquitous, with examples ranging from natural
images to scientific datasets, and often reside near low-dimensional manifolds.
Leveraging this geometric structure is vital for downstream tasks, including
signal denoising, reconstruction, and generation. However, in practice, the
manifold is typically unknown and only noisy samples are available. A
fundamental approach to uncovering the manifold structure is local averaging,
which is a cornerstone of state-of-the-art provable methods for manifold
fitting and denoising. However, to the best of our knowledge, there are no
works that rigorously analyze the accuracy of local averaging in a manifold
setting in high-noise regimes. In this work, we provide theoretical analyses of
a two-round mini-batch local averaging method applied to noisy samples drawn
from a $d$-dimensional manifold $\mathcal M \subset \mathbb{R}^D$, under a
relatively high-noise regime where the noise size is comparable to the reach
$\tau$. We show that with high probability, the averaged point $\hat{\mathbf
q}$ achieves the bound $d(\hat{\mathbf q}, \mathcal M) \leq \sigma
\sqrt{d\left(1+\frac{\kappa\mathrm{diam}(\mathcal {M})}{\log(D)}\right)}$,
where $\sigma, \mathrm{diam(\mathcal M)},\kappa$ denote the standard deviation
of the Gaussian noise, manifold's diameter and a bound on its extrinsic
curvature, respectively. This is the first analysis of local averaging accuracy
over the manifold in the relatively high noise regime where $\sigma \sqrt{D}
\approx \tau$. The proposed method can serve as a preprocessing step for a wide
range of provable methods designed for lower-noise regimes. Additionally, our
framework can provide a theoretical foundation for a broad spectrum of
denoising and dimensionality reduction methods that rely on local averaging
techniques.

</details>


### [1081] [Coupled Entropy: A Goldilocks Generalization?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17229)
*Kenric P. Nelson*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文探讨了归一化Tsallis熵（NTE）的不稳定性问题，并提出耦合熵作为解决方案，适用于复杂系统建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Tsallis熵在归一化时的不稳定性问题，并探索其在复杂系统中的应用。

Method: 提出耦合熵定义，通过引入耦合参数κ和非线性参数α，构建耦合指数族分布。

Result: 耦合熵通过归一化因子1+dκ增强了稳定性，适用于机器学习等应用。

Conclusion: 耦合熵是衡量统计复杂性的有力候选，为复杂系统建模提供了新工具。

Abstract: Nonextensive Statistical Mechanics (NSM) has developed into a powerful
toolset for modeling and analyzing complex systems. Despite its many successes,
a puzzle arose early in its development. The constraints on the Tsallis entropy
are in the form of an escort distribution with elements proportional to
$p_i^q$, but this same factor within the Tsallis entropy function is not
normalized. This led to consideration of the Normalized Tsallis Entropy (NTE);
however, the normalization proved to make the function unstable. I will provide
evidence that the coupled entropy, which divides NTE by $1 + d\kappa$, where
$d$ is the dimension and $\kappa$ is the coupling, may provide the necessary
robustness necessary for applications like machine learning. The definition for
the coupled entropy and its maximizing distributions, the coupled exponential
family, arises from clarifying how the number of independent random variables
$(q)$ is composed of the nonlinear properties of complex systems,
$q=1+\frac{\alpha\kappa}{1+d\kappa}$, where $\alpha$ is the nonlinear parameter
governing the shape of distributions near their location and $\kappa$ is the
parameter determining the asymptotic tail decay. Foundationally, for complex
systems, the coupling is the measure of nonlinearity inducing non-exponential
distributions and the degree of nonadditivity entropy. As such, the coupling is
a strong candidate as a measure of statistical complexity.

</details>


### [1082] [Differentiable neural network representation of multi-well, locally-convex potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17242)
*Reese E. Jones,Adrian Buganza Tepole,Jan N. Fuhg*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于对数-求和-指数（LSE）混合输入凸神经网络（ICNN）的可微分凸公式，用于建模多模态行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多势阱在科学中普遍存在，但传统方法通常是非平滑的，缺乏可微性和凸性。

Method: 使用LSE-ICNN结合稀疏回归，自动发现模态数量和过渡尺度。

Result: 在多个领域（如相变、基因电路等）中展示了LSE-ICNN的有效性。

Conclusion: LSE-ICNN在保持可微性的同时，能够建模复杂多模态景观，适用于数据驱动建模和优化。

Abstract: Multi-well potentials are ubiquitous in science, modeling phenomena such as
phase transitions, dynamic instabilities, and multimodal behavior across
physics, chemistry, and biology. In contrast to non-smooth minimum-of-mixture
representations, we propose a differentiable and convex formulation based on a
log-sum-exponential (LSE) mixture of input convex neural network (ICNN) modes.
This log-sum-exponential input convex neural network (LSE-ICNN) provides a
smooth surrogate that retains convexity within basins and allows for
gradient-based learning and inference.
  A key feature of the LSE-ICNN is its ability to automatically discover both
the number of modes and the scale of transitions through sparse regression,
enabling adaptive and parsimonious modeling. We demonstrate the versatility of
the LSE-ICNN across diverse domains, including mechanochemical phase
transformations, microstructural elastic instabilities, conservative biological
gene circuits, and variational inference for multimodal probability
distributions. These examples highlight the effectiveness of the LSE-ICNN in
capturing complex multimodal landscapes while preserving differentiability,
making it broadly applicable in data-driven modeling, optimization, and
physical simulation.

</details>


### [1083] [Gaussian Processes and Reproducing Kernels: Connections and Equivalences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17366)
*Motonobu Kanagawa,Philipp Hennig,Dino Sejdinovic,Bharath K. Sriperumbudur*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该专论探讨了高斯过程和再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）两种方法之间的联系与等价性，并提供了一个统一的视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究高斯过程和RKHS在机器学习、统计和数值分析中的广泛应用，以及两者之间的联系和等价性。

Method: 回顾了回归、插值、数值积分、分布差异和统计依赖性等基本主题中的联系和等价性，并基于高斯希尔伯特空间与RKHS的等价性建立统一视角。

Result: 建立了高斯过程与RKHS方法之间的等价性，为两种研究社区并行发展的方法提供了桥梁。

Conclusion: 该专论为高斯过程和再生核方法的研究提供了统一的基础，有助于进一步推动相关领域的发展。

Abstract: This monograph studies the relations between two approaches using positive
definite kernels: probabilistic methods using Gaussian processes, and
non-probabilistic methods using reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces (RKHS). They
are widely studied and used in machine learning, statistics, and numerical
analysis. Connections and equivalences between them are reviewed for
fundamental topics such as regression, interpolation, numerical integration,
distributional discrepancies, and statistical dependence, as well as for sample
path properties of Gaussian processes. A unifying perspective for these
equivalences is established, based on the equivalence between the Gaussian
Hilbert space and the RKHS. The monograph serves as a basis to bridge many
other methods based on Gaussian processes and reproducing kernels, which are
developed in parallel by the two research communities.

</details>


### [1084] [Scalable Machine Learning Algorithms using Path Signatures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17634)
*Csaba Tóth*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文探讨了路径签名在机器学习中的应用，提出了一系列可扩展的模型，结合了理论鲁棒性和计算效率，为序列和结构化数据提供了新的解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究如何利用路径签名的表达能力，解决时间序列和图数据中的动态演化、长程依赖和不规则采样等挑战。

Method: 论文提出了一系列模型，结合了理论鲁棒性和计算效率，包括基于签名核的高斯过程、Seq2Tens框架、图模型、随机傅里叶签名特征和递归稀疏谱签名高斯过程。

Result: 论文贡献包括高斯过程、Seq2Tens框架、图模型、随机傅里叶签名特征和递归稀疏谱签名高斯过程，为序列和结构化数据提供了可扩展的学习方法。

Conclusion: 该论文为序列和结构化数据的可扩展、基于路径签名的学习提供了方法论工具和概念桥梁，并总结了当前的最新技术。

Abstract: The interface between stochastic analysis and machine learning is a rapidly
evolving field, with path signatures - iterated integrals that provide
faithful, hierarchical representations of paths - offering a principled and
universal feature map for sequential and structured data. Rooted in rough path
theory, path signatures are invariant to reparameterization and well-suited for
modelling evolving dynamics, long-range dependencies, and irregular sampling -
common challenges in real-world time series and graph data.
  This thesis investigates how to harness the expressive power of path
signatures within scalable machine learning pipelines. It introduces a suite of
models that combine theoretical robustness with computational efficiency,
bridging rough path theory with probabilistic modelling, deep learning, and
kernel methods. Key contributions include: Gaussian processes with signature
kernel-based covariance functions for uncertainty-aware time series modelling;
the Seq2Tens framework, which employs low-rank tensor structure in the weight
space for scalable deep modelling of long-range dependencies; and graph-based
models where expected signatures over graphs induce hypo-elliptic diffusion
processes, offering expressive yet tractable alternatives to standard graph
neural networks. Further developments include Random Fourier Signature
Features, a scalable kernel approximation with theoretical guarantees, and
Recurrent Sparse Spectrum Signature Gaussian Processes, which combine Gaussian
processes, signature kernels, and random features with a principled forgetting
mechanism for multi-horizon time series forecasting with adaptive context
length.
  We hope this thesis serves as both a methodological toolkit and a conceptual
bridge, and provides a useful reference for the current state of the art in
scalable, signature-based learning for sequential and structured data.

</details>


### [1085] [Derandomizing Simultaneous Confidence Regions for Band-Limited Functions by Improved Norm Bounds and Majority-Voting Schemes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17764)
*Balázs Csanád Csáji,Bálint Horváth*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 改进了带限函数的同步置信区域构建方法，通过核范数边界收紧和多数投票提升了稳定性和区域大小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 改进现有的非参数、非渐近方法，以构建带限函数的同步置信区域，提高稳定性和区域大小。

Method: 在Paley-Wiener再生核希尔伯特空间中工作，使用均匀随机化的Hoeffding不等式对小样本进行核范数边界收紧，对大样本使用经验Bernstein边界。通过多数投票聚合随机子样本的置信集。

Result: 提出了一个基于样本大小和输入信息量的近似阈值，用于决定使用哪种边界，并通过多数投票提升了置信集的稳定性和大小。

Conclusion: 通过数值实验验证了改进方法的有效性，证明了即使在每个输入点上聚合的区间仍能保持其同时覆盖的保证。

Abstract: Band-limited functions are fundamental objects that are widely used in
systems theory and signal processing. In this paper we refine a recent
nonparametric, nonasymptotic method for constructing simultaneous confidence
regions for band-limited functions from noisy input-output measurements, by
working in a Paley-Wiener reproducing kernel Hilbert space. Kernel norm bounds
are tightened using a uniformly-randomized Hoeffding's inequality for small
samples and an empirical Bernstein bound for larger ones. We derive an
approximate threshold, based on the sample size and how informative the inputs
are, that governs which bound to deploy. Finally, we apply majority voting to
aggregate confidence sets from random subsamples, boosting both stability and
region size. We prove that even per-input aggregated intervals retain their
