simultaneous coverage guarantee. These refinements are also validated through
numerical experiments.

</details>


### [1086] [DRO-Augment Framework: Robustness by Synergizing Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Optimization and Data Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17874)
*Jiaming Hu,Debarghya Mukherjee,Ioannis Ch. Paschalidis*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: DRO-Augment结合Wasserstein分布鲁棒优化与数据增强策略，显著提升模型在多种数据扰动和对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，同时在干净数据集上保持高准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据增强方法在同时应对数据损坏和对抗攻击时仍有改进空间，需要更鲁棒的模型。

Method: 提出DRO-Augment框架，整合Wasserstein分布鲁棒优化（W-DRO）与多种数据增强策略。

Result: 在CIFAR-10-C等基准数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在严重数据扰动和对抗攻击场景下。

Conclusion: DRO-Augment通过理论分析和实验验证，显著提升了模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Abstract: In many real-world applications, ensuring the robustness and stability of
deep neural networks (DNNs) is crucial, particularly for image classification
tasks that encounter various input perturbations. While data augmentation
techniques have been widely adopted to enhance the resilience of a trained
model against such perturbations, there remains significant room for
improvement in robustness against corrupted data and adversarial attacks
simultaneously. To address this challenge, we introduce DRO-Augment, a novel
framework that integrates Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Optimization
(W-DRO) with various data augmentation strategies to improve the robustness of
the models significantly across a broad spectrum of corruptions. Our method
outperforms existing augmentation methods under severe data perturbations and
adversarial attack scenarios while maintaining the accuracy on the clean
datasets on a range of benchmark datasets, including but not limited to
CIFAR-10-C, CIFAR-100-C, MNIST, and Fashion-MNIST. On the theoretical side, we
establish novel generalization error bounds for neural networks trained using a
computationally efficient, variation-regularized loss function closely related
to the W-DRO problem.

</details>


### [1087] [Identifiable Convex-Concave Regression via Sub-gradient Regularised Least Squares](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18078)
*William Chung*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的非参数回归方法ICCNLS，通过将目标函数分解为凸和凹的加性形状约束组件，结合统计正交性约束和正则化，提高了预测准确性和模型可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统凸凹分解方法存在仿射模糊性问题，且缺乏统计可识别性，影响了模型的解释性和预测性能。

Method: ICCNLS将目标函数分解为凸和凹的加性组件，引入全局统计正交性约束确保分解可识别性，并结合L1、L2和弹性网络正则化。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集（如医疗定价数据）上，ICCNLS相比传统CNLS和DC回归方法表现出更高的预测准确性和模型简洁性。

Conclusion: 统计可识别性与凸凹结构及子梯度正则化结合，可生成适用于预测、基准和政策评估的可解释模型。

Abstract: We propose a novel nonparametric regression method that models complex
input-output relationships as the sum of convex and concave components. The
method-Identifiable Convex-Concave Nonparametric Least Squares
(ICCNLS)-decomposes the target function into additive shape-constrained
components, each represented via sub-gradient-constrained affine functions. To
address the affine ambiguity inherent in convex-concave decompositions, we
introduce global statistical orthogonality constraints, ensuring that residuals
are uncorrelated with both intercept and input variables. This enforces
decomposition identifiability and improves interpretability. We further
incorporate L1, L2 and elastic net regularisation on sub-gradients to enhance
generalisation and promote structural sparsity. The proposed method is
evaluated on synthetic and real-world datasets, including healthcare pricing
data, and demonstrates improved predictive accuracy and model simplicity
compared to conventional CNLS and difference-of-convex (DC) regression
approaches. Our results show that statistical identifiability, when paired with
convex-concave structure and sub-gradient regularisation, yields interpretable
models suited for forecasting, benchmarking, and policy evaluation.

</details>


### [1088] [Phase transition of \emph{descending} phase retrieval algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18275)
*Mihailo Stojnic*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文研究了下降相位检索算法的理论极限，利用随机对偶理论（RDT）开发了一个通用程序，用于统计描述算法性能指标。通过分析参数流形及其漏斗点，揭示了算法行为的关键数学对象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究下降相位检索算法的理论极限，以理解其行为背后的数学机制。

Method: 使用随机对偶理论（RDT）开发通用程序，分析参数流形和漏斗点，并通过理论和模拟验证结果。

Result: 发现参数流形从多漏斗点结构过渡到单漏斗点结构，对应算法从失败到成功的相变。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了下降相位检索算法的行为机制，并开发了一种混合算法，理论与模拟结果在小维度下表现一致。

Abstract: We study theoretical limits of \emph{descending} phase retrieval algorithms.
Utilizing \emph{Random duality theory} (RDT) we develop a generic program that
allows statistical characterization of various algorithmic performance metrics.
Through these we identify the concepts of \emph{parametric manifold} and its
\emph{funneling points} as key mathematical objects that govern the underlying
algorithms' behavior. An isomorphism between single funneling point manifolds
and global convergence of descending algorithms is established. The structure
and shape of the parametric manifold as well as its dependence on the sample
complexity are studied through both plain and lifted RDT. Emergence of a phase
transition is observed. Namely, as sample complexity increases, parametric
manifold transitions from a multi to a single funneling point structure. This
in return corresponds to a transition from the scenarios where descending
algorithms generically fail to the scenarios where they succeed in solving
phase retrieval. We also develop and implement a practical algorithmic variant
that in a hybrid alternating fashion combines a barrier and a plain gradient
descent. Even though the theoretical results are obtained for infinite
dimensional scenarios (and consequently non-jittery parametric manifolds), we
observe a strong agrement between theoretical and simulated phase transitions
predictions for fairly small dimensions on the order of a few hundreds.

</details>


### [1089] [Optimal spectral initializers impact on phase retrieval phase transitions -- an RDT view](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18279)
*Mihailo Stojnic*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 研究分析了下降相位检索算法（dPR）的初始点（OptSpins）与理论极限的关系，发现通过增加样本复杂度比（α）可以缩小平坦区域，使算法成功解决相位检索问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究下降相位检索算法（dPR）的初始点（OptSpins）与理论极限之间的关系，以确定其能否成功绕过平坦区域并解决相位检索问题。

Method: 采用随机对偶理论（RDT）框架，对OptSpins进行统计特性分析，并通过数值模拟验证理论预测。

Result: 研究发现，OptSpins的功能结构及其提供的初始重叠决定了dPR能否绕过平坦区域。通过增加α，可以缩小平坦区域，使OptSpins落在平坦区域之外，从而成功解决相位检索问题。

Conclusion: 通过理论分析和数值模拟，研究发现，尽管下降相位检索算法（dPR）的理论相变点可能难以实际实现，但通过选择更安全的压缩方式并略微增加样本复杂度比（α），可以缩小平坦区域，使OptSpins落在平坦区域之外，从而最终解决相位检索问题。

Abstract: We analyze the relation between spectral initializers and theoretical limits
of \emph{descending} phase retrieval algorithms (dPR). In companion paper
[104], for any sample complexity ratio, $\alpha$, \emph{parametric manifold},
${\mathcal {PM}}(\alpha)$, is recognized as a critically important structure
that generically determines dPRs abilities to solve phase retrieval (PR).
Moreover, overlap between the algorithmic solution and the true signal is
positioned as a key ${\mathcal {PM}}$'s component. We here consider the
so-called \emph{overlap optimal} spectral initializers (OptSpins) as dPR's
starting points and develop a generic \emph{Random duality theory} (RDT) based
program to statistically characterize them. In particular, we determine the
functional structure of OptSpins and evaluate the starting overlaps that they
provide for the dPRs. Since ${\mathcal {PM}}$'s so-called \emph{flat regions}
are highly susceptible to \emph{local jitteriness} and as such are key
obstacles on dPR's path towards PR's global optimum, a precise characterization
of the starting overlap allows to determine if such regions can be successfully
circumvented. Through the presented theoretical analysis we observe two key
points in that regard: \textbf{\emph{(i)}} dPR's theoretical phase transition
(critical $\alpha$ above which they solve PR) might be difficult to practically
achieve as the ${\mathcal {PM}}$'s flat regions are large causing the
associated OptSpins to fall exactly within them; and \textbf{\emph{(ii)}}
Opting for so-called ``\emph{safer compression}'' and slightly increasing
$\alpha$ (by say $15\%$) shrinks flat regions and allows OptSpins to fall
outside them and dPRs to ultimately solve PR. Numerical simulations are
conducted as well and shown to be in an excellent agreement with theoretical
predictions.

</details>


### [1090] [Phase retrieval with rank $d$ measurements -- \emph{descending} algorithms phase transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18282)
*Mihailo Stojnic*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文推广了随机对偶理论（RDT）分析程序，验证了降序相位检索算法（dPR）的相变现象，理论与实验一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究旨在推广随机对偶理论（RDT）分析程序，以更广泛地应用于相位检索问题，并验证其在理论和实验中的一致性。

Method: 论文采用随机对偶理论（RDT）分析程序，并将其推广到处理秩为$d$的正定相位检索（PR）测量问题。此外，还实现了一种对数障碍梯度下降变体进行实验验证。

Result: 研究发现降序相位检索算法（dPR）的最小样本复杂度比存在相变现象，且理论和实验结果的相变位置高度一致。

Conclusion: 该论文通过推广随机对偶理论（RDT）分析程序，成功确定了降序相位检索算法（dPR）的最小样本复杂度比的相变现象，并通过实验验证了理论预测的准确性。

Abstract: Companion paper [118] developed a powerful \emph{Random duality theory} (RDT)
based analytical program to statistically characterize performance of
\emph{descending} phase retrieval algorithms (dPR) (these include all variants
of gradient descents and among them widely popular Wirtinger flows). We here
generalize the program and show how it can be utilized to handle rank $d$
positive definite phase retrieval (PR) measurements (with special cases $d=1$
and $d=2$ serving as emulations of the real and complex phase retrievals,
respectively). In particular, we observe that the minimal sample complexity
ratio (number of measurements scaled by the dimension of the unknown signal)
which ensures dPR's success exhibits a phase transition (PT) phenomenon. For
both plain and lifted RDT we determine phase transitions locations. To
complement theoretical results we implement a log barrier gradient descent
variant and observe that, even in small dimensional scenarios (with problem
sizes on the order of 100), the simulated phase transitions are in an excellent
agreement with the theoretical predictions.

</details>


### [1091] [Quantifying Uncertainty in the Presence of Distribution Shifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18283)
*Yuli Slavutsky,David M. Blei*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出贝叶斯框架，通过自适应先验和摊销变分推断，提升协变量偏移下的不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络在协变量分布偏移下往往无法提供可靠的不确定性估计，这限制了其在实际应用中的可靠性。

Method: 提出了一种基于自适应先验的贝叶斯框架，利用摊销变分推断近似后验预测分布，并通过从训练数据中抽取小样本模拟协变量偏移。

Result: 该方法在合成和真实数据上均显著改善了分布偏移下的不确定性估计。

Conclusion: 该论文提出的贝叶斯框架通过自适应先验和摊销变分推断，显著提高了在协变量分布偏移下的不确定性估计准确性。

Abstract: Neural networks make accurate predictions but often fail to provide reliable
uncertainty estimates, especially under covariate distribution shifts between
training and testing. To address this problem, we propose a Bayesian framework
for uncertainty estimation that explicitly accounts for covariate shifts. While
conventional approaches rely on fixed priors, the key idea of our method is an
adaptive prior, conditioned on both training and new covariates. This prior
naturally increases uncertainty for inputs that lie far from the training
distribution in regions where predictive performance is likely to degrade. To
efficiently approximate the resulting posterior predictive distribution, we
employ amortized variational inference. Finally, we construct synthetic
environments by drawing small bootstrap samples from the training data,
simulating a range of plausible covariate shift using only the original
dataset. We evaluate our method on both synthetic and real-world data. It
yields substantially improved uncertainty estimates under distribution shifts.

</details>


### [1092] [Theoretical guarantees for neural estimators in parametric statistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18508)
*Almut Rödder,Manuel Hentschel,Sebastian Engelke*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了神经估计器的风险，通过分解风险项并提供理论保证，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管神经估计器在模拟和实际应用中表现良好，但缺乏理论支持其性能的统计保证。

Method: 通过分解神经估计器的风险为多个可单独分析的项，并制定易于验证的假设确保各项收敛到零。

Result: 验证了神经估计器在流行应用中的假设，为更广泛的架构和估计问题提供了理论保证的通用方法。

Conclusion: 研究为神经估计器的理论分析提供了框架，支持其在实际应用中的有效性。

Abstract: Neural estimators are simulation-based estimators for the parameters of a
family of statistical models, which build a direct mapping from the sample to
the parameter vector. They benefit from the versatility of available network
architectures and efficient training methods developed in the field of deep
learning. Neural estimators are amortized in the sense that, once trained, they
can be applied to any new data set with almost no computational cost. While
many papers have shown very good performance of these methods in simulation
studies and real-world applications, so far no statistical guarantees are
available to support these observations theoretically. In this work, we study
the risk of neural estimators by decomposing it into several terms that can be
analyzed separately. We formulate easy-to-check assumptions ensuring that each
term converges to zero, and we verify them for popular applications of neural
estimators. Our results provide a general recipe to derive theoretical
guarantees also for broader classes of architectures and estimation problems.

</details>


### [1093] [Trustworthy Prediction with Gaussian Process Knowledge Scores](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18630)
*Kurt Butler,Guanchao Feng,Tong Chen,Petar Djuric*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种用于GPR模型的知识评分，量化观测数据对预测不确定性的影响，实验证明其在多个任务中有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 概率模型常用于数据空间中无观测区域的预测，但难以判断这些预测是否受到已有数据的充分支持。

Method: 论文提出了一种可解释且自然界于0和1之间的知识评分，用于量化观测数据对预测不确定性的影响。

Result: 实验证明，知识评分能够有效预测GPR模型的准确性，并在多个任务中提升性能。

Conclusion: 该论文提出了一种用于高斯过程回归（GPR）模型的知识评分，该评分量化了观测数据对预测不确定性的减少程度。实验表明，该评分能够有效预测GPR模型的准确性，并在异常检测、外推和缺失数据插补等任务中提升性能。

Abstract: Probabilistic models are often used to make predictions in regions of the
data space where no observations are available, but it is not always clear
whether such predictions are well-informed by previously seen data. In this
paper, we propose a knowledge score for predictions from Gaussian process
regression (GPR) models that quantifies the extent to which observing data have
reduced our uncertainty about a prediction. The knowledge score is
interpretable and naturally bounded between 0 and 1. We demonstrate in several
experiments that the knowledge score can anticipate when predictions from a GPR
model are accurate, and that this anticipation improves performance in tasks
such as anomaly detection, extrapolation, and missing data imputation. Source
code for this project is available online at
https://github.com/KurtButler/GP-knowledge.

</details>


### [1094] [Tight Generalization Error Bounds for Stochastic Gradient Descent in Non-convex Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18645)
*Wenjun Xiong,Juan Ding,Xinlei Zuo,Qizhai Li*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型的T2pm-SGD方法，通过分解泛化误差为轨迹项和平坦项，显著改进了非凸学习中的泛化误差界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解SGD在非凸学习中的泛化性质对模型在未见数据上的鲁棒性至关重要。

Method: 引入T2pm-SGD，支持子高斯和有界损失函数，分解泛化误差为轨迹项和平坦项。

Result: 轨迹项改进为O(n^{-1})，平坦项稳定且更小，整体界限优化至O(n^{-2/3})。

Conclusion: T2pm-SGD在理论和实验中均表现出更紧的泛化界限，适用于多种损失函数。

Abstract: Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is fundamental for training deep neural
networks, especially in non-convex settings. Understanding SGD's generalization
properties is crucial for ensuring robust model performance on unseen data. In
this paper, we analyze the generalization error bounds of SGD for non-convex
learning by introducing the Type II perturbed SGD (T2pm-SGD), which
accommodates both sub-Gaussian and bounded loss functions. The generalization
error bound is decomposed into two components: the trajectory term and the
flatness term. Our analysis improves the trajectory term to $O(n^{-1})$,
significantly enhancing the previous $O((nb)^{-1/2})$ bound for bounded losses,
where n is the number of training samples and b is the batch size. By selecting
an optimal variance for the perturbation noise, the overall bound is further
refined to $O(n^{-2/3})$. For sub-Gaussian loss functions, a tighter trajectory
term is also achieved. In both cases, the flatness term remains stable across
iterations and is smaller than those reported in previous literature, which
increase with iterations. This stability, ensured by T2pm-SGD, leads to tighter
generalization error bounds for both loss function types. Our theoretical
results are validated through extensive experiments on benchmark datasets,
including MNIST and CIFAR-10, demonstrating the effectiveness of T2pm-SGD in
establishing tighter generalization bounds.

</details>


### [1095] [A Random Matrix Analysis of In-context Memorization for Nonlinear Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18656)
*Zhenyu Liao,Jiaqing Liu,TianQi Hou,Difan Zou,Zenan Ling*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了非线性注意力在高维比例区域中的记忆误差，发现其表现受输入结构和非线性性的共同影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管注意力机制在现代大型语言模型中扮演核心角色，但其在非线性设置下的理论理解仍然有限。

Method: 利用大核随机矩阵理论的最新进展，分析了非线性注意力在高维比例区域中的记忆误差。

Result: 非线性注意力在随机输入上通常比线性岭回归具有更高的记忆误差，但当输入具有统计结构时，这一差距会消失甚至逆转。

Conclusion: 非线性注意力在高维比例区域中的记忆误差表现受输入结构和非线性性的共同影响，当注意力权重与输入信号方向对齐时，非线性注意力的记忆误差可能优于线性回归。

Abstract: Attention mechanisms have revolutionized machine learning (ML) by enabling
efficient modeling of global dependencies across inputs. Their inherently
parallelizable structures allow for efficient scaling with the exponentially
increasing size of both pretrained data and model parameters. Yet, despite
their central role as the computational backbone of modern large language
models (LLMs), the theoretical understanding of Attentions, especially in the
nonlinear setting, remains limited.
  In this paper, we provide a precise characterization of the \emph{in-context
memorization error} of \emph{nonlinear Attention}, in the high-dimensional
proportional regime where the number of input tokens $n$ and their embedding
dimension $p$ are both large and comparable. Leveraging recent advances in the
theory of large kernel random matrices, we show that nonlinear Attention
typically incurs higher memorization error than linear ridge regression on
random inputs. However, this gap vanishes, and can even be reversed, when the
input exhibits statistical structure, particularly when the Attention weights
align with the input signal direction. Our results reveal how nonlinearity and
input structure interact with each other to govern the memorization performance
of nonlinear Attention. The theoretical insights are supported by numerical
experiments.

</details>


### [1096] [Local Averaging Accurately Distills Manifold Structure From Noisy Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18761)
*Yihan Shen,Shiyu Wang,Arnaud Lamy,Mariam Avagyan,John Wright*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种在高噪声环境下分析局部平均方法在流形上准确性的理论框架，填补了现有研究的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维数据通常位于低维流形附近，但实际中流形未知且数据带有噪声。现有方法缺乏在高噪声环境下对局部平均准确性的严格分析。

Method: 采用两轮小批量局部平均方法处理从d维流形中提取的噪声样本，噪声大小与流形的reach τ相当。

Result: 证明了在高概率下，平均点与流形的距离满足特定上界，这是首次在高噪声环境下对局部平均准确性的分析。

Conclusion: 该方法可作为预处理步骤，为降噪和降维方法提供理论基础，适用于高噪声环境。

Abstract: High-dimensional data are ubiquitous, with examples ranging from natural
images to scientific datasets, and often reside near low-dimensional manifolds.
Leveraging this geometric structure is vital for downstream tasks, including
signal denoising, reconstruction, and generation. However, in practice, the
manifold is typically unknown and only noisy samples are available. A
fundamental approach to uncovering the manifold structure is local averaging,
which is a cornerstone of state-of-the-art provable methods for manifold
fitting and denoising. However, to the best of our knowledge, there are no
works that rigorously analyze the accuracy of local averaging in a manifold
setting in high-noise regimes. In this work, we provide theoretical analyses of
a two-round mini-batch local averaging method applied to noisy samples drawn
from a $d$-dimensional manifold $\mathcal M \subset \mathbb{R}^D$, under a
relatively high-noise regime where the noise size is comparable to the reach
$\tau$. We show that with high probability, the averaged point $\hat{\mathbf
q}$ achieves the bound $d(\hat{\mathbf q}, \mathcal M) \leq \sigma
\sqrt{d\left(1+\frac{\kappa\mathrm{diam}(\mathcal {M})}{\log(D)}\right)}$,
where $\sigma, \mathrm{diam(\mathcal M)},\kappa$ denote the standard deviation
of the Gaussian noise, manifold's diameter and a bound on its extrinsic
curvature, respectively. This is the first analysis of local averaging accuracy
over the manifold in the relatively high noise regime where $\sigma \sqrt{D}
\approx \tau$. The proposed method can serve as a preprocessing step for a wide
range of provable methods designed for lower-noise regimes. Additionally, our
framework can provide a theoretical foundation for a broad spectrum of
denoising and dimensionality reduction methods that rely on local averaging
techniques.

</details>


<div id='math-ph'></div>

# math-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [1097] [On the Relation of Exact Hydrodynamics to the Chapman--Enskog Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17441)
*Florian Kogelbauer,Ilya Karlin*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: The Chapman--Enskog series is locally valid but diverges globally, unlike the exact spectral closure which works for all Knudsen numbers.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: To understand the limitations and applicability of the Chapman--Enskog series in hydrodynamics.

Method: Comparison of the Chapman--Enskog series with the exact spectral closure on slow kinetic eigenmodes.

Result: The Chapman--Enskog series diverges outside global equilibrium, while the exact spectral closure remains valid for all Knudsen numbers.

Conclusion: The Chapman--Enskog series is locally equivalent to the exact spectral closure in the limit of vanishing Knudsen number, but diverges everywhere except at global equilibrium, whereas the exact spectrally closed hydrodynamics are globally defined for any Knudsen number.

Abstract: We demonstrate that the Chapman--Enskog series is locally equivalent to the
exact spectral closure defined on slow kinetic eigenmodes in the limit of
vanishing Knudsen number. We further show that the Chapman--Enskog series
diverges everywhere expect at the global equilibrium for an explicit example,
while the exact spectrally closed hydrodynamics are defined globally for any
Knudsen number.

</details>


### [1098] [Two-dimensional classical superintegrable systems: polynomial algebra of integrals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17519)
*A. M. Escobar-Ruiz,R. Azuaje,J. C. Gordiano*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 该论文研究了二维超可积哈密顿系统，证明了四个积分生成多项式代数，并应用于多个物理系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究二维超可积系统的代数结构，填补了不依赖可分离性或多项式积分的构造方法的空白。

Method: 通过泊松括号构造四维多项式代数，并应用于多个物理系统。

Result: 证明了积分生成多项式代数，并推导了经典轨迹的代数形式。

Conclusion: 该方法为超可积系统的代数结构提供了新的视角，并成功应用于多个物理系统。

Abstract: In this work, we investigate generic classical two-dimensional (2D)
superintegrable Hamiltonian systems H, characterized by the existence of three
functionally independent integrals of motion (I_0=H,I_1,I_2). Our main result,
formulated and proved as a theorem, establishes that the set
(I_0,I_1,I_2,I_12={I_1,I_2}) generates a four-dimensional polynomial algebra
under the Poisson bracket. Unlike previous studies, this study describes a
construction that neither depends on the additive separability of the
Hamilton-Jacobi equation nor presupposes polynomial integrals of motion in the
canonical momenta. Specifically, we prove an instrumental observation presented
in [D. Bonatsos et al., PRA 50, 3700 (1994)] concerning deformed oscillator
algebras in superintegrable systems. We apply the method to a variety of
physically relevant examples, including the Kepler system, Holt potential,
Smorodinsky-Winternitz potential, Fokas-Lagerstrom potential, the Higgs
oscillator, and the non-separable Post-Winternitz system. In several cases, we
explicitly derive the form of the classical trajectories y=y(x;I_0,I_1,I_2)
using purely algebraic means. Moreover, by examining the conditions under which
I_1=I_2=0, we identify and characterize special classes of trajectories.

</details>


### [1099] [Changing the discrete spectrum of the half-line matrix Schrödinger operator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17882)
*Tuncay Aktosun,Ricardo Weder*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 论文研究了矩阵值Schrödinger算子在离散谱变化时相关量的变换，并通过例子验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨离散谱变化对连续谱不变情况下相关量的影响，提供理论支持和实际例子。

Method: 研究了矩阵值Schrödinger算子在半直线上的一般自伴边界条件，分析了离散谱变化时相关量的变换。

Result: 提出了离散谱变化时相关量的变换方法，并通过例子验证了其有效性。

Conclusion: 论文总结了在离散谱变化时，相关量的变换方法，并通过具体例子验证了理论结果。

Abstract: We consider the matrix-valued Schr\"odinger operator on the half line with
the general selfadjoint boundary condition. When the discrete spectrum is
changed without changing the continuous spectrum, we present a review of the
transformations of the relevant quantities including the regular solution, the
Jost solution, the Jost matrix, the scattering matrix, and the boundary
matrices used to describe the selfadjoint boundary condition. The changes in
the discrete spectrum are considered when an existing bound state is removed, a
new bound state is added, and the multiplicity of a bound state is decreased or
increased without removing the bound state. We provide various explicit
examples to illustrate the theoretical resultspresented.

</details>


### [1100] [The noncommutative residue, divergence theorems and the spectral geometry functional](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18038)
*Jian Wang,Yong Wang*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 通过非交换几何方法简化散度定理证明，推广到紧致流形，并提出新的谱散度泛函。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通过非交换几何的方法简化散度定理的证明，并将其推广到更一般的流形上。

Method: 使用Dirac算子和非交换余数，以及B-代数的非交换余数。

Result: 成功证明了散度定理，并提出了新的谱散度泛函，计算了其在有（或无）边界流形上的值。

Conclusion: 本文通过Dirac算子和非交换余数给出了散度定理的简单证明，并将其扩展到具有边界的紧致流形上。此外，还提出了一些称为谱散度泛函的谱几何泛函，并计算了有（或无）边界流形的谱散度泛函。

Abstract: In this paper, a simple proof of the divergence theorem is given by using the
Dirac operator and noncommutative residues. Then we extend the divergence
theorem to compact manifolds with boundary by the noncommutative residue of the
B-algebra. Furthermore, we present some spectral geometric functionals which we
call spectral divergence functionals, and we calculate the spectral divergence
functionals of manifolds with (or without) boundary.

</details>


### [1101] [Improved geometric and recollision estimates for the invariance principle of the random Lorentz gas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18539)
*Raphael Winter,Karsten Matthies*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 通过改进随机洛伦兹气体的几何重碰撞估计，将Lutsko和Toth（2020）得到的粒子大小为r的洛伦兹气体的不变原理时间尺度T(r)从lim(r→0) T(r)r²|log(r)|²=0扩展到lim(r→0) T(r)r²|log(r)|=0，并证明这是原始结果中引入的随机过程耦合所能达到的最大时间尺度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究洛伦兹气体中粒子碰撞的时间尺度限制，探索如何通过改进几何估计来扩展不变原理的适用范围。

Method: 利用散射体的凸性改进几何重碰撞估计，获得更好的关联台球映射的分散估计，并提供额外的估计方法。

Result: 成功将时间尺度从T(r)r²|log(r)|²=0扩展到T(r)r²|log(r)|=0，并证明这是当前方法的最大极限。

Conclusion: 改进的几何估计为未来研究更复杂耦合方法以接近T(r)∼r⁻²的时间尺度提供了可能性。

Abstract: By improving geometric recollision estimates for a random Lorentz gas, we
extend the timescale $T(r)$ of the invariance principle for a Lorentz gas with
particle size $r$ obtained by Lutsko and Toth (2020) from $\lim_{r \rightarrow
0} T(r) r^{2} |\log(r)|^2 =0$ to $\lim_{r \rightarrow 0} T(r) r^{2} |\log(r)|
=0$. We show that this is the maximal reachable timescale with the coupling of
stochastic processes introduced in the original result. In our improved
geometric estimates we make use of the convexity of scatterers to obtain better
dispersive estimates for the associated billiard map. We provide additional
estimates which potentially open the possibility to reach, with a more
elaborate coupling argument, up to timescales just below of $T(r)\sim r^{-2}$
when recollision patterns of arbitrary length occur.

</details>


### [1102] [General theory of perturbation of infinite resistor networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18654)
*József Cserti,Gyula Dávid*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种高效计算扰动电阻网络中两点电阻的方法，可同时处理多键修改，适用于多种物理问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法逐次移除键计算电阻效率低，需要一种能同时处理多键修改的高效方法。

Method: 通过计算拉普拉斯算子的格林算子，直接关联两点电阻，同时处理所有键修改。

Result: 展示了多个解析和数值例子，并计算了键电流分布，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法高效且通用，适用于凝聚态物理、拓扑电子学、弹簧网络振动和随机行走等领域。

Abstract: The effective resistance between any two nodes in a perturbed resistor
network is determined by removing multiple bonds from an infinite resistor
lattice.
  We have developed an efficient method for calculating the Green operator of
the Laplacian for such perturbed networks, which is directly related to the
two-point resistance.
  Unlike the recursive techniques that remove bonds one at a time, our approach
handles all bond modifications simultaneously.
  To demonstrate the versatility of our method, several analytical and
numerical examples are presented.
  In addition, we computed bond current distributions to gain deeper insight
into the nature of resistor perturbations.
  We emphasize that our method has a broad range of applications, including
condensed matter physics describing the quantum mechanical effects of
impurities in crystal lattices, recently emerging topoelectronics, the study of
vibrations in spring networks, and problems involving random walks.

</details>


### [1103] [Advanced linear algebra](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18666)
*Teo Banica*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 本文介绍了高级线性代数的几何方面及其应用，包括基础理论、Jordan形式、正定性问题和矩阵群等内容。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在为读者提供高级线性代数的几何视角，并展示其在物理学和其他领域中的应用。

Method: 通过回顾基础线性代数、讨论Jordan形式及其应用、研究正定性问题以及探索矩阵群的结构，系统地介绍了高级线性代数的内容。

Result: 涵盖了从基础理论到高级分解、正定性问题以及矩阵群的广泛内容，并提供了实际应用的示例。

Conclusion: 本文总结了高级线性代数的几何方面及其应用，涵盖了从基础理论到高级分解、正定性问题以及矩阵群的广泛内容。

Abstract: This is an introduction to advanced linear algebra, with emphasis on
geometric aspects, and with some applications included too. We first review
basic linear algebra, notably with the spectral theorem in its general form,
and with the theory of the resultant and discriminant. Then we discuss the
Jordan form and its basic applications to physics, and other advanced
decomposition results for the matrices. We then go into positivity topics,
involving matrices and bilinear forms, and with a look into curved space-time,
and discrete Laplacians. Finally, we discuss the various groups of matrices,
with a look at reflection groups, Lie groups, spin matrices, and random
matrices.

</details>


### [1104] [ECLEIRS: Exact conservation law embedded identification of reduced states for parameterized partial differential equations from sparse and noisy data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18855)
*Aviral Prakash,Ben S. Southworth,Marc L. Klasky*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: ECLEIRS是一种新的降维状态动力学方法，能够精确满足守恒定律，即使对于未在训练过程中见过的参数，也能在稀疏和噪声数据下提供最准确的预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真模拟计算成本高，且现有降维方法在稀疏噪声数据和未见参数下无法保证满足物理守恒定律。

Method: 提出ECLEIRS方法，通过强制满足守恒定律来处理稀疏噪声数据，并预测未见参数的动力学行为。

Result: ECLEIRS在三个激波传播问题中表现最佳，能够精确满足守恒定律，而其他方法误差较大且不满足守恒定律。

Conclusion: ECLEIRS在稀疏噪声数据和未见参数下具有优越性，能够精确满足物理守恒定律，为多查询应用提供了可靠解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-query applications such as parameter estimation, uncertainty
quantification and design optimization for parameterized PDE systems are
expensive due to the high computational cost of high-fidelity simulations.
Reduced/Latent state dynamics approaches for parameterized PDEs offer a viable
method where high-fidelity data and machine learning techniques are used to
reduce the system's dimensionality and estimate the dynamics of low-dimensional
reduced states. These reduced state dynamics approaches rely on high-quality
data and struggle with highly sparse spatiotemporal noisy measurements
typically obtained from experiments. Furthermore, there is no guarantee that
these models satisfy governing physical conservation laws, especially for
parameters that are not a part of the model learning process. In this article,
we propose a reduced state dynamics approach, which we refer to as ECLEIRS,
that satisfies conservation laws exactly even for parameters unseen in the
model training process. ECLEIRS is demonstrated for two applications: 1)
obtaining clean solution signals from sparse and noisy measurements of
parametric systems, and 2) predicting dynamics for unseen system parameters. We
compare ECLEIRS with other reduced state dynamics approaches, those that do not
enforce any physical constraints and those with physics-informed loss
functions, for three shock-propagation problems: 1-D advection, 1-D Burgers and
2-D Euler equations. The numerical experiments conducted in this study
demonstrate that ECLEIRS provides the most accurate prediction of dynamics for
unseen parameters even in the presence of highly sparse and noisy data. We also
demonstrate that ECLEIRS yields solutions and fluxes that satisfy the governing
conservation law up to machine precision for unseen parameters, while the other
methods yield much higher errors and do not satisfy conservation laws.

</details>


### [1105] [Spectrum of the Laplacian in waveguide shaped surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18875)
*Diana C. S. Bello*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 研究了波导形表面上拉普拉斯算子的谱特性，确定了本质谱和离散特征值条件，并分析了断裂剪切波导形表面的特殊情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究波导形表面上拉普拉斯算子的谱特性，特别是在参考曲线切线向量有有限极限的情况下，以及断裂剪切波导形表面的特殊情况。

Method: 通过分析波导形表面的几何特性，特别是参考曲线的切线向量在无穷远处的极限，确定了拉普拉斯算子的本质谱。进一步讨论了离散特征值出现的条件，并扩展到断裂的剪切波导形表面。

Result: 确定了拉普拉斯算子在波导形表面上的本质谱，并给出了离散特征值出现的条件。断裂剪切波导形表面的拉普拉斯算子行为也得到了分析。

Conclusion: 在波导形表面上，拉普拉斯算子的本质谱可以通过参考曲线的切线向量在无穷远处的极限确定，并且在特定条件下会出现离散特征值。对于断裂的剪切波导形表面，拉普拉斯算子的行为也得到了分析。

Abstract: Let $-\Delta_{\cal S}$ be the Laplace operator in ${\cal S} \subset
\mathbb{R}^3$ on a waveguide shaped surfaces, i.e., ${\cal S}$ is built by
translating a closed curve in a constant direction along an unbounded spatial
curve. Under the condition that the tangent vector of the reference curve
admits a finite limit at infinity, we find the essential spectrum of
$-\Delta_{\cal S}$ and discuss conditions under which discrete eigenvalues
emerge. Furthermore, we analyze the Laplacian in the case of a broken sheared
waveguide shaped surface.

</details>


### [1106] [CFD Modelling and Sensitivity-Guided Design of Silicon Filament CVD Reactors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18889)
*G. P. Gakis,G. Loachamín-Suntaxi,I. G. Aviziotis,E. D. Koronaki,P. P. Filippatos,G. Chatzigiannakis,S. P. A. Bordas,D. Davazoglou,A. G. Boudouvis*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: Filament CVD for Si coatings is complex, with filament geometry and thermal gradients defining deposition regimes. Modeling reveals how temperature and flow rate shift growth dynamics, with smaller filaments and multi-filament setups significantly impacting growth rates and uniformity.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: The study aims to uncover the fundamental factors governing Si film growth on filaments, challenging the oversimplified view of filament CVD as a straightforward adaptation of planar deposition.

Method: A validated 3D CFD model was used to analyze the interplay between transport and kinetics, supplemented by global sensitivity analysis via Polynomial Chaos Expansion (PCE) and Sobol indices.

Result: Filament geometry, thermal gradients, and flow-induced buoyancy define deposition regimes (reaction-limited, transition, diffusion-limited). Reducing filament diameter can triple growth rates, and multi-filament setups reshape flow fields and thermal asymmetries.

Conclusion: Filament-based CVD for Si coatings is governed by complex interactions between transport phenomena and reaction kinetics, which are not merely adaptations of planar deposition. Understanding these interactions through modeling is crucial for optimizing growth rates and uniformity.

Abstract: Filament-based chemical vapor deposition (CVD) for silicon (Si) coatings is
often treated as a straightforward adaptation of planar deposition, just with a
cylindrical substrate. But this overlooks a fundamental shift in how transport
phenomena and reaction kinetics interact. In filament CVD, the filament is not
just a substrate; it is the dominant heat source and flow disruptor all in one.
In this work, we ask: What really governs Si film growth on filaments? Using a
validated three-dimensional computational fluid dynamics (CFD) model, we show
that filament geometry, thermal gradients, and flow-induced buoyancy do not
merely affect uniformity -- they define the very regimes (reaction-limited,
transition, diffusion-limited) in which deposition occurs. Our model, validated
against three independent experimental studies (R-squared = 0.969), reveals how
temperature, flow rate, and reactor layout fundamentally shift the growth
dynamics. We show that reducing filament diameter from 2 mm to 500 microns does
not just increase local surface area -- it can triple growth rates (up to
approximately 39 microns per minute), but only in carefully tuned
high-temperature regimes. Similarly, multi-filament setups do not simply scale
deposition, they reshape flow fields and compound thermal asymmetries,
sometimes improving uniformity, other times worsening it. These effects are not
evident without modeling the interplay between transport and kinetics,
something experiments alone cannot resolve. To bridge physical understanding
with design actionability, we apply global sensitivity analysis via Polynomial
Chaos Expansion (PCE) and Sobol indices. These reveal how in reaction-limited
regimes, temperature dominates; in diffusion-limited regimes, reactant
transport takes over.

</details>


### [1107] [On the Relation of Exact Hydrodynamics to the Chapman--Enskog Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17441)
*Florian Kogelbauer,Ilya Karlin*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: The Chapman--Enskog series is locally valid but diverges globally, unlike the exact spectral closure which works for any Knudsen number.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: To understand the limitations and applicability of the Chapman--Enskog series in hydrodynamics.

Method: Comparison of the Chapman--Enskog series with the exact spectral closure on slow kinetic eigenmodes.

Result: The Chapman--Enskog series diverges outside global equilibrium, while the exact spectral closure is globally valid.

Conclusion: The Chapman--Enskog series is locally equivalent to the exact spectral closure in the limit of vanishing Knudsen number, but diverges everywhere except at global equilibrium, whereas the exact spectrally closed hydrodynamics remain valid globally for any Knudsen number.

Abstract: We demonstrate that the Chapman--Enskog series is locally equivalent to the
exact spectral closure defined on slow kinetic eigenmodes in the limit of
vanishing Knudsen number. We further show that the Chapman--Enskog series
diverges everywhere expect at the global equilibrium for an explicit example,
while the exact spectrally closed hydrodynamics are defined globally for any
Knudsen number.

</details>


### [1108] [Two-dimensional classical superintegrable systems: polynomial algebra of integrals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17519)
*A. M. Escobar-Ruiz,R. Azuaje,J. C. Gordiano*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 该论文研究了二维超可积哈密顿系统，证明了其生成四维多项式代数，并应用于多个物理系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索超可积系统的代数结构，不依赖于传统假设。

Method: 通过泊松括号构造四维多项式代数，并应用于具体物理系统。

Result: 证明了超可积系统生成四维多项式代数，并推导了经典轨迹。

Conclusion: 该方法为超可积系统的研究提供了新的代数工具，适用于多种物理系统。

Abstract: In this work, we investigate generic classical two-dimensional (2D)
superintegrable Hamiltonian systems H, characterized by the existence of three
functionally independent integrals of motion (I_0=H,I_1,I_2). Our main result,
formulated and proved as a theorem, establishes that the set
(I_0,I_1,I_2,I_12={I_1,I_2}) generates a four-dimensional polynomial algebra
under the Poisson bracket. Unlike previous studies, this study describes a
construction that neither depends on the additive separability of the
Hamilton-Jacobi equation nor presupposes polynomial integrals of motion in the
canonical momenta. Specifically, we prove an instrumental observation presented
in [D. Bonatsos et al., PRA 50, 3700 (1994)] concerning deformed oscillator
algebras in superintegrable systems. We apply the method to a variety of
physically relevant examples, including the Kepler system, Holt potential,
Smorodinsky-Winternitz potential, Fokas-Lagerstrom potential, the Higgs
oscillator, and the non-separable Post-Winternitz system. In several cases, we
explicitly derive the form of the classical trajectories y=y(x;I_0,I_1,I_2)
using purely algebraic means. Moreover, by examining the conditions under which
I_1=I_2=0, we identify and characterize special classes of trajectories.

</details>


### [1109] [Changing the discrete spectrum of the half-line matrix Schrödinger operator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17882)
*Tuncay Aktosun,Ricardo Weder*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 研究了矩阵值薛定谔算子在离散谱变化时相关量的变换，并通过示例验证了理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨离散谱变化对连续谱不变情况下相关量的影响，以深化对自伴边界条件下矩阵值薛定谔算子的理解。

Method: 通过分析矩阵值薛定谔算子在半直线上的自伴边界条件，研究了离散谱变化对正则解、Jost解、Jost矩阵、散射矩阵和边界矩阵的影响。

Result: 提出了离散谱变化（如移除或增加束缚态、改变束缚态多重性）时相关量的变换方法，并通过示例验证了理论。

Conclusion: 本文总结了在离散谱变化时，相关量的变换情况，并通过具体示例验证了理论结果。

Abstract: We consider the matrix-valued Schr\"odinger operator on the half line with
the general selfadjoint boundary condition. When the discrete spectrum is
changed without changing the continuous spectrum, we present a review of the
transformations of the relevant quantities including the regular solution, the
Jost solution, the Jost matrix, the scattering matrix, and the boundary
matrices used to describe the selfadjoint boundary condition. The changes in
the discrete spectrum are considered when an existing bound state is removed, a
new bound state is added, and the multiplicity of a bound state is decreased or
increased without removing the bound state. We provide various explicit
examples to illustrate the theoretical resultspresented.

</details>


### [1110] [The noncommutative residue, divergence theorems and the spectral geometry functional](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18038)
*Jian Wang,Yong Wang*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 本文通过狄拉克算子和非交换余数给出了散度定理的简单证明，并将其扩展到带边界的紧流形，同时提出了谱散度泛函并计算了其值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究散度定理在非交换几何和谱几何中的扩展和应用。

Method: 使用狄拉克算子、非交换余数和B-代数的方法。

Result: 证明了散度定理在带边界紧流形上的扩展，并计算了谱散度泛函的值。

Conclusion: 该方法为非交换几何和谱几何中的散度定理提供了新的视角和应用。

Abstract: In this paper, a simple proof of the divergence theorem is given by using the
Dirac operator and noncommutative residues. Then we extend the divergence
theorem to compact manifolds with boundary by the noncommutative residue of the
B-algebra. Furthermore, we present some spectral geometric functionals which we
call spectral divergence functionals, and we calculate the spectral divergence
functionals of manifolds with (or without) boundary.

</details>


### [1111] [Improved geometric and recollision estimates for the invariance principle of the random Lorentz gas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18539)
*Raphael Winter,Karsten Matthies*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 通过改进几何重碰撞估计，扩展了洛伦兹气体的不变性原理的时间尺度，并探索了更长时间尺度的可能性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 改进随机洛伦兹气体的几何重碰撞估计，以扩展不变性原理的时间尺度，并探索更长时间尺度的可能性。

Method: 利用散射体的凸性来获得更好的关联弹球图的分散估计，并提供了额外的估计，为通过更复杂的耦合论证达到接近T(r)∼r⁻²的时间尺度提供了可能性。

Result: 将时间尺度从lim_{r→0} T(r) r² |log(r)|² =0扩展到lim_{r→0} T(r) r² |log(r)| =0，并表明这是当前方法的最大时间尺度。

Conclusion: 通过改进随机洛伦兹气体的几何重碰撞估计，将Lutsko和Toth（2020）得到的粒子大小为r的洛伦兹气体的不变性原理的时间尺度T(r)从lim_{r→0} T(r) r² |log(r)|² =0扩展到lim_{r→0} T(r) r² |log(r)| =0。这表明这是通过原始结果中引入的随机过程耦合可以达到的最大时间尺度。

Abstract: By improving geometric recollision estimates for a random Lorentz gas, we
extend the timescale $T(r)$ of the invariance principle for a Lorentz gas with
particle size $r$ obtained by Lutsko and Toth (2020) from $\lim_{r \rightarrow
0} T(r) r^{2} |\log(r)|^2 =0$ to $\lim_{r \rightarrow 0} T(r) r^{2} |\log(r)|
=0$. We show that this is the maximal reachable timescale with the coupling of
stochastic processes introduced in the original result. In our improved
geometric estimates we make use of the convexity of scatterers to obtain better
dispersive estimates for the associated billiard map. We provide additional
estimates which potentially open the possibility to reach, with a more
elaborate coupling argument, up to timescales just below of $T(r)\sim r^{-2}$
when recollision patterns of arbitrary length occur.

</details>


### [1112] [General theory of perturbation of infinite resistor networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18654)
*József Cserti,Gyula Dávid*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 提出了一种高效计算扰动电阻网络中两点电阻的方法，能够同时处理所有键修改，适用于多种物理问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究扰动电阻网络中两点电阻的计算方法，以解决传统递归技术效率低下的问题。

Method: 开发了一种计算拉普拉斯算子的格林函数的高效方法，直接关联两点电阻，同时处理所有键修改。

Result: 通过解析和数值示例验证了方法的有效性，并计算了键电流分布以深入理解电阻扰动的性质。

Conclusion: 该方法在凝聚态物理、拓扑电子学、弹簧网络振动和随机游走等领域具有广泛应用前景。

Abstract: The effective resistance between any two nodes in a perturbed resistor
network is determined by removing multiple bonds from an infinite resistor
lattice.
  We have developed an efficient method for calculating the Green operator of
the Laplacian for such perturbed networks, which is directly related to the
two-point resistance.
  Unlike the recursive techniques that remove bonds one at a time, our approach
handles all bond modifications simultaneously.
  To demonstrate the versatility of our method, several analytical and
numerical examples are presented.
  In addition, we computed bond current distributions to gain deeper insight
into the nature of resistor perturbations.
  We emphasize that our method has a broad range of applications, including
condensed matter physics describing the quantum mechanical effects of
impurities in crystal lattices, recently emerging topoelectronics, the study of
vibrations in spring networks, and problems involving random walks.

</details>


### [1113] [Advanced linear algebra](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18666)
*Teo Banica*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 这是一篇关于高级线性代数的介绍，重点讨论几何方面，并包含一些应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 介绍高级线性代数，特别是几何方面的内容，并展示其应用。

Method: 首先回顾基础线性代数，包括谱定理、判别式和结果理论；然后讨论Jordan形式及其在物理中的应用；接着探讨矩阵的正性主题和离散Laplacians；最后讨论矩阵群，如反射群、李群和随机矩阵。

Result: 涵盖了从基础到高级的线性代数内容，并展示了其在物理和其他领域的应用。

Conclusion: 该论文全面介绍了高级线性代数的几何方面及其应用，为读者提供了深入的理论和实际应用视角。

Abstract: This is an introduction to advanced linear algebra, with emphasis on
geometric aspects, and with some applications included too. We first review
basic linear algebra, notably with the spectral theorem in its general form,
and with the theory of the resultant and discriminant. Then we discuss the
Jordan form and its basic applications to physics, and other advanced
decomposition results for the matrices. We then go into positivity topics,
involving matrices and bilinear forms, and with a look into curved space-time,
and discrete Laplacians. Finally, we discuss the various groups of matrices,
with a look at reflection groups, Lie groups, spin matrices, and random
matrices.

</details>


### [1114] [ECLEIRS: Exact conservation law embedded identification of reduced states for parameterized partial differential equations from sparse and noisy data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18855)
*Aviral Prakash,Ben S. Southworth,Marc L. Klasky*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: ECLEIRS是一种新的降维状态动力学方法，能够精确满足守恒定律，即使在未见参数下也能处理稀疏和噪声数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真模拟计算成本高，且现有降维方法在稀疏噪声数据和未见参数下无法保证物理守恒定律的满足。

Method: 提出ECLEIRS方法，通过精确满足守恒定律来处理稀疏噪声数据并预测未见参数下的动力学。

Result: ECLEIRS在稀疏噪声数据和未见参数下表现最佳，且满足守恒定律至机器精度。

Conclusion: ECLEIRS在降维状态动力学中具有显著优势，尤其在处理未见参数和噪声数据时表现优异。

Abstract: Multi-query applications such as parameter estimation, uncertainty
quantification and design optimization for parameterized PDE systems are
expensive due to the high computational cost of high-fidelity simulations.
Reduced/Latent state dynamics approaches for parameterized PDEs offer a viable
method where high-fidelity data and machine learning techniques are used to
reduce the system's dimensionality and estimate the dynamics of low-dimensional
reduced states. These reduced state dynamics approaches rely on high-quality
data and struggle with highly sparse spatiotemporal noisy measurements
typically obtained from experiments. Furthermore, there is no guarantee that
these models satisfy governing physical conservation laws, especially for
parameters that are not a part of the model learning process. In this article,
we propose a reduced state dynamics approach, which we refer to as ECLEIRS,
that satisfies conservation laws exactly even for parameters unseen in the
model training process. ECLEIRS is demonstrated for two applications: 1)
obtaining clean solution signals from sparse and noisy measurements of
parametric systems, and 2) predicting dynamics for unseen system parameters. We
compare ECLEIRS with other reduced state dynamics approaches, those that do not
enforce any physical constraints and those with physics-informed loss
functions, for three shock-propagation problems: 1-D advection, 1-D Burgers and
2-D Euler equations. The numerical experiments conducted in this study
demonstrate that ECLEIRS provides the most accurate prediction of dynamics for
unseen parameters even in the presence of highly sparse and noisy data. We also
demonstrate that ECLEIRS yields solutions and fluxes that satisfy the governing
conservation law up to machine precision for unseen parameters, while the other
methods yield much higher errors and do not satisfy conservation laws.

</details>


### [1115] [Spectrum of the Laplacian in waveguide shaped surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18875)
*Diana C. S. Bello*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: The paper analyzes the Laplace operator on waveguide-shaped surfaces, identifying its essential spectrum and conditions for discrete eigenvalues, with extensions to broken sheared surfaces.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: The motivation is to understand the spectral properties of the Laplace operator on complex geometric structures like waveguide-shaped surfaces, which have applications in physics and engineering.

Method: The study employs mathematical analysis of the Laplace operator on waveguide-shaped surfaces, focusing on the behavior of the tangent vector of the reference curve and its limit at infinity.

Result: The essential spectrum of the Laplace operator is identified under given conditions, and the emergence of discrete eigenvalues is discussed. The analysis is extended to broken sheared waveguide-shaped surfaces.

Conclusion: The paper concludes that under specific conditions, the essential spectrum of the Laplace operator on waveguide-shaped surfaces can be determined, and discrete eigenvalues may emerge. It also extends the analysis to broken sheared waveguide-shaped surfaces.

Abstract: Let $-\Delta_{\cal S}$ be the Laplace operator in ${\cal S} \subset
\mathbb{R}^3$ on a waveguide shaped surfaces, i.e., ${\cal S}$ is built by
translating a closed curve in a constant direction along an unbounded spatial
curve. Under the condition that the tangent vector of the reference curve
admits a finite limit at infinity, we find the essential spectrum of
$-\Delta_{\cal S}$ and discuss conditions under which discrete eigenvalues
emerge. Furthermore, we analyze the Laplacian in the case of a broken sheared
waveguide shaped surface.

</details>


### [1116] [CFD Modelling and Sensitivity-Guided Design of Silicon Filament CVD Reactors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18889)
*G. P. Gakis,G. Loachamín-Suntaxi,I. G. Aviziotis,E. D. Koronaki,P. P. Filippatos,G. Chatzigiannakis,S. P. A. Bordas,D. Davazoglou,A. G. Boudouvis*

Main category: math-ph

TL;DR: 研究发现，在硅涂层的丝状化学气相沉积（CVD）中，丝状几何形状、热梯度和流动诱导浮力不仅影响均匀性，还定义了沉积发生的机制（反应限制、过渡、扩散限制）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上，丝状CVD被视为平面沉积的简单适应，忽略了丝状基底作为主导热源和流动干扰者的双重作用。

Method: 使用经过验证的三维计算流体动力学（CFD）模型，结合全局敏感性分析（多项式混沌展开和Sobol指数）。

Result: 减小丝状直径可以显著提高生长速率（最高达39微米/分钟），但仅限于高温条件下；多丝设置会重塑流场和热不对称性。

Conclusion: 丝状CVD的沉积机制由温度和反应物输运共同决定，需要通过建模来理解其复杂的相互作用。

Abstract: Filament-based chemical vapor deposition (CVD) for silicon (Si) coatings is
often treated as a straightforward adaptation of planar deposition, just with a
cylindrical substrate. But this overlooks a fundamental shift in how transport
phenomena and reaction kinetics interact. In filament CVD, the filament is not
just a substrate; it is the dominant heat source and flow disruptor all in one.
In this work, we ask: What really governs Si film growth on filaments? Using a
validated three-dimensional computational fluid dynamics (CFD) model, we show
that filament geometry, thermal gradients, and flow-induced buoyancy do not
merely affect uniformity -- they define the very regimes (reaction-limited,
transition, diffusion-limited) in which deposition occurs. Our model, validated
against three independent experimental studies (R-squared = 0.969), reveals how
temperature, flow rate, and reactor layout fundamentally shift the growth
dynamics. We show that reducing filament diameter from 2 mm to 500 microns does
not just increase local surface area -- it can triple growth rates (up to
approximately 39 microns per minute), but only in carefully tuned
high-temperature regimes. Similarly, multi-filament setups do not simply scale
deposition, they reshape flow fields and compound thermal asymmetries,
sometimes improving uniformity, other times worsening it. These effects are not
evident without modeling the interplay between transport and kinetics,
something experiments alone cannot resolve. To bridge physical understanding
with design actionability, we apply global sensitivity analysis via Polynomial
Chaos Expansion (PCE) and Sobol indices. These reveal how in reaction-limited
regimes, temperature dominates; in diffusion-limited regimes, reactant
transport takes over.

</details>


<div id='physics.flu-dyn'></div>

# physics.flu-dyn [[Back]](#toc)

### [1117] [Relationship between unpredictability and intermittency in shell models of turbulence and experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17278)
*Ewen Frogé,Carlos Granero-Belinchon,Stéphane G. Roux,Thierry Chonavel,Nicolas B. Garnier*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 研究湍流速度信号的可预测性，发现小尺度极端事件导致预测性能下降，并建立了可预测性损失与湍流间歇性的统计联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨湍流速度信号的可预测性，特别是极端事件对小尺度预测性能的影响。

Method: 使用概率类比预测方法研究湍流速度信号的可预测性，并分析了Gledzer-Ohkitani-Yamada (GOY)壳模型和实验测量数据。

Result: 发现小尺度的极端速度事件会导致预测性能下降和不确定性增加，且可预测性从大尺度到小尺度系统性降低。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明，湍流中的可预测性从大尺度到小尺度系统性降低，并建立了跨尺度可预测性损失与湍流间歇性之间的统计联系。

Abstract: We study the predictability of turbulent velocity signals using probabilistic
analog-forecasting. Here, predictability is defined by the accuracy of
forecasts and the associated uncertainties. We study the
Gledzer-Ohkitani-Yamada (GOY) shell model of turbulence as well as experimental
measurements from a fully developed turbulent flow. In both cases, we identify
the extreme values of velocity at small scales as localized unpredictable
events that lead to a loss of predictability: worse predictions and increase of
their uncertainties. The GOY model, with its explicit scale separation, allows
to evaluate the prediction performance at individual scales, and so to better
relate the intensity of extreme events and the loss of forecast performance.
Results show that predictability decreases systematically from large to small
scales. These findings establish a statistical connection between
predictability loss across scales and intermittency in turbulent flows.

</details>


### [1118] [Inferring viscoplastic models from velocity fields: a physics-informed neural network approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17681)
*Martin Lardy,Sham Tlili,Simon Gsell*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于物理信息神经网络（PINN）的框架，直接从流速场数据中推断流变学定律，并在合成数据上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统流变测量方法难以捕捉复杂、三维且异质的流体行为，尤其是在系统尺寸、边界条件和材料特定约束下。

Method: 使用神经网络插值流速场，通过自动微分计算速度梯度，并联合优化本构模型和流速场表示，最小化物理残差和观测数据差异。

Result: 算法能够可靠地推断流变参数，即使在显著噪声存在的情况下，并分析了流动几何和采样对推断性能的影响。

Conclusion: PINNs在流变学定律推断中具有潜力，特别是在模型无关的推断和候选模型选择方面。

Abstract: Fluid-like materials are ubiquitous, spanning from living biological tissues
to geological formations, and across scales ranging from micrometers to
kilometers. Inferring their rheological properties remains a major challenge,
particularly when traditional rheometry fails to capture their complex,
three-dimensional, and often heterogeneous behavior. This difficulty is
exacerbated by system size, boundary conditions, and other material-specific
physical, chemical, or thermal constraints. In this work, we explore whether
rheological laws can be inferred directly from flow observations. We propose a
physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework designed to learn constitutive
viscoplastic laws from velocity field data alone. Our method uses a neural
network to interpolate the velocity field, enabling the computation of velocity
gradients via automatic differentiation. These gradients are used to estimate
the residuals of the governing conservation laws, which implicitly depend on
the unknown rheology. We jointly optimize both the constitutive model and the
velocity field representation by minimizing the physical residuals and
discrepancies from observed data. We validate our approach on synthetic
velocity fields generated from numerical simulations using Herschel-Bulkley,
Carreau and Panastasiou models under various flow conditions. The algorithm
reliably infers rheological parameters, even in the presence of significant
noise. We analyze the dependence of inference performance on flow geometry and
sampling, highlighting the importance of shear rate distribution in the
dataset. Finally, we explore preliminary strategies for model-agnostic
inference via embedded model selection, demonstrating the potential of PINNs
for identifying the most suitable rheological law from candidate models.

</details>


### [1119] [Growth rate and energy dissipation in wind-forced breaking waves](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17802)
*Nicolò Scapin,Jiarong Wu,J. Thomas Farrar,Bertrand Chapron,Stéphane Popinet,Luc Deike*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 通过数值模拟研究了风强迫破碎波的能量增长和耗散，发现波增长速率与风摩擦速度平方成正比，破碎耗散遵循惯性标度律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究风强迫破碎波的能量增长和耗散过程，以理解波场在风作用下的动态行为。

Method: 采用直接数值模拟方法，耦合空气-水Navier-Stokes方程，分析风摩擦速度与波速比$u_*/c$对波场的影响。

Result: 波增长速率与$(u_*/c)^2$成正比，受波陡度调节；破碎过程中的能量耗散遵循惯性标度律，近表面湍流耗散剖面符合$z^{-1}$标度。

Conclusion: 研究通过直接数值模拟揭示了风强迫破碎波的能量增长和耗散机制，确认了破碎过程中能量耗散的普遍性。

Abstract: We investigate the energy growth and dissipation of wind-forced breaking
waves using direct numerical simulations of the coupled air-water Navier-Stokes
equations. We vary the wind friction velocity over the wave speed $u_\ast/c$ up
to 1. A turbulent wind boundary layer drives the growth of a pre-existing
narrowband wave field until it breaks and transfers energy into the water
column. Under sustained wind forcing, the wave field then resumes growth. We
separately analyze energy transfers during wave growth and breaking-induced
dissipation. Energy transfers are dominated by pressure input during growth and
turbulent dissipation during breaking. The wave growth rate scales with
$(u_\ast/c)^2$, modulated by the wave steepness due to sheltering. The energy
dissipation follows the inertial scaling with wave slope at breaking,
confirming the universality of the process. Following breaking, near-surface
vertical turbulence dissipation profiles scale as $z^{-1}$, with its magnitude
controlled by the breaking-induced dissipation.

</details>


### [1120] [IRENE: a fluId layeR finitE-elemeNt softwarE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17827)
*Dennis Wörthmuller,Gaetano Ferraro,Pierre Sens,Michele Castellana*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: IRENE是一个有限元软件库，用于数值求解二维粘性流体层在多物理尺度下的稳态和动态问题，适用于多种物理机制和复杂几何形状。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个能够处理多种物理机制（如低雷诺数和湍流）和复杂几何形状的流体层模拟工具，以解决生物膜和宏观气流等实际问题。

Method: 采用有限元方法，结合多物理尺度建模，处理流体层的平面流动、变形、表面张力和弹性响应等耦合问题。

Result: IRENE能够准确模拟已知的解析和数值结果，并在生物膜和宏观气流等应用中展示了其强大的功能。

Conclusion: IRENE是一个功能强大且灵活的软件库，适用于多种流体层模拟问题，具有广泛的应用潜力。

Abstract: We present a finite-element software library, IRENE, for numerically solving
the steady state and dynamics of a two-dimensional viscous fluid layer embedded
in three-dimensional space, on multiple physical scales. The library is
designed to handle a wide range of physical regimes -- both low-Reynolds-number
and turbulent ones -- and geometries, capturing the coupling between in-plane
flows, out-of-plane deformations, surface tension, and elastic response. In
addition, the software can treat complex geometries, including those with
intra-layer obstacles or arbitrary layer boundaries. We validate IRENE against
known analytical and numerical results and demonstrate its capabilities through
examples relevant to biological membranes and macroscopic air flows.

</details>


### [1121] [The dominant role of jetting in micron- and sub-micron sea spray produced by bubble bursting: a revised model and comparison with measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17836)
*Alfonso M. Ganan-Calvo,Miguel A. Herrada,Jose M. Lopez-Herrera*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 该研究通过物理原理和数值模拟，证明了喷射液滴在亚微米海喷雾气溶胶生成中的主导作用，并构建了一个高度准确的全球预测模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决关于亚微米海喷雾气溶胶（SSA）生成机制（薄膜液滴与喷射液滴竞争）的激烈争议。

Method: 通过物理尺度和数值模拟排除了薄膜液滴机制的主导作用，构建了一个全面的全球概率分布函数（PDF），包括改进气泡大小分布和推导液滴数量与大小分布模型。

Result: 模型在25纳米至2.5微米范围内表现出极高的预测准确性，与实验数据几乎完全吻合。

Conclusion: 该研究通过建立基于物理原理的模型，显著提高了对海洋气溶胶生成机制的理解，并为气候和大气化学模型提供了更准确的基础。

Abstract: The primary physical mechanism governing the production of sub-micron sea
spray aerosols (SSA) -- specifically the competition between film and jet
droplets from bubble bursting -- has remained a subject of intense debate. This
work presents a revised, first-principles model that establishes the
overwhelming dominance of jetting for producing micron and sub-micron aerosols.
Our approach first rules out the film droplet mechanism as a primary
contributor for this size range by demonstrating through physical scaling and
numerical simulations that the final average ejected volume of sub-micron
droplets is much smaller than that from jetting. A comprehensive global
probability distribution function (PDF) for SSA is constructed by rigorously
modeling its fundamental components in sequence: (i) refining the sub-surface
bubble size distribution with a simpler and better experimentally supported
exponential law, and (ii) deriving consistent number and size distribution
models of droplets per bursting event from an ample set of high-resolution
numerical simulations. The droplet size PDF from a single bubble follows a
highly-skewed distribution -- optimally modeled by a Generalized Inverse
Gaussian distribution -- revealing the production of nanometric droplets
previously unaccounted for by simpler models. When integrated, these components
yield a final predictive model for the global SSA size distribution, with
parameters derived directly from physical principles and simulations rather
than empirical fitting. The model demonstrates extraordinary predictive
accuracy, aligning almost perfectly with experimental data from both laboratory
and oceanic measurements, in particular across the critical 25 nm to 2.5 $\mu$m
range. This research significantly enhances the fundamental understanding of
marine aerosol generation and provides a more accurate foundation for climate
and atmospheric chemistry models.

</details>


### [1122] [Basal layer of granular flow down smooth and rough inclines: kinematics, slip laws and rheology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17920)
*Teng Wang,Lu Jing,Fiona C. Y. Kwok,Yuri D. Sobral,Thomas Weinhart,Anthony R. Thornton*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 研究通过离散元模拟发现颗粒流在光滑和粗糙斜面上的基底层动力学特性，提出了基底滑移定律，并揭示了其流变特性不符合μ(I)理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究颗粒流在光滑或不足够粗糙斜面上的基底滑移现象及其动力学特性，以填补局部流变学无法预测的空白。

Method: 采用离散元方法模拟研究了光滑和粗糙斜面上颗粒流的基底层详细动力学。通过无量纲参数Ra控制粗糙度，从0（平坦摩擦面）到接近1（非常粗糙面）系统变化。

Result: 识别了三种流动状态：滑移状态（Ra≲0.45）、无滑移状态（Ra≳0.6）和中间过渡状态。在滑移状态下，基底层的运动学特性与Bagnold剖面显著偏离。提出了通用的基底滑移定律，并发现基底层厚度对流动条件不敏感，但对颗粒间恢复系数有一定依赖性。

Conclusion: 研究发现，基底层的流变特性不遵循μ(I)流变学，而是符合Bagnold应力标度和扩展的颗粒流动力学理论。这些发现有助于未来开发更具预测性的颗粒流模型。

Abstract: Granular flow down an inclined plane is ubiquitous in geophysical and
industrial applications. On rough inclines, the flow exhibits Bagnold's
velocity profile and follows the so-called $\mu(I)$ local rheology. On
insufficiently rough or smooth inclines, however, velocity slip occurs at the
bottom and a basal layer with strong agitation emerges below the bulk, which is
not predicted by the local rheology. Here, we use discrete element method
simulations to study detailed dynamics of the basal layer in granular flows
down both smooth and rough inclines. We control the roughness via a
dimensionless parameter, $R_a$, varied systematically from 0 (flat, frictional
plane) to near 1 (very rough plane). Three flow regimes are identified: a slip
regime ($R_a \lesssim 0.45$) where a dilated basal layer appears, a no-slip
regime ($R_a \gtrsim 0.6$) and an intermediate transition regime. In the slip
regime, the kinematics profiles (velocity, shear rate and granular temperature)
of the basal layer strongly deviate from Bagnold's profiles. General basal slip
laws are developed which express the slip velocity as a function of the local
shear rate (or granular temperature), base roughness and slope angle. Moreover,
the basal layer thickness is insensitive to flow conditions but depends
somewhat on the inter-particle coefficient of restitution. Finally, we show
that the rheological properties of the basal layer do not follow the $\mu(I)$
rheology, but are captured by Bagnold's stress scaling and an extended kinetic
theory for granular flows. Our findings can help develop more predictive
granular flow models in the future.

</details>


### [1123] [Size distribution of decaying foam bubbles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18049)
*Ildoo Kim*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 论文通过随机事件模型研究泡沫气泡的稳定性，发现气泡体积随时间呈指数衰减，且较大气泡的平均寿命较短。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统研究关注重力导致的薄膜排水机制，本文采用随机事件模型研究气泡破裂的动态过程。

Method: 通过摇动不同浓度的肥皂溶液制备气泡层，利用延时视频成像技术监测气泡尺寸分布随时间的变化。

Result: 气泡总体积随时间呈指数衰减，较大气泡的平均寿命比小气泡短约2倍。

Conclusion: 气泡破裂的动态过程可通过随机事件模型描述，气泡尺寸对其寿命有显著影响。

Abstract: The most studies on the stability of foam bubbles investigated the mechanical
stability of thin films between bubbles due to the drainage by gravity. In the
current work, we take an alternative approach by assuming the rupture of
bubbles as a series of random events and by investigating the time evolution of
the size distribution of foam bubbles over a long time up to several hours. For
this purpose, we first prepared layers of bubbles on Petri dishes by shaking
soap solutions of a few different concentrations, and then we monitored the
Petri dishes by using a time-lapse video imaging technique. We analyzed the
captured images by custom software to count the bubble size distribution with
respect to the initial concentration and elapsed time. From the statistics on
our data, we find that the total bubble volume decreases exponentially in time,
and the exponent, i.e. the mean lifetime, is a function of the bubble size. The
mean lifetimes of larger bubbles are observed to be shorter than those of
smaller bubbles, by approximately a factor of 2.

</details>


### [1124] [The mechanism of tornadogenesis from the perspective of vortex tubes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18222)
*Peng Yue,Y. Charles Li,Jiamin Dang,Leigh Orf,Grace Yan*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于涡管和开尔文-亥姆霍兹定理的龙卷风生成新理论，解释了龙卷风从形成到消亡的全过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有理论对龙卷风生成和消亡的解释不够全面，需要从涡管和压力差的角度提出新理论。

Method: 基于开尔文-亥姆霍兹定理，分析涡管内部的涡度变化与压力差的关系。

Result: 压力差足够大时，涡管内部的涡度达到龙卷风级别；压力差变化直接影响龙卷风强度。

Conclusion: 龙卷风的生成、强度和消亡均由压力差驱动，这一理论完整解释了龙卷风的生命周期。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a new theory on tornadogenesis from the perspective
of vortex tubes based on Kelvin-Helmholtz Theorems. When the pressure
difference between the lowest pressure line from the wall cloud down to the
ground and its surroundings is large enough, the increase of vorticity inside
the squeezed vortex tube can reach the tornado level, and thus a tornado is
born. When the pressure difference increases, the tornado strength increases.
When the pressure difference decreases, the tornado strength decreases. The
decay of tornadoes is caused by the decreasing pressure difference. This is our
theory of the entire tornado lifespan.

</details>


### [1125] [Vortex ring induced by a disk translating toward or away from a wall](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18597)
*Joanne Steiner,Cyprien Morize,Ivan Delbende,Alban Sauret,Philippe Gondret*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: The paper studies vortex rings near walls, finding circulation increases for disk motion in both directions, but wall effects on core radius vary. Scaling laws are established for bounded cases.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: The research aims to understand how vortex rings evolve near solid boundaries, specifically focusing on the influence of disk motion direction and control parameters on vortex dynamics.

Method: The study combines experimental techniques (Particle Image Velocimetry) and numerical simulations (using the flow solver Basilisk) to analyze vortex rings generated by disk motion.

Result: Results show that vortex circulation increases for both motion directions, while the wall's effect on core radius depends on the disk's motion. Scaling laws are derived to describe maximum circulation and core size as functions of control parameters.

Conclusion: The study concludes that the presence of a wall significantly influences vortex dynamics, with distinct effects on circulation and core radius depending on the disk's motion direction. Scaling laws are established to describe these dynamics near solid boundaries, differing from unbounded cases.

Abstract: This study investigates the time evolution of vortex rings generated by the
normal translation of a disk either toward or away from a wall. We
systematically vary the control parameters, including the disk size, stroke
length, travel time, and distance from the wall, to analyze their influence on
vortex dynamics. Experiments are conducted with Particle Image Velocimetry,
while numerical simulations are performed using the flow solver Basilisk. The
circulation and core radius are used as primary metrics to describe the
properties of the vortex ring. A quantitative agreement is observed between the
experimental and the numerical results. Both approaches reveal that the vortex
circulation increases for disk motions in either direction, toward or away from
the wall. However, the effect of the bottom wall on the vortex core radius
differs depending on the motion of the disk. The presence of the wall increases
the core radius only when the disk moves toward the wall, while no significant
effect is observed for a translation away from the wall. Furthermore, we
establish scaling laws to describe the maximum circulation and core size of the
vortex ring as a function of the control parameters: the disk diameter, the
typical time and stroke length of its motion, and the minimal distance from the
wall. These scalings, which differ from the unbounded case, contribute to a
deeper understanding of vortex dynamics in the vicinity of solid boundaries.

</details>


### [1126] [The Full Nonlinear Vortex Tube-Vorton Method: the post-stall condition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18719)
*Pimentel-Garcia Jesus Carlos,Jimenez-Ponce Luis Antonio*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: FTVM方法成功应用于薄体分离流动研究，改进了Kutta-Zhukovski力计算，提出了一种新的力计算方法，简化了低速空气动力学理解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究薄体分离流动时，Kutta-Zhukovski方法无法捕捉后失速状态下的形状阻力，需要替代方法。

Method: 采用基于涡量和速度概念的低阶、低离散化数值方法，避免讨论压力作用。

Result: 该方法能准确近似复杂尾流动力学，简化了低速空气动力学的理解。

Conclusion: FTVM方法通过回归基本原理，简化了复杂低速空气动力学的研究，避免了压力作用的讨论。

Abstract: The original concepts behind The Full Nonlinear Vortex Tube-Vorton Method
(FTVM) have been applied to the study of massively separated fluid flow past a
thin body. In the pre-stall condition, the Kutta-Zhukovski (KJ) force
calculation was successfully implemented. However, for the post-stall
condition, this approach is not capable of capturing the form drag component.
Thus, an alternative force calculation method is implemented. The results
obtained demonstrate that the fluid motion involving complex wake dynamics can
be accurately approximated by a low-order, low-discretization numerical method
based purely on vorticity and velocity concepts. This method avoids the need to
discuss and speculate about the role of pressure on fluid motion, even in the
turbulent regime. Consequently, it simplifies the understanding of complex
low-speed aerodynamics by returning to the first principles.

</details>


### [1127] [Relationship between unpredictability and intermittency in shell models of turbulence and experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17278)
*Ewen Frogé,Carlos Granero-Belinchon,Stéphane G. Roux,Thierry Chonavel,Nicolas B. Garnier*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 论文研究了湍流速度信号的可预测性，发现小尺度上的极端事件会导致预测性能下降和不确定性增加，并建立了可预测性损失与湍流间歇性之间的统计联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究的动机是探索湍流速度信号的可预测性，特别是小尺度上的极端事件如何影响预测的准确性和不确定性。

Method: 论文采用了概率类比预测方法，研究了Gledzer-Ohkitani-Yamada (GOY)壳模型和实验测量的湍流速度信号。通过GOY模型的显式尺度分离，评估了各尺度的预测性能。

Result: 研究结果显示，可预测性从大尺度到小尺度系统性下降，并且极端事件的强度与预测性能的损失之间存在直接关系。

Conclusion: 论文的结论是，湍流速度信号的可预测性与小尺度上的极端事件密切相关，这些事件会导致预测性能的下降和不确定性的增加。研究还建立了跨尺度可预测性损失与湍流间歇性之间的统计联系。

Abstract: We study the predictability of turbulent velocity signals using probabilistic
analog-forecasting. Here, predictability is defined by the accuracy of
forecasts and the associated uncertainties. We study the
Gledzer-Ohkitani-Yamada (GOY) shell model of turbulence as well as experimental
measurements from a fully developed turbulent flow. In both cases, we identify
the extreme values of velocity at small scales as localized unpredictable
events that lead to a loss of predictability: worse predictions and increase of
their uncertainties. The GOY model, with its explicit scale separation, allows
to evaluate the prediction performance at individual scales, and so to better
relate the intensity of extreme events and the loss of forecast performance.
Results show that predictability decreases systematically from large to small
scales. These findings establish a statistical connection between
predictability loss across scales and intermittency in turbulent flows.

</details>


### [1128] [Inferring viscoplastic models from velocity fields: a physics-informed neural network approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17681)
*Martin Lardy,Sham Tlili,Simon Gsell*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于物理信息神经网络（PINN）的框架，直接从流速场数据中推断流变学定律，无需传统流变测量方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统流变测量方法难以捕捉复杂、三维且异质的流体行为，尤其是在系统尺寸、边界条件和材料特定约束下。

Method: 使用神经网络插值流速场，通过自动微分计算速度梯度，并联合优化本构模型和流速场表示，最小化物理残差与观测数据的差异。

Result: 在合成流速场数据上验证了方法的有效性，能够可靠推断流变参数，即使存在显著噪声。

Conclusion: PINN框架在流变学定律推断中表现出潜力，尤其在模型无关的推断和候选模型选择方面。

Abstract: Fluid-like materials are ubiquitous, spanning from living biological tissues
to geological formations, and across scales ranging from micrometers to
kilometers. Inferring their rheological properties remains a major challenge,
particularly when traditional rheometry fails to capture their complex,
three-dimensional, and often heterogeneous behavior. This difficulty is
exacerbated by system size, boundary conditions, and other material-specific
physical, chemical, or thermal constraints. In this work, we explore whether
rheological laws can be inferred directly from flow observations. We propose a
physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework designed to learn constitutive
viscoplastic laws from velocity field data alone. Our method uses a neural
network to interpolate the velocity field, enabling the computation of velocity
gradients via automatic differentiation. These gradients are used to estimate
the residuals of the governing conservation laws, which implicitly depend on
the unknown rheology. We jointly optimize both the constitutive model and the
velocity field representation by minimizing the physical residuals and
discrepancies from observed data. We validate our approach on synthetic
velocity fields generated from numerical simulations using Herschel-Bulkley,
Carreau and Panastasiou models under various flow conditions. The algorithm
reliably infers rheological parameters, even in the presence of significant
noise. We analyze the dependence of inference performance on flow geometry and
sampling, highlighting the importance of shear rate distribution in the
dataset. Finally, we explore preliminary strategies for model-agnostic
inference via embedded model selection, demonstrating the potential of PINNs
for identifying the most suitable rheological law from candidate models.

</details>


### [1129] [Growth rate and energy dissipation in wind-forced breaking waves](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17802)
*Nicolò Scapin,Jiarong Wu,J. Thomas Farrar,Bertrand Chapron,Stéphane Popinet,Luc Deike*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 研究通过数值模拟发现风强迫破碎波的能源增长和耗散机制，波增长与$(u_*/c)^2$相关，耗散遵循惯性尺度，破碎后湍流耗散剖面为$z^{-1}$。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究风强迫破碎波的能源增长和耗散机制，以理解波场在风作用下的动态行为。

Method: 采用直接数值模拟方法，研究耦合的空气-水Navier-Stokes方程，分析风摩擦速度与波速比$u_*/c$对波场的影响。

Result: 波的增长主要由压力输入主导，而破碎过程中的能量耗散主要由湍流耗散主导。波的增长率与$(u_*/c)^2$成正比，能量耗散遵循惯性尺度。破碎后，近表面的湍流耗散剖面遵循$z^{-1}$尺度。

Conclusion: 通过直接数值模拟耦合的空气-水Navier-Stokes方程，研究发现风强迫破碎波的能源增长和耗散过程。波的增长率与$(u_*/c)^2$成正比，而能量耗散遵循惯性尺度，证实了该过程的普遍性。破碎后，近表面的垂直湍流耗散剖面遵循$z^{-1}$尺度。

Abstract: We investigate the energy growth and dissipation of wind-forced breaking
waves using direct numerical simulations of the coupled air-water Navier-Stokes
equations. We vary the wind friction velocity over the wave speed $u_\ast/c$ up
to 1. A turbulent wind boundary layer drives the growth of a pre-existing
narrowband wave field until it breaks and transfers energy into the water
column. Under sustained wind forcing, the wave field then resumes growth. We
separately analyze energy transfers during wave growth and breaking-induced
dissipation. Energy transfers are dominated by pressure input during growth and
turbulent dissipation during breaking. The wave growth rate scales with
$(u_\ast/c)^2$, modulated by the wave steepness due to sheltering. The energy
dissipation follows the inertial scaling with wave slope at breaking,
confirming the universality of the process. Following breaking, near-surface
vertical turbulence dissipation profiles scale as $z^{-1}$, with its magnitude
controlled by the breaking-induced dissipation.

</details>


### [1130] [IRENE: a fluId layeR finitE-elemeNt softwarE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17827)
*Dennis Wörthmuller,Gaetano Ferraro,Pierre Sens,Michele Castellana*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: IRENE是一个用于求解二维粘性流体层稳态和动力学的有限元软件库，适用于多种物理尺度和复杂几何。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个能够处理多种物理状态（低雷诺数到湍流）和复杂几何的流体模拟工具。

Method: 基于有限元方法，支持多物理尺度模拟，包括面内流动、面外变形、表面张力和弹性响应。

Result: IRENE能够处理复杂几何，并通过与已知结果的对比验证了其准确性。

Conclusion: IRENE是一个功能强大的工具，适用于生物膜和宏观气流等应用场景。

Abstract: We present a finite-element software library, IRENE, for numerically solving
the steady state and dynamics of a two-dimensional viscous fluid layer embedded
in three-dimensional space, on multiple physical scales. The library is
designed to handle a wide range of physical regimes -- both low-Reynolds-number
and turbulent ones -- and geometries, capturing the coupling between in-plane
flows, out-of-plane deformations, surface tension, and elastic response. In
addition, the software can treat complex geometries, including those with
