intra-layer obstacles or arbitrary layer boundaries. We validate IRENE against
known analytical and numerical results and demonstrate its capabilities through
examples relevant to biological membranes and macroscopic air flows.

</details>


### [1131] [The dominant role of jetting in micron- and sub-micron sea spray produced by bubble bursting: a revised model and comparison with measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17836)
*Alfonso M. Ganan-Calvo,Miguel A. Herrada,Jose M. Lopez-Herrera*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 研究通过修订的第一性原理模型确立了喷射在产生微米和亚微米气溶胶中的主导地位，显著提升了海洋气溶胶生成的理解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决关于亚微米海喷雾气溶胶（SSA）生产的主要物理机制（特别是气泡破裂中薄膜和喷射液滴之间的竞争）的激烈争论。

Method: 通过物理尺度和数值模拟排除了薄膜液滴机制作为主要贡献者，并构建了一个全面的全球概率分布函数（PDF），通过顺序建模其基本组成部分。

Result: 模型展示了非凡的预测准确性，与实验室和海洋测量数据几乎完全一致，特别是在关键的25纳米至2.5微米范围内。

Conclusion: 这项研究显著增强了对海洋气溶胶生成的基本理解，并为气候和大气化学模型提供了更准确的基础。

Abstract: The primary physical mechanism governing the production of sub-micron sea
spray aerosols (SSA) -- specifically the competition between film and jet
droplets from bubble bursting -- has remained a subject of intense debate. This
work presents a revised, first-principles model that establishes the
overwhelming dominance of jetting for producing micron and sub-micron aerosols.
Our approach first rules out the film droplet mechanism as a primary
contributor for this size range by demonstrating through physical scaling and
numerical simulations that the final average ejected volume of sub-micron
droplets is much smaller than that from jetting. A comprehensive global
probability distribution function (PDF) for SSA is constructed by rigorously
modeling its fundamental components in sequence: (i) refining the sub-surface
bubble size distribution with a simpler and better experimentally supported
exponential law, and (ii) deriving consistent number and size distribution
models of droplets per bursting event from an ample set of high-resolution
numerical simulations. The droplet size PDF from a single bubble follows a
highly-skewed distribution -- optimally modeled by a Generalized Inverse
Gaussian distribution -- revealing the production of nanometric droplets
previously unaccounted for by simpler models. When integrated, these components
yield a final predictive model for the global SSA size distribution, with
parameters derived directly from physical principles and simulations rather
than empirical fitting. The model demonstrates extraordinary predictive
accuracy, aligning almost perfectly with experimental data from both laboratory
and oceanic measurements, in particular across the critical 25 nm to 2.5 $\mu$m
range. This research significantly enhances the fundamental understanding of
marine aerosol generation and provides a more accurate foundation for climate
and atmospheric chemistry models.

</details>


### [1132] [Basal layer of granular flow down smooth and rough inclines: kinematics, slip laws and rheology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17920)
*Teng Wang,Lu Jing,Fiona C. Y. Kwok,Yuri D. Sobral,Thomas Weinhart,Anthony R. Thornton*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 通过DEM模拟研究了颗粒流在光滑和粗糙斜面上的基底层动力学，发现其流变特性不符合μ(I)理论，而是符合Bagnold应力标度和扩展动力学理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究旨在解决在粗糙度不足或光滑斜面上，颗粒流底部出现速度滑移和强烈搅动的基底层的问题，这些问题未被局部流变学预测。

Method: 采用离散元方法（DEM）模拟研究了光滑和粗糙斜面上颗粒流的基底层详细动力学。通过无量纲参数Ra控制粗糙度，从0（平坦、摩擦平面）到接近1（非常粗糙平面）系统变化。

Result: 确定了三种流动状态：滑移状态（Ra≲0.45）、无滑移状态（Ra≳0.6）和中间过渡状态。在滑移状态下，基底层的运动学剖面（速度、剪切速率和颗粒温度）与Bagnold剖面显著偏离。

Conclusion: 研究发现，基底层的流变特性不遵循μ(I)流变学，而是符合Bagnold应力标度和扩展的颗粒流动力学理论。这些发现有助于未来开发更具预测性的颗粒流模型。

Abstract: Granular flow down an inclined plane is ubiquitous in geophysical and
industrial applications. On rough inclines, the flow exhibits Bagnold's
velocity profile and follows the so-called $\mu(I)$ local rheology. On
insufficiently rough or smooth inclines, however, velocity slip occurs at the
bottom and a basal layer with strong agitation emerges below the bulk, which is
not predicted by the local rheology. Here, we use discrete element method
simulations to study detailed dynamics of the basal layer in granular flows
down both smooth and rough inclines. We control the roughness via a
dimensionless parameter, $R_a$, varied systematically from 0 (flat, frictional
plane) to near 1 (very rough plane). Three flow regimes are identified: a slip
regime ($R_a \lesssim 0.45$) where a dilated basal layer appears, a no-slip
regime ($R_a \gtrsim 0.6$) and an intermediate transition regime. In the slip
regime, the kinematics profiles (velocity, shear rate and granular temperature)
of the basal layer strongly deviate from Bagnold's profiles. General basal slip
laws are developed which express the slip velocity as a function of the local
shear rate (or granular temperature), base roughness and slope angle. Moreover,
the basal layer thickness is insensitive to flow conditions but depends
somewhat on the inter-particle coefficient of restitution. Finally, we show
that the rheological properties of the basal layer do not follow the $\mu(I)$
rheology, but are captured by Bagnold's stress scaling and an extended kinetic
theory for granular flows. Our findings can help develop more predictive
granular flow models in the future.

</details>


### [1133] [Size distribution of decaying foam bubbles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18049)
*Ildoo Kim*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 研究通过随机事件模型和长时间观测泡沫气泡尺寸分布，发现气泡体积随时间呈指数衰减，且较大气泡寿命较短。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统研究关注重力导致的薄膜排水对泡沫稳定性的影响，本研究采用随机破裂模型，探究长时间尺度下气泡尺寸分布的演化。

Method: 通过摇动不同浓度的肥皂溶液在培养皿中制备气泡层，利用延时视频成像技术监测，并通过自定义软件分析气泡尺寸分布。

Result: 气泡总体积随时间呈指数衰减，且较大气泡的平均寿命较小气泡短约一半。

Conclusion: 气泡破裂行为符合随机事件模型，且气泡尺寸显著影响其稳定性，较大气泡更不稳定。

Abstract: The most studies on the stability of foam bubbles investigated the mechanical
stability of thin films between bubbles due to the drainage by gravity. In the
current work, we take an alternative approach by assuming the rupture of
bubbles as a series of random events and by investigating the time evolution of
the size distribution of foam bubbles over a long time up to several hours. For
this purpose, we first prepared layers of bubbles on Petri dishes by shaking
soap solutions of a few different concentrations, and then we monitored the
Petri dishes by using a time-lapse video imaging technique. We analyzed the
captured images by custom software to count the bubble size distribution with
respect to the initial concentration and elapsed time. From the statistics on
our data, we find that the total bubble volume decreases exponentially in time,
and the exponent, i.e. the mean lifetime, is a function of the bubble size. The
mean lifetimes of larger bubbles are observed to be shorter than those of
smaller bubbles, by approximately a factor of 2.

</details>


### [1134] [The mechanism of tornadogenesis from the perspective of vortex tubes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18222)
*Peng Yue,Y. Charles Li,Jiamin Dang,Leigh Orf,Grace Yan*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: A new theory explains tornado formation, strength, and decay via pressure differences and vortex tube dynamics, based on Kelvin-Helmholtz Theorems.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: The motivation is to provide a comprehensive theory explaining tornadogenesis, strength variation, and decay through pressure differences and vortex dynamics.

Method: The study proposes a theory based on vortex tubes and the Kelvin-Helmholtz Theorems, analyzing how pressure differences affect vorticity and tornado strength.

Result: The results indicate that tornado formation occurs when vorticity inside a squeezed vortex tube reaches tornado-level due to sufficient pressure difference, with strength and decay directly linked to pressure changes.

Conclusion: The paper concludes that the entire lifespan of a tornado, from formation to decay, is governed by the pressure difference between the lowest pressure line from the wall cloud to the ground and its surroundings.

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a new theory on tornadogenesis from the perspective
of vortex tubes based on Kelvin-Helmholtz Theorems. When the pressure
difference between the lowest pressure line from the wall cloud down to the
ground and its surroundings is large enough, the increase of vorticity inside
the squeezed vortex tube can reach the tornado level, and thus a tornado is
born. When the pressure difference increases, the tornado strength increases.
When the pressure difference decreases, the tornado strength decreases. The
decay of tornadoes is caused by the decreasing pressure difference. This is our
theory of the entire tornado lifespan.

</details>


### [1135] [Vortex ring induced by a disk translating toward or away from a wall](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18597)
*Joanne Steiner,Cyprien Morize,Ivan Delbende,Alban Sauret,Philippe Gondret*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 研究通过实验和数值模拟分析了壁面附近圆盘运动产生的涡环的时间演化，发现壁面对涡环核心半径的影响取决于圆盘运动方向，并建立了与无界情况不同的标度律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究壁面附近涡环动力学的行为，特别是圆盘运动方向对涡环特性的影响。

Method: 结合粒子图像测速实验和Basilisk流求解器的数值模拟，系统变化控制参数（如圆盘大小、行程长度、运动时间和壁面距离）。

Result: 实验与数值结果一致，显示壁面仅当圆盘向壁面运动时增加涡核半径，且涡环循环在两种运动方向均增加。建立了描述涡环最大循环和核心尺寸的标度律。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了壁面对涡环动力学的复杂影响，为理解固体边界附近的涡流行为提供了新见解。

Abstract: This study investigates the time evolution of vortex rings generated by the
normal translation of a disk either toward or away from a wall. We
systematically vary the control parameters, including the disk size, stroke
length, travel time, and distance from the wall, to analyze their influence on
vortex dynamics. Experiments are conducted with Particle Image Velocimetry,
while numerical simulations are performed using the flow solver Basilisk. The
circulation and core radius are used as primary metrics to describe the
properties of the vortex ring. A quantitative agreement is observed between the
experimental and the numerical results. Both approaches reveal that the vortex
circulation increases for disk motions in either direction, toward or away from
the wall. However, the effect of the bottom wall on the vortex core radius
differs depending on the motion of the disk. The presence of the wall increases
the core radius only when the disk moves toward the wall, while no significant
effect is observed for a translation away from the wall. Furthermore, we
establish scaling laws to describe the maximum circulation and core size of the
vortex ring as a function of the control parameters: the disk diameter, the
typical time and stroke length of its motion, and the minimal distance from the
wall. These scalings, which differ from the unbounded case, contribute to a
deeper understanding of vortex dynamics in the vicinity of solid boundaries.

</details>


### [1136] [The Full Nonlinear Vortex Tube-Vorton Method: the post-stall condition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18719)
*Pimentel-Garcia Jesus Carlos,Jimenez-Ponce Luis Antonio*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: FTVM方法通过涡量和速度概念简化复杂流体动力学分析，避免讨论压力作用，适用于预失速和后失速条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究旨在解决传统方法在后失速条件下无法捕捉形状阻力分量的问题，并简化对复杂流体动力学的理解。

Method: 采用非线性涡管-涡旋方法（FTVM），在预失速条件下成功应用Kutta-Zhukovski（KJ）力计算，而在后失速条件下采用替代力计算方法。

Result: 结果表明，该方法能够准确近似涉及复杂尾流动力学的流体运动，且无需讨论压力在流体运动中的作用。

Conclusion: 该方法通过基于涡量和速度概念的低阶、低离散数值方法，简化了对复杂低速空气动力学的理解，避免了讨论压力在流体运动中的作用。

Abstract: The original concepts behind The Full Nonlinear Vortex Tube-Vorton Method
(FTVM) have been applied to the study of massively separated fluid flow past a
thin body. In the pre-stall condition, the Kutta-Zhukovski (KJ) force
calculation was successfully implemented. However, for the post-stall
condition, this approach is not capable of capturing the form drag component.
Thus, an alternative force calculation method is implemented. The results
obtained demonstrate that the fluid motion involving complex wake dynamics can
be accurately approximated by a low-order, low-discretization numerical method
based purely on vorticity and velocity concepts. This method avoids the need to
discuss and speculate about the role of pressure on fluid motion, even in the
turbulent regime. Consequently, it simplifies the understanding of complex
low-speed aerodynamics by returning to the first principles.

</details>


<div id='physics.geo-ph'></div>

# physics.geo-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [1137] [Three-Dimensional Porous Structures of CO$_2$-Induced Salt Precipitation Sustaining Halite Self-Enhancing Growth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17241)
*Mohammad Nooraiepour,Mohammad Masoudi,Hannelore Derluyn,Pascale Senechal,Peter Moonen,Helge Hellevang*

Main category: physics.geo-ph

TL;DR: 研究利用X射线和深度学习技术，揭示了盐结晶的自增强机制及其对CO₂储存效率的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 盐沉淀在CO₂储存中影响注入效率和封存完整性，同时涉及土壤盐碱化和文化遗产保护问题。

Method: 采用时间分辨X射线和光谱显微CT、扫描电镜及深度学习辅助图像分析。

Result: 发现三维盐生长结构作为次级多孔介质，揭示了盐结晶的自增强机制和毛细作用的关键作用。

Conclusion: 理解盐的自增强生长机制对提升CO₂注入效率和解决环境问题至关重要。

Abstract: Salt precipitation during CO$_2$ storage in saline aquifers presents
challenges for injectivity and containment, with broader implications for soil
salinization and cultural heritage preservation. This study utilizes time-lapse
X-ray and spectral micro-computed tomography, scanning electron microscopy, and
deep learning-assisted image analysis to investigate halite crystallization and
brine consumption in porous medium. We identified three-dimensional halite
growth structures functioning as a secondary porous medium. Visualizing the
spatio-temporal dynamics of salt-brine coexistence and halite precipitation
revealed critical insights into the self-enhancing nature of salt growth.
Expanding gas-liquid contact surfaces and initial crystal nucleation sites
significantly enhanced evaporation and growth rates. Hydrophilic halite
crystals attract brine films, establishing a feedback loop that perpetuates
growth. The encapsulation of brine between grain surfaces and umbrella-like
salt crusts was observed. Delineating the self-enhancing growth, including the
role of capillary forces and surface-interface processes, is crucial for
improving CO$_2$ injection efficiency and integrity, as well as for addressing
environmental challenges related to soil salinization.

</details>


### [1138] [UT-GraphCast Hindcast Dataset: A Global AI Forecast Archive from UT Austin for Weather and Climate Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17453)
*Naveen Sudharsan,Manmeet Singh,Harsh Kamath,Hassan Dashtian,Clint Dawson,Zong-Liang Yang,Dev Niyogi*

Main category: physics.geo-ph

TL;DR: UT GraphCast Hindcast Dataset是一个全球天气预测数据集，使用Google DeepMind的GraphCast模型生成，覆盖1979至2024年。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提供全球范围内的高分辨率天气预测数据，支持气象研究和应用。

Method: 基于物理信息的图神经网络（GraphCast），使用ECMWF ERA5再分析数据进行训练。

Result: 生成每日15天的确定性预测，覆盖37个垂直层次，预测时间在1分钟内完成。

Conclusion: 该数据集为气象研究提供了高效、高精度的全球天气预测工具。

Abstract: The UT GraphCast Hindcast Dataset from 1979 to 2024 is a comprehensive global
weather forecast archive generated using the Google DeepMind GraphCast
Operational model. Developed by researchers at The University of Texas at
Austin under the WCRP umbrella, this dataset provides daily 15 day
deterministic forecasts at 00UTC on an approximately 25 km global grid for a 45
year period. GraphCast is a physics informed graph neural network that was
trained on ECMWF ERA5 reanalysis. It predicts more than a dozen key atmospheric
and surface variables on 37 vertical levels, delivering a full medium range
forecast in under one minute on modern hardware.

</details>


### [1139] [Pix2Geomodel: A Next-Generation Reservoir Geomodeling with Property-to-Property Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17747)
*Abdulrahman Al-Fakih,Ardiansyah Koeshidayatullah,Nabil A. Saraih,Tapan Mukerji,Rayan Kanfar,Abdulmohsen Alali,SanLinn I. Kaka*

Main category: physics.geo-ph

TL;DR: Pix2Geomodel是一种基于Pix2Pix的cGAN框架，用于预测储层属性，在复杂地质建模中表现出高精度和地质真实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统地质建模方法难以处理复杂的地下异质性和观测数据条件化问题。

Method: 使用7.6百万个单元的数据集，通过数据预处理和增强生成2,350张图像，采用U-Net生成器和PatchGAN判别器训练19,000步。

Result: 在岩相和含水饱和度预测中表现出高精度（PA 0.88-0.96，FWIoU 0.85-0.95），孔隙度和渗透率预测中等成功。

Conclusion: Pix2Geomodel在直接属性映射中优于传统方法，未来需解决微结构变异性和2D限制问题。

Abstract: Accurate geological modeling is critical for reservoir characterization, yet
traditional methods struggle with complex subsurface heterogeneity, and they
have problems with conditioning to observed data. This study introduces
Pix2Geomodel, a novel conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN)
framework based on Pix2Pix, designed to predict reservoir properties (facies,
porosity, permeability, and water saturation) from the Rotliegend reservoir of
the Groningen gas field. Utilizing a 7.6 million-cell dataset from the
Nederlandse Aardolie Maatschappij, accessed via EPOS-NL, the methodology
included data preprocessing, augmentation to generate 2,350 images per
property, and training with a U-Net generator and PatchGAN discriminator over
19,000 steps. Evaluation metrics include pixel accuracy (PA), mean intersection
over union (mIoU), frequency weighted intersection over union (FWIoU), and
visualizations assessed performance in masked property prediction and
property-to-property translation tasks. Results demonstrated high accuracy for
facies (PA 0.88, FWIoU 0.85) and water saturation (PA 0.96, FWIoU 0.95), with
moderate success for porosity (PA 0.70, FWIoU 0.55) and permeability (PA 0.74,
FWIoU 0.60), and robust translation performance (e.g., facies-to-facies PA
0.98, FWIoU 0.97). The framework captured spatial variability and geological
realism, as validated by variogram analysis, and calculated the training loss
curves for the generator and discriminator for each property. Compared to
traditional methods, Pix2Geomodel offers enhanced fidelity in direct property
mapping. Limitations include challenges with microstructural variability and 2D
constraints, suggesting future integration of multi-modal data and 3D modeling
(Pix2Geomodel v2.0). This study advances the application of generative AI in
geoscience, supporting improved reservoir management and open science
initiatives.

</details>


### [1140] [A heterogeneous lithosphere on Venus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18568)
*I. Romeo,A. Jimenez Diaz,M. Mendiburu Elicabe,I. Egea Gonzalez,R. M. Hahn,P. K. Byrne,J. F. Kirby,J. Alvarez Lozano,J. Ruiz*

Main category: physics.geo-ph

TL;DR: 金星火山平原分为三个区域，显示不同的地壳和岩石圈特性，暗示复杂的地球动力学机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金星与地球大小和组成相似，但其内部热演化机制尚不明确，尤其是火山平原的分布和特性。

Method: 通过分析金星火山平原的地壳厚度和岩石圈弹性厚度（Te），识别出三个具有统计差异的区域。

Result: 发现北部平原岩石圈较薄，火山密度是南部平原的两倍，Beta-Atla-Themis区域地壳较厚。

Conclusion: 金星的地球动力学机制复杂，存在显著的横向变化，需进一步研究地幔对流和行星演化模型。

Abstract: Venus is 95% the size of Earth and probably has a similar composition and
internal energy, but the geodynamical mechanism governing its internal thermal
evolution remains controversial. Much of the planet surface (77%) is covered by
volcanic plains, characterized by basaltic flood lavas, some of which emanate
from volcanoes whereas others have no identifiable sources. Here we show that
the volcanic plains contain three provinces with statistically different
properties. Apart from the plains around the Beta-Atla-Themis region
characterized by a thick crust with a wide range of effective elastic
lithospheric thickness (Te), the remaining volcanic plains (61% of the surface)
display a dichotomous nature, with the northern plains showing a thinner
lithosphere and twice the number of volcanoes per unit area compared to the
southern plains. These global-scale differences imply a complex geodynamical
regime, with large lateral variations in mechanical properties and/or
geodynamical processes, which must be addressed by competing models of mantle
convection and planetary evolution.

</details>


### [1141] [Three-Dimensional Porous Structures of CO$_2$-Induced Salt Precipitation Sustaining Halite Self-Enhancing Growth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17241)
*Mohammad Nooraiepour,Mohammad Masoudi,Hannelore Derluyn,Pascale Senechal,Peter Moonen,Helge Hellevang*

Main category: physics.geo-ph

TL;DR: The paper investigates halite crystallization in porous media using advanced imaging and deep learning, revealing self-enhancing growth mechanisms with implications for CO$_2$ storage and soil salinization.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: The study aims to address challenges in CO$_2$ storage injectivity and containment, as well as broader environmental issues such as soil salinization and cultural heritage preservation, by understanding the dynamics of salt precipitation.

Method: The research employed time-lapse X-ray and spectral micro-computed tomography, scanning electron microscopy, and deep learning-assisted image analysis to study halite crystallization and brine consumption in porous media.

Result: The study identified three-dimensional halite growth structures acting as a secondary porous medium, revealed the spatio-temporal dynamics of salt-brine coexistence, and demonstrated how expanding gas-liquid contact surfaces and initial nucleation sites enhance evaporation and growth rates.

Conclusion: The study highlights the self-enhancing nature of halite growth in porous media, driven by capillary forces and surface-interface processes, which has significant implications for CO$_2$ storage efficiency and environmental challenges like soil salinization.

Abstract: Salt precipitation during CO$_2$ storage in saline aquifers presents
challenges for injectivity and containment, with broader implications for soil
salinization and cultural heritage preservation. This study utilizes time-lapse
X-ray and spectral micro-computed tomography, scanning electron microscopy, and
deep learning-assisted image analysis to investigate halite crystallization and
brine consumption in porous medium. We identified three-dimensional halite
growth structures functioning as a secondary porous medium. Visualizing the
spatio-temporal dynamics of salt-brine coexistence and halite precipitation
revealed critical insights into the self-enhancing nature of salt growth.
Expanding gas-liquid contact surfaces and initial crystal nucleation sites
significantly enhanced evaporation and growth rates. Hydrophilic halite
crystals attract brine films, establishing a feedback loop that perpetuates
growth. The encapsulation of brine between grain surfaces and umbrella-like
salt crusts was observed. Delineating the self-enhancing growth, including the
role of capillary forces and surface-interface processes, is crucial for
improving CO$_2$ injection efficiency and integrity, as well as for addressing
environmental challenges related to soil salinization.

</details>


### [1142] [UT-GraphCast Hindcast Dataset: A Global AI Forecast Archive from UT Austin for Weather and Climate Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17453)
*Naveen Sudharsan,Manmeet Singh,Harsh Kamath,Hassan Dashtian,Clint Dawson,Zong-Liang Yang,Dev Niyogi*

Main category: physics.geo-ph

TL;DR: UT GraphCast Hindcast Dataset是一个全球天气预测数据集，由Google DeepMind的GraphCast模型生成，覆盖1979至2024年，提供每日15天确定性预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为全球天气预测提供一个长期、高分辨率的存档数据集，支持气候研究和天气预报改进。

Method: 使用基于物理信息的图神经网络GraphCast，训练于ECMWF ERA5再分析数据，预测多个关键变量。

Result: 生成了45年的每日15天确定性预测数据，覆盖全球25公里网格，预测速度快。

Conclusion: 该数据集为气候研究和天气预报提供了宝贵资源，展示了GraphCast模型的高效性和准确性。

Abstract: The UT GraphCast Hindcast Dataset from 1979 to 2024 is a comprehensive global
weather forecast archive generated using the Google DeepMind GraphCast
Operational model. Developed by researchers at The University of Texas at
Austin under the WCRP umbrella, this dataset provides daily 15 day
deterministic forecasts at 00UTC on an approximately 25 km global grid for a 45
year period. GraphCast is a physics informed graph neural network that was
trained on ECMWF ERA5 reanalysis. It predicts more than a dozen key atmospheric
and surface variables on 37 vertical levels, delivering a full medium range
forecast in under one minute on modern hardware.

</details>


### [1143] [Pix2Geomodel: A Next-Generation Reservoir Geomodeling with Property-to-Property Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17747)
*Abdulrahman Al-Fakih,Ardiansyah Koeshidayatullah,Nabil A. Saraih,Tapan Mukerji,Rayan Kanfar,Abdulmohsen Alali,SanLinn I. Kaka*

Main category: physics.geo-ph

TL;DR: Pix2Geomodel 是一种基于 cGAN 的新型框架，用于高精度预测储层属性，优于传统方法，尤其在相和水饱和度方面表现突出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统地质建模方法难以处理复杂的地下异质性和观测数据条件化问题，因此需要一种更高效、精确的方法来预测储层属性。

Method: 研究采用 Pix2Pix 为基础的 cGAN 框架，结合 U-Net 生成器和 PatchGAN 判别器，对 7.6 百万个单元的数据集进行预处理和增强，生成 2,350 张图像/属性，并训练 19,000 步。评估指标包括 PA、mIoU、FWIoU 和可视化分析。

Result: Pix2Geomodel 在相（PA 0.88, FWIoU 0.85）和水饱和度（PA 0.96, FWIoU 0.95）预测中表现出高精度，孔隙度（PA 0.70, FWIoU 0.55）和渗透率（PA 0.74, FWIoU 0.60）表现中等。框架在空间变异性和地质真实性方面表现优异。

Conclusion: Pix2Geomodel 是一种基于 cGAN 的新型框架，能够高精度预测储层属性，尤其在相和水饱和度方面表现优异。尽管在孔隙度和渗透率方面表现中等，但其在空间变异性和地质真实性方面的表现优于传统方法。未来可通过多模态数据和 3D 建模进一步提升性能。

Abstract: Accurate geological modeling is critical for reservoir characterization, yet
traditional methods struggle with complex subsurface heterogeneity, and they
have problems with conditioning to observed data. This study introduces
Pix2Geomodel, a novel conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN)
framework based on Pix2Pix, designed to predict reservoir properties (facies,
porosity, permeability, and water saturation) from the Rotliegend reservoir of
the Groningen gas field. Utilizing a 7.6 million-cell dataset from the
Nederlandse Aardolie Maatschappij, accessed via EPOS-NL, the methodology
included data preprocessing, augmentation to generate 2,350 images per
property, and training with a U-Net generator and PatchGAN discriminator over
19,000 steps. Evaluation metrics include pixel accuracy (PA), mean intersection
over union (mIoU), frequency weighted intersection over union (FWIoU), and
visualizations assessed performance in masked property prediction and
property-to-property translation tasks. Results demonstrated high accuracy for
facies (PA 0.88, FWIoU 0.85) and water saturation (PA 0.96, FWIoU 0.95), with
moderate success for porosity (PA 0.70, FWIoU 0.55) and permeability (PA 0.74,
FWIoU 0.60), and robust translation performance (e.g., facies-to-facies PA
0.98, FWIoU 0.97). The framework captured spatial variability and geological
realism, as validated by variogram analysis, and calculated the training loss
curves for the generator and discriminator for each property. Compared to
traditional methods, Pix2Geomodel offers enhanced fidelity in direct property
mapping. Limitations include challenges with microstructural variability and 2D
constraints, suggesting future integration of multi-modal data and 3D modeling
(Pix2Geomodel v2.0). This study advances the application of generative AI in
geoscience, supporting improved reservoir management and open science
initiatives.

</details>


### [1144] [A heterogeneous lithosphere on Venus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18568)
*I. Romeo,A. Jimenez Diaz,M. Mendiburu Elicabe,I. Egea Gonzalez,R. M. Hahn,P. K. Byrne,J. F. Kirby,J. Alvarez Lozano,J. Ruiz*

Main category: physics.geo-ph

TL;DR: 金星火山平原分为三个区域，显示不同的地质特性，暗示复杂的动力学机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金星与地球相似但地质演化机制不明，火山平原的差异可能揭示其内部动力学过程。

Method: 分析金星火山平原的地壳厚度和弹性岩石圈厚度（Te），统计不同区域的火山分布。

Result: 发现三个不同特性的区域，北部平原岩石圈更薄且火山密度更高，南部平原则相反。

Conclusion: 金星的地质复杂性表明其内部存在显著的横向变化，需进一步研究地幔对流模型。

Abstract: Venus is 95% the size of Earth and probably has a similar composition and
internal energy, but the geodynamical mechanism governing its internal thermal
evolution remains controversial. Much of the planet surface (77%) is covered by
volcanic plains, characterized by basaltic flood lavas, some of which emanate
from volcanoes whereas others have no identifiable sources. Here we show that
the volcanic plains contain three provinces with statistically different
properties. Apart from the plains around the Beta-Atla-Themis region
characterized by a thick crust with a wide range of effective elastic
lithospheric thickness (Te), the remaining volcanic plains (61% of the surface)
display a dichotomous nature, with the northern plains showing a thinner
lithosphere and twice the number of volcanoes per unit area compared to the
southern plains. These global-scale differences imply a complex geodynamical
regime, with large lateral variations in mechanical properties and/or
geodynamical processes, which must be addressed by competing models of mantle
convection and planetary evolution.

</details>


<div id='physics.comp-ph'></div>

# physics.comp-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [1145] [XtalOpt Version 14: Variable-Composition Crystal Structure Search for Functional Materials Through Pareto Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17246)
*Samad Hajinazar,Eva Zurek*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: XtalOpt版本14是一个用于晶体结构预测的多目标全局优化算法，集成了多种计算方法，并引入了Pareto优化以提升功能材料的发现效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发XtalOpt版本14的目的是为了更高效地搜索具有可变组成的新型晶体结构，并通过多目标优化框架提升功能材料的发现能力。

Method: 该版本集成了ab initio方法、经典势和机器学习势进行结构松弛，并引入了Pareto优化以增强多目标搜索框架。

Result: XtalOpt版本14能够更高效地发现功能材料，并提供了详细的使用方法和改进概述。

Conclusion: XtalOpt版本14通过多目标优化和多种计算方法的集成，显著提升了晶体结构预测和功能材料发现的效率。

Abstract: Version 14 of XtalOpt, evolutionary multi-objective global optimization
algorithm for crystal structure prediction, is now available for download from
its official website https://xtalopt.github.io. The new version of the code is
designed to perform ground state search for novel crystal structures with
variable composition by integrating a suite of ab initio methods alongside
classical and machine-learning potentials for structural relaxation. The
multi-objective search framework has been further enhanced through the
introduction of Pareto optimization, enabling efficient discovery of functional
materials. Here, we describe the implemented methodologies, provide detailed
instructions for their use, and present an overview of additional improvements
included in XtalOpt version 14.

</details>


### [1146] [A Comprehensive Evaluation of the Bernoulli-Trial Collisions Families in Treating Rarefied Micro Flows and Hypersonic Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17256)
*Ahmad Shoja-sani,Maryam Javani,Ehsan Roohi,Stefan Stefanov*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文全面评估了基于Bernoulli-trials（BT）的碰撞算法（SBT、GBT、SSBT、SGBT）在稀薄气体动力学问题中的表现，并与标准方法（NTC、NN）进行了比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于对基于Kac随机方程的BT系列碰撞算法进行系统评估，以验证其在处理稀薄气体动力学问题中的有效性。

Method: 方法包括对SBT、GBT、SSBT和SGBT算法的理论分析，并通过模拟Bobylev-Krook-Wu（BKW）精确解来验证算法的准确性。

Result: 结果显示，BT算法在粒子数减少时仍能保持碰撞频率，且SGBT算法在速度分布函数的第4矩平均结果上与理论一致。

Conclusion: 结论表明BT算法优于标准方法，尤其是在粒子数较少的情况下，SGBT算法表现出色。

Abstract: The collision process is essential to the Direct Simulation Monte Carlo
(DSMC) method, as it incorporates the fundamental principles of the Boltzmann
and Kac stochastic equations. A series of collision algorithms, known as the
Bernoulli-trials (BT) family schemes, have been proposed based on the Kac
stochastic equation. The impetus of this paper is to present a comprehensive
evaluation of different BT-based collision partner selection schemes, including
the simplified Bernoulli-trials (SBT), generalized Bernoulli-trials (GBT),
symmetrized and simplified Bernoulli-trials (SSBT), and newly proposed
symmetrized and generalized Bernoulli-trials (SGBT), in treating some standard
rarefied gas dynamics problems. In these algorithms, the first particle is
chosen in a specific order from the list of particles in the cell. For the SBT
and GBT, the second particle is chosen from the remaining particles in the list
placed after the first particle; however, for SSBT and SGBT, the second
particle is chosen from all particles in the list. This means that the SBT and
GBT select pairs from the upper triangle of the collision probability matrix,
while symmetrized algorithms such as SSBT and SGBT utilize the entire matrix.
The results show that the BT-based collision algorithms, compared to the
standard "No Time Counter (NTC)" and "Nearest Neighbor (NN)", successfully
maintain the collision frequency as the number of particles per cell decreases.
Simulation of the Bobylev-Krook-Wu (BKW) exact solution of the Boltzmann
equation indicates that, like the GBT, the SGBT algorithm produces the same
results as the theory for the average of the 4th moment of the velocity
distribution function (VDF).

</details>


### [1147] [Refining Tc Prediction in Hydrides via Symbolic-Regression-Enhanced Electron-Localization-Function-Based Descriptors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17456)
*Francesco Belli,Sean Torres,Julia Contreras-Garcìa,Eva Zurek*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文通过引入分子性指数和符号回归，改进了基于电子局域化函数（ELF）的氢化物超导体临界温度预测模型，提高了预测准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 氢基材料因其低原子质量和强电子-声子相互作用而具有极高的超导临界温度，但现有基于ELF的预测模型受限于训练数据集的小规模和同质性。

Method: 通过编译一个包含244种二元和三元氢化物的公开数据集，重新评估ELF模型的预测能力，并引入分子性指数和符号回归来增强预测准确性。

Result: 分析表明，ELF仍是一个有价值的描述符，但其预测能力随成分复杂性增加而下降；引入分子性指数和符号回归显著提高了预测准确性。

Conclusion: 研究建立了一个更稳健的框架来评估氢化物材料的超导性，有助于通过与晶体结构预测方法或高通量搜索的集成加速筛选新型候选材料。

Abstract: Hydrogen-based materials are able to possess extremely high superconducting
critical temperatures, \tc s, due to hydrogen's low atomic mass and strong
electron-phonon interaction. Recently, a descriptor based on the Electron
Localization Function (ELF) has enabled the rapid estimation of the \tc\ of
hydrogen-containing compounds from electronic networking properties, but its
applicability has been limited by the small size and homogeneity of the
training dataset used. Herein, the model is re-examined compiling a publicly
available combined dataset of 244 binary and ternary hydride superconductors.
Our analysis shows that though ELF-based networking remains a valuable
descriptor, its predictive power declines with increasing compositional
complexity. However, by introducing the molecularity index, defined as the
highest value of the ELF at which two hydrogen atoms connect, and applying
symbolic regression, the accuracy of the predictions can be substantially
enhanced. These results establish a more robust framework for assessing
superconductivity in hydride materials, facilitating accelerated screening of
novel candidates through integration with crystal structure prediction methods
or high-throughput searches.

</details>


### [1148] [JAX-LaB: A High-Performance, Differentiable, Lattice Boltzmann Library for Modeling Multiphase Fluid Dynamics in Geosciences and Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17713)
*Piyush Pradhan,Pierre Gentine,Shaina Kelly*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: JAX-LaB是一个基于Python的可微分Lattice Boltzmann库，用于模拟多相和多物理场流动，支持多硬件平台并与机器学习工作流无缝集成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个高性能、硬件无关的库，用于模拟多相和多物理场流动，特别是在水文、地质和工程多孔介质中的应用。

Method: 基于XLB库扩展，利用JAX进行计算，采用Shan-Chen伪势方法和改进的虚拟密度方案处理多相相互作用和润湿现象。

Result: 通过多个分析基准验证了库的性能，展示了其在单GPU和多GPU上的扩展性，并提供了开源实现。

Conclusion: JAX-LaB是一个高效、灵活的工具，适用于复杂流动模拟，并支持与机器学习工作流的集成。

Abstract: We present JAX-LaB, a differentiable, Python-based Lattice Boltzmann library
for simulating multiphase and multiphysics flows in hydrologic, geologic, and
engineered porous media. Built as an extension of the XLB library, JAX-LaB
utilizes JAX for computations and offers a performant, hardware-agnostic
implementation that integrates seamlessly with machine learning workflows and
scales efficiently across CPUs, GPUs, and distributed systems. Multiphase
interactions are modeled using the Shan-Chen pseudopotential method, which is
coupled with an equation of state and an improved forcing scheme to obtain
liquid-vapor densities that are consistent with Maxwell's construction,
enabling simulations of systems with very large density ratios while
maintaining minimal spurious currents. Wetting is handled using the "improved"
virtual density scheme, which allows precise control of contact angles and
eliminates non-physical films seen in other Shan-Chen wetting methods. We
validate the library through several analytical benchmarks, such as Laplace's
law, capillary rise, and cocurrent multicomponent flow, and demonstrate some
exemplary use cases for the library. We also report single- and multi-GPU
performance scaling of the library. The library is open-source under the Apache
license and available at https://github.com/piyush-ppradhan/JAX-LaB.

</details>


### [1149] [Stochastic dynamics simulation of the focused electron beam induced deposition process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18163)
*Ilia A. Solov'yov,Alexey Prosvetov,Gennady Sushko,Andrey V. Solov'yov*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于随机动力学（SD）的多尺度计算方法，用于模拟聚焦电子束诱导沉积（FEBID）过程，并通过分子动力学（MD）模拟确定参数。该方法为复杂系统的动力学研究提供了新思路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 聚焦电子束诱导沉积（FEBID）是一种重要的纳米制造技术，但现有模型缺乏原子尺度的细节。本文旨在开发一种多尺度方法，以提供对FEBID过程的原子级洞察。

Method: 结合随机动力学（SD）和分子动力学（MD）模拟，开发了一种新的多尺度模型，用于模拟W(CO)$_6$前驱体分子在羟基化SiO$_2$-H基底上的沉积过程。

Result: 该方法成功模拟了W-rich纳米结构的生长过程，揭示了沉积物的元素组成和形态演变，并与实验结果进行了验证。

Conclusion: 本文提出的多尺度方法不仅适用于FEBID过程，还可推广到其他复杂系统的动力学研究，如3D纳米打印技术。

Abstract: This work reports on the development of a new approach to the multiscale
computational modelling of the focused electron beam-induced deposition
(FEBID), realised using the advanced software packages: MBN Explorer and MBN
Studio. Our approach is based on stochastic dynamics (SD), which describes the
probabilistic evolution of complex systems. The parameters for the new SD-based
FEBID model were determined using molecular dynamics (MD) simulations. A new
methodology was developed for this purpose and is described in detail. This
methodology can be applied to many other case studies of the dynamics of
complex systems. Our work focuses on the FEBID process involving W(CO)$_6$
precursor molecules deposited on a hydroxylated SiO$_2$-H substrate.
Simulations and a detailed analysis of a growing W-rich nanostructure were
performed. This new approach was shown to provide essential atomistic insights
into the complex FEBID process, including the elemental composition and
morphology of the deposit at each stage of growth. The derived results were
then compared with experimental observations and validated. The multiscale
methods developed in this study can be further upgraded and applied to
important technological developments, such as 3D nanoprinting.

</details>


### [1150] [Quantifying Gibbs measures of disordered crystals up to the solid-liquid phase transition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18190)
*Vladislav Efremkin,Julian Heske,Thomas D. Kühne,Emil Prodan*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 通过Voronoi细胞重构晶格，发现晶体相中存在四个稳定的大面，是量化Gibbs测度的关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决热无序凝聚态系统中配置空间和Gibbs测度的量化问题，避免Gibbs悖论。

Method: 利用Voronoi细胞的统计特性，尤其是四个大面的存在，重构晶格。

Result: 在硅晶体相中，发现四个概率为一的大面，可用于重构晶格。

Conclusion: 论文提出了一种通过Voronoi细胞重构热无序凝聚态系统晶格的方法，并发现晶体相中存在四个概率为一的大面，这些面是晶体相的基本特征。

Abstract: Quantifying the configuration space and the Gibbs measure of thermally
disordered condensed matter systems has been a long standing problem. The
challenge is to avoid the Gibbs paradox, which forbids any ordering or labeling
of the atoms. Our key observation is that the lattice of a thermally disordered
condensed matter system, in either solid, liquid or gas phase, can be fully
reconstructed from the Voronoi cells of the atoms alone, even if these Voronoi
cells are disassembled and randomly scrambled. In the example of the
crystalline phase of silicon, the statistics of the Voronoi cells reveals the
existence of four, and only four, large facets that are present with
probability one for all temperatures up to the solid-liquid melting line. These
four largest facets, which separate nearest-neighboring atoms, can be also be
used to reconstruct the lattice of the crystal. Hence, their collection
supplies the optimal representation of the configuration of the crystal. We
conjecture that the existence of Voronoi facets that, despite their large
thermal fluctuations, survive with probability one up to the melting
temperature, is the fundamental signature of the crystalline solid phase and
therefore key to quantifying the Gibbs measure over the entire solid phase.

</details>


### [1151] [XtalOpt Version 14: Variable-Composition Crystal Structure Search for Functional Materials Through Pareto Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17246)
*Samad Hajinazar,Eva Zurek*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: XtalOpt版本14通过整合多种计算方法和Pareto优化，提升了晶体结构预测的效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个能够高效预测可变组成晶体结构的新版本XtalOpt，以支持功能材料的发现。

Method: 集成了从头算方法、经典势和机器学习势，并引入Pareto优化方法。

Result: XtalOpt版本14能够更高效地进行多目标全局优化，支持可变组成的晶体结构预测。

Conclusion: XtalOpt版本14通过整合多种计算方法，包括从头算方法、经典势和机器学习势，进一步优化了多目标搜索框架，提高了功能材料的发现效率。

Abstract: Version 14 of XtalOpt, evolutionary multi-objective global optimization
algorithm for crystal structure prediction, is now available for download from
its official website https://xtalopt.github.io. The new version of the code is
designed to perform ground state search for novel crystal structures with
variable composition by integrating a suite of ab initio methods alongside
classical and machine-learning potentials for structural relaxation. The
multi-objective search framework has been further enhanced through the
introduction of Pareto optimization, enabling efficient discovery of functional
materials. Here, we describe the implemented methodologies, provide detailed
instructions for their use, and present an overview of additional improvements
included in XtalOpt version 14.

</details>


### [1152] [A Comprehensive Evaluation of the Bernoulli-Trial Collisions Families in Treating Rarefied Micro Flows and Hypersonic Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17256)
*Ahmad Shoja-sani,Maryam Javani,Ehsan Roohi,Stefan Stefanov*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 本文全面评估了基于Bernoulli-trials（BT）的碰撞伙伴选择方案，包括SBT、GBT、SSBT和新提出的SGBT，在稀薄气体动力学问题中的表现。结果表明，这些算法在粒子数减少时能有效维持碰撞频率，且SGBT与GBT在速度分布函数的4阶矩上表现一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于对基于Kac随机方程的BT系列碰撞算法进行系统评估，以验证其在稀薄气体动力学问题中的有效性。

Method: 通过比较SBT、GBT、SSBT和SGBT等算法在标准稀薄气体动力学问题中的表现，特别是碰撞频率和速度分布函数的4阶矩。

Result: 结果表明，BT系列算法在粒子数减少时能维持碰撞频率，且SGBT与GBT在理论预测的4阶矩上表现一致。

Conclusion: BT系列碰撞算法在稀薄气体动力学模拟中表现优异，尤其是SGBT算法在理论一致性上表现突出。

Abstract: The collision process is essential to the Direct Simulation Monte Carlo
(DSMC) method, as it incorporates the fundamental principles of the Boltzmann
and Kac stochastic equations. A series of collision algorithms, known as the
Bernoulli-trials (BT) family schemes, have been proposed based on the Kac
stochastic equation. The impetus of this paper is to present a comprehensive
evaluation of different BT-based collision partner selection schemes, including
the simplified Bernoulli-trials (SBT), generalized Bernoulli-trials (GBT),
symmetrized and simplified Bernoulli-trials (SSBT), and newly proposed
symmetrized and generalized Bernoulli-trials (SGBT), in treating some standard
rarefied gas dynamics problems. In these algorithms, the first particle is
chosen in a specific order from the list of particles in the cell. For the SBT
and GBT, the second particle is chosen from the remaining particles in the list
placed after the first particle; however, for SSBT and SGBT, the second
particle is chosen from all particles in the list. This means that the SBT and
GBT select pairs from the upper triangle of the collision probability matrix,
while symmetrized algorithms such as SSBT and SGBT utilize the entire matrix.
The results show that the BT-based collision algorithms, compared to the
standard "No Time Counter (NTC)" and "Nearest Neighbor (NN)", successfully
maintain the collision frequency as the number of particles per cell decreases.
Simulation of the Bobylev-Krook-Wu (BKW) exact solution of the Boltzmann
equation indicates that, like the GBT, the SGBT algorithm produces the same
results as the theory for the average of the 4th moment of the velocity
distribution function (VDF).

</details>


### [1153] [Refining Tc Prediction in Hydrides via Symbolic-Regression-Enhanced Electron-Localization-Function-Based Descriptors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17456)
*Francesco Belli,Sean Torres,Julia Contreras-Garcìa,Eva Zurek*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 通过引入分子性指数和符号回归，提高了氢化物超导性的预测准确性，为加速筛选新材料提供了更稳健的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 氢基材料因其低原子质量和强电子-声子相互作用而具有极高的超导临界温度，但现有基于电子局域函数（ELF）的描述符因训练数据集小且同质性高而受限。

Method: 重新编译了一个包含244种二元和三元氢化物超导体的公开数据集，并引入了分子性指数和符号回归方法。

Result: ELF基网络仍是一个有价值的描述符，但其预测能力随组成复杂性增加而下降；通过引入分子性指数和符号回归，预测准确性显著提高。

Conclusion: 通过引入分子性指数和应用符号回归，显著提高了对氢化物超导性的预测准确性，为加速筛选新型候选材料提供了更稳健的框架。

Abstract: Hydrogen-based materials are able to possess extremely high superconducting
critical temperatures, \tc s, due to hydrogen's low atomic mass and strong
electron-phonon interaction. Recently, a descriptor based on the Electron
Localization Function (ELF) has enabled the rapid estimation of the \tc\ of
hydrogen-containing compounds from electronic networking properties, but its
applicability has been limited by the small size and homogeneity of the
training dataset used. Herein, the model is re-examined compiling a publicly
available combined dataset of 244 binary and ternary hydride superconductors.
Our analysis shows that though ELF-based networking remains a valuable
descriptor, its predictive power declines with increasing compositional
complexity. However, by introducing the molecularity index, defined as the
highest value of the ELF at which two hydrogen atoms connect, and applying
symbolic regression, the accuracy of the predictions can be substantially
enhanced. These results establish a more robust framework for assessing
superconductivity in hydride materials, facilitating accelerated screening of
novel candidates through integration with crystal structure prediction methods
or high-throughput searches.

</details>


### [1154] [JAX-LaB: A High-Performance, Differentiable, Lattice Boltzmann Library for Modeling Multiphase Fluid Dynamics in Geosciences and Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.17713)
*Piyush Pradhan,Pierre Gentine,Shaina Kelly*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: JAX-LaB是一个基于Python的可微分Lattice Boltzmann库，用于模拟水文、地质和工程多孔介质中的多相和多物理流动。它利用JAX进行计算，支持多种硬件，并与机器学习工作流无缝集成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个高性能、硬件无关的库，用于模拟多相和多物理流动，同时与机器学习工作流兼容。

Method: 基于XLB库扩展，使用Shan-Chen伪势方法建模多相相互作用，结合状态方程和改进的强迫方案，以及改进的虚拟密度方案处理润湿。

Result: 通过多个分析基准验证了库的准确性，并展示了单GPU和多GPU的性能扩展。

Conclusion: JAX-LaB是一个高效、灵活的开源工具，适用于复杂流动模拟，并支持大规模并行计算。

Abstract: We present JAX-LaB, a differentiable, Python-based Lattice Boltzmann library
for simulating multiphase and multiphysics flows in hydrologic, geologic, and
engineered porous media. Built as an extension of the XLB library, JAX-LaB
utilizes JAX for computations and offers a performant, hardware-agnostic
implementation that integrates seamlessly with machine learning workflows and
scales efficiently across CPUs, GPUs, and distributed systems. Multiphase
interactions are modeled using the Shan-Chen pseudopotential method, which is
coupled with an equation of state and an improved forcing scheme to obtain
liquid-vapor densities that are consistent with Maxwell's construction,
enabling simulations of systems with very large density ratios while
maintaining minimal spurious currents. Wetting is handled using the "improved"
virtual density scheme, which allows precise control of contact angles and
eliminates non-physical films seen in other Shan-Chen wetting methods. We
validate the library through several analytical benchmarks, such as Laplace's
law, capillary rise, and cocurrent multicomponent flow, and demonstrate some
exemplary use cases for the library. We also report single- and multi-GPU
performance scaling of the library. The library is open-source under the Apache
license and available at https://github.com/piyush-ppradhan/JAX-LaB.

</details>


### [1155] [Stochastic dynamics simulation of the focused electron beam induced deposition process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18163)
*Ilia A. Solov'yov,Alexey Prosvetov,Gennady Sushko,Andrey V. Solov'yov*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一种基于随机动力学的多尺度模型，用于模拟FEBID过程，并通过分子动力学模拟验证了其准确性，为纳米制造技术提供了新见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 聚焦电子束诱导沉积（FEBID）是一种重要的纳米制造技术，但其复杂过程需要原子尺度的理解。本研究旨在开发一种多尺度计算方法，以提供对FEBID过程的深入见解。

Method: 研究采用随机动力学（SD）和分子动力学（MD）模拟相结合的方法，开发了一种新的多尺度计算模型。通过详细分析W(CO)$_6$前驱体分子在羟基化SiO$_2$-H基底上的沉积过程，验证了模型的准确性。

Result: 研究成功开发了一种基于SD和MD的多尺度模型，能够模拟FEBID过程中W(CO)$_6$前驱体分子的沉积行为。模型提供了沉积物的元素组成和形态的详细分析，并与实验数据一致。

Conclusion: 该研究开发了一种基于随机动力学（SD）的多尺度计算方法，用于模拟聚焦电子束诱导沉积（FEBID）过程。该方法通过分子动力学（MD）模拟确定参数，并成功应用于W(CO)$_6$前驱体分子在羟基化SiO$_2$-H基底上的沉积过程。研究结果为FEBID过程提供了原子尺度的见解，并与实验观察结果进行了验证。该方法可进一步升级并应用于3D纳米打印等重要技术。

Abstract: This work reports on the development of a new approach to the multiscale
computational modelling of the focused electron beam-induced deposition
(FEBID), realised using the advanced software packages: MBN Explorer and MBN
Studio. Our approach is based on stochastic dynamics (SD), which describes the
probabilistic evolution of complex systems. The parameters for the new SD-based
FEBID model were determined using molecular dynamics (MD) simulations. A new
methodology was developed for this purpose and is described in detail. This
methodology can be applied to many other case studies of the dynamics of
complex systems. Our work focuses on the FEBID process involving W(CO)$_6$
precursor molecules deposited on a hydroxylated SiO$_2$-H substrate.
Simulations and a detailed analysis of a growing W-rich nanostructure were
performed. This new approach was shown to provide essential atomistic insights
into the complex FEBID process, including the elemental composition and
morphology of the deposit at each stage of growth. The derived results were
then compared with experimental observations and validated. The multiscale
methods developed in this study can be further upgraded and applied to
important technological developments, such as 3D nanoprinting.

</details>


### [1156] [Quantifying Gibbs measures of disordered crystals up to the solid-liquid phase transition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18190)
*Vladislav Efremkin,Julian Heske,Thomas D. Kühne,Emil Prodan*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

TL;DR: 通过Voronoi细胞重构热无序系统的晶格结构，揭示了晶体相的基本特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化热无序系统的构型空间和Gibbs测度是一个长期存在的问题，需避免Gibbs悖论。

Method: 利用Voronoi细胞重构晶格，即使细胞被打乱也能识别晶体相的特征。

Result: 在硅晶体中，发现四个始终存在的大面，可用于重构晶格并表征晶体相。

Conclusion: Voronoi面的存在是晶体相的基本特征，为量化Gibbs测度提供了关键依据。

Abstract: Quantifying the configuration space and the Gibbs measure of thermally
disordered condensed matter systems has been a long standing problem. The
challenge is to avoid the Gibbs paradox, which forbids any ordering or labeling
of the atoms. Our key observation is that the lattice of a thermally disordered
condensed matter system, in either solid, liquid or gas phase, can be fully
reconstructed from the Voronoi cells of the atoms alone, even if these Voronoi
cells are disassembled and randomly scrambled. In the example of the
crystalline phase of silicon, the statistics of the Voronoi cells reveals the
existence of four, and only four, large facets that are present with
probability one for all temperatures up to the solid-liquid melting line. These
four largest facets, which separate nearest-neighboring atoms, can be also be
used to reconstruct the lattice of the crystal. Hence, their collection
supplies the optimal representation of the configuration of the crystal. We
conjecture that the existence of Voronoi facets that, despite their large
thermal fluctuations, survive with probability one up to the melting
temperature, is the fundamental signature of the crystalline solid phase and
therefore key to quantifying the Gibbs measure over the entire solid phase.

</details>
